name: Vitamin C Plus Extended Release Family Size
description: Highly effective vitamin C supplement designed to provide a slow, steady release 				of vitamin C.
overview:
Nutrilite Vitamin C Plus (Extended Release) is an improved, highly effective vitamin C supplement designed to provide a slow, steady release of vitamin C into the body to maximise absorption without the waste associated with large doses or instant release tablets. Vitamin C is an essential nutrient that should be replenished daily as part of a well-balanced diet and can be found in fruits such as acerola cherries, blackcurrants and most citrus fruits. Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of skin and the immune system. It also contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress. Vitamin C Plus (Extended Release) is made from two sources of vitamin C: natural acerola cherries grown on our certified environmentally sensitive Nutrilite farms and ascorbic acid. We use acerola cherries as they are one of nature’s most concentrated sources of natural vitamin C. Each tablet contains 240 mg of vitamin C, blended with a fibrous ingredient that allows the vitamin C to dissolve slowly in the body over eight hours. 1 tablet provides more total useable vitamin C throughout the day than 600 mg provided by instant release and is also gentler on the stomach.

  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.

Features

  • Vitamin C plays a role in the normal function of the immune system.
  • Each daily tablet provides the body with a steady dose of vitamin C, lasting for over 8 hours.
  • Contains citrus bioflavonoid concentrates dried from whole fruits including lemons, mandarin oranges and grapefruit.
  • Provides vitamin C from one of the richest known natural sources: acerola cherries.
  • Provides antioxidant protection from vitamin C (a water-soluble vitamin).
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives added.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.
  • Product does not contain ingredients of animal origin.
details:
Suggested Usage

  • Those who do not regularly eat enough (or who do not have the time nor the appetite to eat) natural foods containing vitamin C, such as citrus fruits, broccoli and brussels sprouts.
  • Those who are interested in increasing their antioxidant protection against free radical damage, for example, people who live stressful lives or who live in areas of high pollution.
  • Anyone who wishes to supplement their daily diet without artificial flavours, colours or preservatives.

Recommended dosage

1 tablet daily.

Advisory

Keep out of reach of young children. This product is no substitute for a varied diet. Please do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Keep bottle tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.

Ingredients

 
AVERAGE CONTENT   PER 1 TABLET   % NRV* 
Vitamin C 240 mg 300%

 

* % of nutrient reference value

INGREDIENTS: L-ascorbic Acid, Stabilisers (Microcrystalline Cellulose, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Methylcellulose), Acerola Extract 15% (Malpighia punicifolia), Grapefruit Concentrate (Citrus paradisi), Royal Mandarin Concentrate (Citrus reticulata, C. sinensis), Anti-caking Agents (Magnesium Salts of Fatty Acids, Silicon Dioxide), Maltodextrin, Lemon Concentrate (Citrus limon), Humectant (Glycerol), Glazing Agent (Carnauba Wax)

name: Cal Mag D Plus
description: Food supplement which contains 3 natural source nutrients: calcium, magnesium and vitamin D.
overview:
Nutrilite Cal Mag D Plus contains 3 natural source nutrients – calcium, magnesium, vitamin D. Calcium is needed to maintenance of normal bones.

Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of normal bones. It also contains vitamin D which contributes to the normal absorption of calcium.

Suitable for vegetarians.

Features

  • Contains 3 natural source nutrients – calcium, magnesium, vitamin D – which contribute to the maintenance of normal bones.
  • Contains vitamin D, which supports the normal absorption of calcium.
  • Magnesium also contributes to normal muscle function and functioning of the nervous system.
  • In addition calcium contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism and blood clotting.
  • It contains calcified seaweed – one of nature’s most concentrated botanical sources of calcium.
  • Easy to swallow because of slim, streamlined shape.
  • No artificial flavours, colours or added preservatives.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.

name: Vitamin B Plus
description: The food supplement Nutrilite™ Vitamin B Plus is a dual-action tablet with instant and eight-hour release 				made with natural spirulina and packed with all eight essential B vitamins.
overview:
Nutrilite™ Vitamin B Plus uses a dual-action technology for the optimum release of all eight essential B Vitamins to help reduce fatigue, support normal energy-yielding metabolism and contribute to the normal functioning of the immune system.
 


Why you will love it…

While our lives are getting busier and busier, running out of energy is not an option. Many of us turn to caffeine or snacks to boost our energy levels when they’re lagging but these habits are far from sustainable and neither actually address the causes of fatigue.

With Nutrilite™ Vitamin B Plus, it’s easy to stay energised. B Vitamins support your normal energy-yielding metabolism and help to reduce tiredness and fatigue. Nutrilite™ Vitamin B Plus provides an immediate boost of B Vitamins to kick-start your day and maintain energy levels for a full eight hours. Additionally, vitamins B12 and B6 have been found to contribute to the normal functioning of the immune system, giving you the daily support you need to live life to the fullest.

100% NRV (Nutrient Reference Value) of all eight essential B Vitamins are delivered in just one tablet and thanks to the dual-action technology nutrients are released at the ideal time for an optimal absorption. One tablet is all it takes to feel full of energy all day.
 


Good to know…

  • Nutrilite™ Vitamin B Plus provides 100%NRV (Nutrient Reference Value) of all eight essential B Vitamins in just one tablet.
  • Optimal absorption: The dual action technology enables all B Vitamins to be released to the body at the ideal time.
  • Nutrilite™ Vitamin B Plus provides an immediate boost of B Vitamins to get you kick-started; then allows a continued support for eight full hours.
  • Supports normal energy-yielding metabolism by providing B1 thiamine, B2 riboflavin, B3 niacin, B5 pantothenic acid, B6 pyridoxine, B7 biotin and B12 cobalamin.
  • Contributes to the normal functioning of the immune system with vitamins B12 and 6.
  • Contributes to normal functioning of the nervous system and psychological function
  • B vitamins, Biotin, Folate, Niacin, Thiamin, Vitamin B12, Vitamin B6,
  • Helps to reduce tiredness and fatigue by delivering B2 riboflavin, B3 niacin, B5 pantothenic acid, B6 pyridoxine, B9 folic acid and B12 cobalamin.
  • Contains natural Spirulina, which has been harvested from a Nutricert™ certified aqua farm.
  • Easy to swallow tablet due to its shape; convenient because you only need one tablet for an all-day support.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.

     


Among leading global vitamin brands, Nutrilite was the first with a B-complex vitamin supplement with dual-action technology*.

* Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/

Features

  • Just one bi-layer tablet per day delivers 100% NRV* of all eight essential B Vitamins: thiamine (B1), riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), pyridoxine (B6), biotin (B7), folic acid (B9) and cobalamin (B12).
  • It ensures optimal nutrient release of each B vitamin using dual-action technology.
  • It contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue with the B Vitamins riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), pyridoxine (B6), folic acid (B9) and cobalamin (B12).
  • The normal energy-yielding metabolism is supported by thiamine (B1), riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), pyridoxine (B6), biotin (B7) and cobalamin (B12).
  • It contains natural Spirulina, which is grown and harvested on a NUTRICERT™ certified aqua farm.
  • Easy to swallow due to slim tablet shape.
  • Convenient – no need to take multiple tablets throughout the day.

name: Milk Thistle
description: Nutrilite Milk Thistle supports healthy liver function.
overview:
The special formula contains milk thistle extract, which supports the liver’s detoxifying function. 

What It Does For You

The liver works as a gatekeeper- keeping the good and filtering the bad. It is important that you give your liver the support it deserves. Provide the support it needs with Nutrilite™ Milk Thistle!

  • Milk thistle extract protects the liver and supports its detoxifying function. It also helps to maintain the liver’s health.
  • Milk thistle extract facilitates digestion and helps the body cleanse itself. 
  • Turmeric extract contributes to the liver’s health. It also contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress
  • It contains Dandelion root which supports digestive health. 
  • The botanicals: milk thistle, turmeric, dandelion root, acerola cherry and citrus bioflavonoids in the formula are all obtained from sustainably managed NutriCert™ certified farms.

Why You Would Like It

Your liver is a true hero behind the scenes as it helps filter the toxins out of your system while keeping the good elements in. Containing compounds not commonly found in a typical diet, Nutrilite Milk Thistle offers you a convenient solution to maintain your liver in a good health. You can easily integrate it into your daily nutrition regime, by having one tablet twice a day preferably with a meal. Furthermore, Nutrilite Milk Thistle is rich in natural botanical extracts, produced only from plants obtained using sustainable farming methods. Sustainable farming generates stronger, more vigorous plants with high nutritional value.

 

Facts For You

  • The liver is very multifunctional – it simultaneously performs over 500 important functions for the body. 
  • The liver is the largest internal and it works 24/7.
  • Liver health is one of the most foundational factors affecting our well-being. 
  • The liver not only filters what you eat and drink but also the medicines you take and even the pollutants you absorb every day!
  • Product does not contain ingredients of animal origin.
details:
Key Features

  • This special Nutrilite formula contains an exclusive blend of three herbs: milk thistle, dandelion root and turmeric. It is also enriched with acerola cherry concentrate and citrus bioflavonoid concentrate.
  • Milk thistle extract protects the liver and supports the liver’s detoxifying function. It also facilitates digestion and helps the body cleanse itself.
  • Turmeric extract contributes to the liver’s health. It also contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress
  • Dandelion root supports digestive health.
  • The botanical extracts such as milk thistle, turmeric, dandelion root, acerola cherry and citrus bioflavonoids in the formula are obtained from sustainably managed NutriCert™ certified farms. Sustainable farming generates stronger, vigorous plants with high nutritional value.
  • Our Nutrilite philosophy is to control the entire process from seed to supplement, ensuring that only the high-quality ingredients go into Nutrilite products.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society, does not contain animal-sourced ingredients.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • Free from artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours, and preservatives.

How To Use

  • Recommended dosage: 1 tablet twice a day, preferably with meals. 
  • Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. 
  • Do not take it during pregnancy.
  • Keep the container tightly closed. 
  • Keep out of reach of young children. 
  • Store in a cool and dry place.
  • The product is intended only for adults. 
  • In case of alterations to biliary or gall bladder stones, the use of the product is not recommended. If you are taking any medication, you should seek the advice of your doctor.

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS: stabilisers (microcrystalline cellulose, sodium carboxymethylcellulose, gum arabic, hydroxypropylmethylcellulose), milk thistle extract (Silybum marianum gaertn, tegumen seminis, 18.5%), dandelion root extract (Taraxacum officinale weber, radix, 16.5%), silybin-phosphatidylcholine complex 10% (from soy), turmeric extract (Curcuma longa L., rhizoma, 8.4%), citrus bioflavonoid concentrate (Citrus x paradisi macfad., pericarpium; Citrus reticulata L, pericarpium; Citrus limon burm F. pericarpium; 6.6%), acerola concentrate (Malpighia punicifolia L. - Acerola, fructus, 1.2%), anti-caking agents (silicon dioxide, magnesium salts of fatty acids), maltodextrin, humectant (glycerol), glazing agent (carnauba wax).

name: Vitamin D
description: Food supplement with vitamin D derived from natural sources, contributes to the maintenance of normal bones, teeth, muscle function and normal function of the immune system.
overview:
Nutrilite™ Vitamin D helps to support healthy muscles, bones and teeth as well as normal functioning of the immune system and overall good health.
 


Why you will love it…

Experts recognise vitamin D as a hugely important factor in our general health and well-being. It assists many factors when it comes to good health. We synthesise vitamin D when our skin comes into contact with the sun’s rays, however, with many of us spending the majority of our days inside in artificial lighting, and sunscreen being widely observed for good skin health, it can sometimes be difficult for us to get sufficient exposure to UV rays. Additionally, it is a challenge to get adequate amounts of vitamin D in our diets as it appears in very few foods, though you can find it in fatty fish such as salmon and mackerel. Where you live matters too, as UV exposure in the Northern Hemisphere is more of an issue than it is further south, which is one reason why over 40% of Europeans are deficient in this valuable vitamin*.

Nutrilite™ Vitamin D brings the sunshine to you. Containing a daily dose of 15µg (600 IU)** naturally sourced vitamin D, this supplement contributes to healthy bones and teeth and the proper functioning of your immune system and muscle function. Natural vitamin D is also known to play a role in the process of cell division, making it a factor in overall good health. There could not be a more convenient way to maintain good levels of vitamin D.



Good to know…  

  • Nutrilite™ Vitamin D supplement offers a daily dose of 15µg (600 IU)** of Vitamin D, derived from two natural sources, to support good health. This supplement is made from concentrated vitamin D derived from cultured yeast from a NutriCert™ certified partner facility.
  • Convenient to take, you just need one small, easy-to-swallow tablet a day.
  • Nutrilite™ Vitamin D doesn’t contain artificial colour, flavours or added preservatives.
  • Vitamin D helps to support your bones and teeth and contributes to the utilisation of calcium and phosphorus.
  • Vitamin D assists the normal functioning of the immune system while helping to maintain normal muscle function.
  • Vitamin D is known to play a role in the process of cell division in the body making it key for overall good health.  
  • Suitable for vegetarians.

* A large-scale study funded by the European Union found that vitamin D inadequacy is prevalent among 40.4% of the European population, irrespective of age, ethnicity, and latitude. Source: Cashman KD, Dowling KG, et al. Vitamin D deficiency in Europe: pandemic? Am J Clin Nutr (2016) 103(4):1033–44.10.3945/ajcn.115.120873.

** 300% of NRV (Nutrient Reference Values).
details:
Key Features

NUTRILITE Vitamin D provides a supplementary dose of 15µg (600 IU) of vitamin D.

It is convenient to incorporate into any diet or routine – just take one small, easy-to-swallow tablet per day.

NUTRILITE Vitamin D is made with cultured yeast – a highly concentrated source of vitamin D.

NUTRILITE Vitamin D does not contain artificial colours, flavours or added preservatives.

How To Use

Take 1 tablet a day, with or without a meal.

  • Keep out of reach of young children.
  • Food supplements are no substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.
  • Please do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Keep bottle tightly closed.
  • Store in a cool, dry place.
  • Additionally, a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle are of general importance.

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS: Maltodextrin, Stabilisers (Microcrystalline Cellulose, Cross-Linked Sodium Carboxymethylcellulose, Hydroxypropyl Methyl Cellulose), Vitamin D Yeast 3%, Modified Starch, Anti-Caking Agents (Silicon Dioxide, Fatty Acids), Sucrose, Antioxidants (Sodium Ascorbate, Alpha-Tocopherol), Humectant (Glycerol), Medium Chain Triglycerides, Cholecalciferol, Glazing Agent (Carnauba Wax).

name: Vision Plus
description: Eye-health supplement containing essential nutrients (Zinc and Vitamin A) for normal vision support*. With 4 Carotenoids from natural sources and Zinc.     *Vitamin A (Beta-Carotene) and Zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal vision.
overview:
Softgel supplement with vitamin A (beta-carotene) and zinc to help maintain normal vision*. With 4 Carotenoids from natural sources and Zinc.

*Vitamin A (Provitamin A Beta Carotene) and Zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal vision.

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides Zinc and Vitamin A, both of which contribute to the maintenance of normal vision. Zinc also contributes to the normal metabolism of Vitamin A.
  • Provides four premium-quality, highly concentrated Carotenoids – Lutein, Zeaxanthin, Lycopene and Beta Carotene.
  • Contains Beta Carotene from Algae Dunaliella Salina, which converts in the body into Vitamin A, which in turn contributes to the maintenance of normal vision.
  • Fits conveniently into any routine or lifestyle thanks to the small, easy-to-swallow, one-a-day softgel format.

Why You Would Like It

Our eyes guide us through life. What we see, and how we see it, contributes to our quality of life and the memories we cherish later. Our eyes support us in nearly every aspect of daily life. While we spend a lot of time staring at screens our eyes might feel that we demand a lot from them. Being such an important organ, they clearly deserve our attention. Let’s look for nutrients essential for the eyes.

Inspired by nature, Nutrilite Vision plus* is a daily-use food supplement for eyes* that contains Zinc and four premium-quality, highly concentrated Carotenoids derived from plants grown on NutriCert sustainable partner farms.

*Vitamin A (Beta-Carotene) and Zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal vision.

Facts For You

  • One softgel contains 12 mg Lutein and 2.4 mg Zeaxanthin
  • One softgel contains 2.5 mg Beta Carotene
  • One softgel contains 1.5 mg Lycopene

No artificial colours, sweeteners, flavours, or preservatives

name: Garlic
description: Information on estimated time of arrival not available 				 				Peppermint flavoured food supplement which contains garlic powder.
overview:
NUTRILITE Garlic is a food supplement with garlic powder. Garlic contributes to normal immune function, resistance against temporary stress and to maintenance of heart health/ maintenance of normal cholesterol levels.

This product is a convenient way to obtain the benefit of garlic without the unpleasant odour side effects. The garlic in this product is combined with a pleasant peppermint flavour. The garlic and peppermint in this product are sourced from our Nutrilite brand-owned owned Trout Lake Farm.

Features

  • Garlic contributes to the maintenance of heart health, and normal cholesterol levels. It also contributes to normal immune function.
  • Two tablets provide at least 13.5 mg of alliin and 6 mg of allicin. Allicin is created when garlic is crushed and its two components, alliin and alliinase, interact. It is responsible for the aroma of fresh garlic.
  • Pleasant peppermint flavour provides odour control.
  • Enteric coating protects the active components in the garlic during their transit through the acidic stomach environment and releases them at the intestines to be effective.
  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives added.
  • The product is not suitable for vegans/vegetarians.

Those who wish to supplement with the benefits of garlic, but without the odour.

overview:

Why you will love it…

Parents know just how difficult it can be to encourage their little ones to eat enough fruit and vegetables they’re given and ensure they’re benefiting from a varied and balanced diet. Children need a good supply of vitamins, minerals and phytonutrients to fuel their days and support growth and their immune system.

It contains a variety of vitamins and minerals including calcium, for the normal growth and development of bones, vitamin D for the normal functioning of the immune system, plus iron, zinc and vitamins B and C.
 


Good to know…

  • Contains vitamins C, iron, zinc which contribute to a normal function of the immune system.
  • Iron contributes to normal oxygen transport in the body and to normal formation of red blood cells and haemoglobin.
  • Vitamins B contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

  • Sweetened with dextrose and fructose.
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives added.

overview:

This special NUTRILITE formula provides phytonutrients such as lycopene, hesperidin and ellagic acid which are also found naturally in various fruits and vegetables.

We know we can get vitamins and minerals from fresh fruits and vegetables, but in addition they are also full of other nutrients. The exclusive NUTRILITE concentrate process preserves these nutrients, keeping the nutritional value and essential phytonutrients.

This product is designed to complement a daily intake of fruits and vegetables and offers a variety of plant-sourced nutrients in the diet by providing a variety of phytonutrients from plant sources.

Breakfast

Mid-morning

Afternoon snack

After dinner 

  • XS™ Amino Advantage+: Mix 1 scoop (7.3 g) with 300 ml water, shake and drink

name: Energy Program Food Supplement Bundle
description: This virtual bundle features carefully selected products from Nutrilite™, delivering the essential daily support for your energy needs¹. Each bundle includes an exclusive and convenient pillbox as a gift. This bundle is part of Nutrilite™ Energy Program. size: 1x Nutrilite™ Omega-3 Fish Oil triple strength, 1x Nutrilite™ Double X™, 1x Nutrilite™ Balance Within, 1x free pillbox
overview:
Nutrilite™ Energy Program Food Supplement bundle is the targeted supplementation you need to have consistent energy1 from the moment you wake up till the moment you go to bed. 
It includes Nutrilite™ Double X™, Nutrilite™ Omega-3 Fish Oil triple strength and Nutrilite™ Balance Within.

Take advantage of the convenient pillbox to ensure your daily supplements are always with you!

1 Vitamin B6 supports your normal energy metabolism and contributes to normal psychological function. Magnesium contributes to a reduction of tiredness and fatigue.

 

What It Does For You

  • Supports consistent energy1 throughout the day
  • Gives Mind Brightness1
  • Provides foundational nutrients to support overall well-being1 
  • Contributes to the normal function of the heart2
  • Gives an extra support to immune system3 and maintains a positive mood1

1 Vitamin B6 supports your normal energy metabolism and contributes to normal psychological function. Magnesium contributes to the normal functioning of the nervous system and helps to contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue. Pantothenic acid contributes to normal mental performance.
2 EPA and DHA support the normal function of the heart. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of EPA and DHA.
3 Vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid) contribute to the normal function of the immune system.

Why You Would Like It

In the face of a busy and challenging lifestyle, maintaining a nutritionally balanced source of energy is crucial for the optimal functioning of every bodily system, including brain function, and heart health. 
Prepare yourself for whatever the day may bring with the Nutrilite™ Energy Program Food Supplement Bundle. 
Nutrilite™ Double X™ helps fill potential gaps in vitamins, minerals and phytonutrients, restoring the body's internal balance and unleashing your natural inner energy1.
Nutrilite™ Omega-3 Fish Oil triple strength delivers high-quality Omega-3 fatty acids to promote overall wellness, including normal heart function2. 
Meanwhile, Nutrilite™ Balance Within supports your immune system3, ensuring you feel your best.

This bundle is part of Nutrilite™ Energy Program. Make sure you follow the programme. Learn more  

1 Vitamin B6 supports your normal energy metabolism and contributes to normal psychological function. Magnesium contributes to the normal functioning of the nervous system and helps to contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.
2 EPA and DHA support the normal function of the heart. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of EPA and DHA.
3 Vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid) contribute to the normal function of the immune system

Facts For You

  • The Nutrilite™ Energy Program Food Supplement Bundle is part of the Nutrilite™ Energy Program, a comprehensive solution that includes a balanced meal plan, targeted supplementation and easy-to-follow 10-minute workout.
  • Nutrilite™ is the world’s #1 selling vitamins and dietary supplements brand1 
  • Nutrilite™ has been combining the power of science with the power of nature for 90 years to help people living healthier lives.
  • Nutrilite™ Double X™ contains plant ingredients, which are sourced from sustainable Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides.
  • Nutrilite™ Balance Within provides 6 billion units of scientifically well-documented lactic acid producing bacteria.
  • The three active components of Nutrilite™ Omega-3 Fish Oil triple strength are EPA (Eicosapentaenoic acid), DHA (Docosahexaenoic acid) and ALA (Alpha-linolenic acid). Omega-3 fatty acids can support normal function of vision2, heart3 and brain4. 
  • Nutrilite™ Double X™ is the #1 selling multivitamin multimineral with phytonutrients from five phytonutrient colour groups1
  • Nutrilite™ is the world’s #1 selling omega supplements brand1

1SOURCE: GlobalData, http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
2DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal vision. 
3EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart. DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal blood triglyceride levels. 
4DHA contributes to maintenance of normal brain function.

Key Features

  • Designed to maintain consistent energy levels and contribute to reduction of tiredness and fatigue1
  • Mind Brightness1
  • Provides broad coverage of daily vitamins, minerals and phytonutrients
  • Supports a healthy lifestyle, immunity system3 and a positive mood1
  • Helps to support heart function2
  • Helps keep normal blood glucose levels4

name: Ginkgo Biloba and DHA
description: Food supplement which contains ginkgo biloba combined with polyunsaturated fatty acid (DHA).
overview:
This exclusive Nutrilite formula contains a special combination of plant extracts and Nutrilite concentrates. DHA (Docosahexaeonic acid) is an essential fatty acid also found in high concentrations in the brain.

The good source of DHA is tuna oil; and it contributes to maintaining peripheral circulation. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of DHA.

Features

  • Ginkgo Biloba, combined with polyunsaturated fatty acids (DHA, Docosahexaenoic acid), helps to maintain memory with age decline and to preserve cognitive function.
  • It also contributes to good hearing and vision.
  • No artificial colours or preservatives added.
  • The product is not suitable for vegans/vegetarians.
details:
Suggested Usage

  • Those who wish to make use of plant extracts.
  • Those who wish to supplement their diet with natural ingredients.
  • Those who feel that their cognitive function has declined with age.
  • Those who wish to support their hearing and vision.

Recommended dosage

Take 1 capsule twice a day, preferably with meals.

Advisory

Keep out of reach of young children. This product is no substitute for a varied and balanced diet. Please do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Keep bottle tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.

Ingredients

AVERAGE CONTENT   PER 1 DAY (1 Capsule)   PER DAY (2 Capsules) 
Ginkgo Biloba Extract 55 mg 110 mg
Tuna oil 274 mg 548 mg
DHA 60 mg 120 mg

INGREDIENTS: Tuna Oil, Gelatin, Humectant (Glycerol), Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Ginkgo biloba Extract, Glazing Agent (Yellow Beeswax), Maltodextrin, Water, Gotu Kola Extract, Orange Extract (1.6%), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Colour (Sulphite Ammonia Caramel), Natural Spearmint Flavor, Natural Mixed Carotenoids.

name: Glucosamine
description: Food supplement which contains glucosamine and acerola concentrate, a natural source of vitamin C and phytonutrients.
overview:
This special formula contains glucosaminehydrochloride and exclusive acerola concentrate, a natural source of vitamin C and phytonutrients. Glucosamine is a natural substance extracted from crustaceans, shellfish.

Features

  • Contains glucosamine a component of cartilage.
  • Contains the Nutrilite Acerola Cherry Concentrate, a natural source of vitamin C and phytonutrients.
  • Contains citrus bioflavonoids concentrate from grapefruit, mandarin orange and lemon that provides plant phytonutrients.
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives added.

Benefits

Contains Glucosamine, a component of cartilage
details:
Suggested Usage

  • Those who wish to take advantage of the benefits of glucosamine.
  • Those who wish to supplement their diet with natural ingredients.

Recommended dosage

Take 1 capsule twice a day, preferably before meals.

Advisory

Keep out of reach of young children. This product is no substitute for a varied diet. Please do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Keep bottle tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.

Ingredients

AVERAGE CONTENT  PER CAPSULE 
Glucosamine Hydrochloride    350 mg
Citrus Concentrate 8.8 mg
Acerola Concentrate 5.5 mg

 

INGREDIENTS: Glucosamine Hydrochloride (from Crustaceans, Shellfish), stabiliser (microcrystalline cellulose), gelatin, anti-caking agents (magnesium salts of fatty acids, silicon dioxide), acerola concentrate, citrus concentrate (grapefruit, mandarin, lemon), maltodextrin.

name: Immuno
description: Immuno Nutrilite™ is a Juicy raspberry flavoured gummies with Vitamin C and Zinc which support the normal function of your immune system and Elderberry extract which can support your body’s natural defences.
overview:

With the right support, you can do anything.

overview:

An increased need occurs during pregnancy and breastfeeding. This product also contains premium NUTRILITE Spinach Concentrate.

Features

  • Contains NUTRILITE Spinach Concentrate.
  • Folate (folic acid) contributes to maternal tissue growth during pregnancy and normal blood formation.
  • Iron and folate have a role in the process of cell division.
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives.
  • The product is not suitable for vegans/vegetarians.
details:

Omega-3 fatty acids like DHA should be an essential part of kids’ healthy diet. Unfortunately, these good fats cannot be produced sufficiently by the body. Nutrilite™ Metabolism* Plus is designed to support your body’s metabolism
It has an exceptional and carefully developed formula that brings together 
vitamins for metabolism support*, botanicals and heat-treated bacteria.
Metabolism Support*
‘Metabolism’ comprises the many and highly complex biochemical reaction taking place in your body. ‘Energy- metabolism’ means all the processes which convert macronutrients from food into energy. Both Vitamin B2 (riboflavin) and pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism, and so, support a healthy metabolic function.

 

Ingredient Features

name: Natural Multi-Carotene
description: Food supplement, which contains beta-carotene, alpha-carotene, and lutein.
overview:
NUTRILITE Natural Multi Carotene is a food supplement with a carotenoid mixture from naturally derived sources.

These capsules contain a special carotenoid complex, from three naturally derived sources: Dunaliella salina algae, palm oil (Elaeis guineensis) and marigold (Tagetes erecta).

This complex contains Beta-carotene, alpha-carotene, and lutein, a complex of carotenoids similar to what is found in a mixture of various fruits and vegetables.

Beta-carotene is a precursor of vitamin A, which contributes to the maintenance of normal vision. Beta Carotene will only be changed into Vitamin A when the body needs it.

Features

  • Provides carotenoids similar to the mix found naturally in fruits and vegetables.
  • Provides lutein.
  • Provides a source of vitamin A (beta-carotene is also called provitamin A).
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives added.
  • The product is not suitable for vegans/vegetarians.
details:

name: Vitamin C Plus - Extended Release
description: Highly effective vitamin C supplement designed to provide a slow, steady release of vitamin C.
overview:
Nutrilite™ Vitamin C Plus is a highly effective food supplement that delivers a slow and steady release of Vitamin C throughout the day to support the normal functioning of your immune system.
 


Why you will love it…

Keeping fit and healthy is a priority for most of us but it can be a challenge to maintain a thriving immune system. Environmental pollution, germs and sickness, can weaken our immune defences. Even stress, exhaustion and an unbalanced diet can take their toll on your immunity.

The solution? Conveniently and effortlessly support your immune system with Nutrilite™ Vitamin C Plus supplement. Vitamin C is an essential nutrient that supports the immune system. In addition to providing such invaluable support to your immune system, Vitamin C helps to maintain the body’s normal collagen production for healthy skin and help to protect cells from oxidative stress (thanks to its antioxidant properties).

Created from two sources of Vitamin C – natural acerola cherries grown on our Nutrilite farm, and ascorbic acid – each convenient daily tablet contains 240 mg of Vitamin C, blended with a fibrous ingredient. This blend slows absorption and allows it to be released into the body over the course of eight hours. Just one 240 mg Extended Release tablet provides more usable Vitamin C throughout the day than a 600 mg instant release option.



Good to know…

  • Nutrilite™ Vitamin C Plus is a food supplement containing citrus bioflavonoid concentrates from whole fruits including lemon, mandarin, orange and grapefruit that helps to support normal immune function and healthy skin.
  • Extended release formula provides a slow, steady release of nutrients into the body to maximise absorption without the waste associated with large doses or instant release tablets.
  • This food supplement contains Vitamin C from acerola cherries. This rich source is grown on our own Nutrilite farmland where we only used sustainable farming methods.
  • There are no artificial colours, flavours or added preservatives in this food supplement.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.

     

Features

  • Vitamin C plays a role in the normal function of the immune system.
  • Each daily tablet provides the body with a steady dose of vitamin C, lasting for over 8 hours.
  • Contains citrus bioflavonoid concentrates dried from whole fruits including lemons, mandarin oranges and grapefruit.
  • Provides vitamin C from one of the richest known natural sources: acerola cherries.
  • Provides antioxidant protection from vitamin C (a water-soluble vitamin).
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives added.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.
  • Product does not contain ingredients of animal origin.

name: Refill DOUBLE X™
description:
Nutrilite DOUBLE X is a powerful multivitamin, multimineral and phytonutrient food supplement enriched with PhytoBlend™,

a special blend of 22 plants and phytonutrients from 5 colour groups that provides scientifically proven support for your body.
size: 2 x 31-day supply as refill (372 tablets) without tray
overview:
NUTRILITE DOUBLE X is a food supplement that provides a balanced combination of 12 essential vitamins and 10 essential minerals. It is enriched with PhytoBlend™, a special blend of 22 plants derived from fruits, vegetables and herbs that are not always easy to include in your everyday diet.

 

Nutrilite DOUBLE X adds variety to your diet by providing botanical elements from all 5 colour groups: green, white, yellow, red and purple. Each colour group delivers valuable nutrients. All plant ingredients are sourced from sustainable Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides. Sustainable farming is believed to generate strong, vigorous plants with a high nutritional value.

At times of stress or of seasonal change, Nutrilite DOUBLE X provides foundational nutrients to support overall well-being.

DOUBLE X is the world's #1 selling multivitamin multimineral with phytonutrients from five phytonutrient colour groups.1

1 Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/

 

What it does for you

NUTRILITE DOUBLE X is designed to help you close any potential nutritional and phytonutrient gaps. This allows you to regain your inner balance and thereby enhance your natural potential.

It delivers premium support to your body in many forms:

  • Brain function: Iodine supports normal cognitive functioning. Vitamin B12 contributes to normal psychological functioning.
  • Nervous system: Copper supports the normal functioning of the nervous system.
  • Immune system: Vitamin C contributes to the normal functioning of the immune system. 
  • Energy-yielding metabolism: Niacin supports a normal energy-yielding metabolism. 
  • Management of inflammatory responses: Curcumin helps your body manage inflammatory responses.
  • Digestion and liver: Calcium supports the normal functioning of digestive enzymes. Rosemary and curcumin help support normal liver functioning.
  • Cells: Calcium has a role in the process of cell division and specialisation.
  • Oxidative stress: Vitamin E contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress.
  • Heart function: Vitamin B6 supports normal homocysteine metabolism and thiamine contributes to the normal functioning of the heart.
  • Bone function: Vitamin D is needed for the maintenance of normal bones.
  • Muscle function: Magnesium contributes to normal muscle functioning.
  • Eye function/vision: Vitamin A supports the maintenance of normal vision.
  • Skin, hair and nails: Biotin contributes to the maintenance of normal skin and hair. Vitamin C supports normal collagen formation, helping the skin function normally. Selenium and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal nails.
  • Balanced hormones: Vitamin B6 supports the regulation of hormonal activity and pantothenic acid contributes to the normal synthesis and metabolism of steroid hormones, vitamin D and some neurotransmitters.

In addition, a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle are of general importance.

Why you would like it

The human body is an ecosystem that is constantly attempting to maintain inner balance in order to function optimally.

For this, proper nutrition is vital. A balanced and varied diet is essential, both for your present-day mental and physical well-being and for your overall health for years to come.

In fact, 3 out of 4 adults worldwide do not consume the daily minimum of 5 helpings of fruits and vegetables recommended by the World Health Organisation (WHO)1.   This is why you may need help getting the full complement of nutrients and secondary plant compounds known as phytonutrients.

NUTRILITE DOUBLE X contains plants and phytonutrients from all five colour groups: green, white, yellow, red, and purple.

NUTRILITE DOUBLE X can help you close potential vitamin, mineral and phytonutrient gaps, making sure your body regains its inner balance and allowing you to enhance your natural potential.

1 Source: “Global assessment of select phytonutrient intakes by the level of fruit and vegetable consumption”; Mary M. Murphy, Leila M. Barraj and Judith H. Spungen; British Journal of Nutrition (2014), 112, 1004-1018.

Facts for you

The vast majority of adults (58-88%) worldwide report that they consume less than the minimum of 5 helpings of fruits and vegetables per day recommended by the World Health Organisation (WHO)2.

Fruits and vegetables are rich sources of vitamins, minerals and secondary plant compounds, also known as phytonutrients.


Because you deserve great nutrition, we control the entire process from seed to supplement so as to ensure a high-quality product:

  • It starts with specially selected seeds planted in the right soil and at the right depth on sustainable farms. Sustainable farming is believed to generate strong, vigorous plants with a high nutritional value.
  • All plant ingredients are sourced from sustainable NutriliteTM or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides.
  • We harvest the plants at their peak, using the parts with the best phytonutrient profile. These are processed within hours of the harvest, using state-of-the-art equipment.
  • Our scientists are constantly researching new ways to improve naturally derived ingredients by combining essential vitamins and minerals with plant-based phytonutrients.
  • Extensive tests are performed to ensure that DOUBLE X is safe. Before it reaches you, we execute 2,000 tests per production unit, starting with the plant material.

In times of stress or when dealing with seasonal change, you may need help in regaining your inner balance so as to allow your body and mind to function properly.

2 Source: “Global assessment of select phytonutrient intakes by the level of fruit and vegetable consumption”; Mary M. Murphy, Leila M. Barraj and Judith H. Spungen; British Journal of Nutrition (2014), 112, 1004-1018.
details:
Key Features

Provides a balanced combination of 12 essential vitamins, 10 essential minerals and 22 plants delivering a broad and beneficial spectrum of phytonutrients.

Nutrilite DOUBLE X is enriched with PhytoBlend™ – an exclusive complex derived from fruits, vegetables and herbs that are not always easy to include in your everyday diet. It provides botanicals and secondary plant compounds known as phytonutrients from all 5 colour groups: green, white, yellow, red and purple. Each colour group delivers valuable nutrients.

All plant ingredients are sourced from sustainable Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides. Sustainable farming is believed to generate strong, vigorous plants with a high nutritional value.

No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives are added.

Adults should take one vitamin, one mineral and one phytonutrient tablet twice a day with a meal

Keep out of reach of young children.

name: Balance Within™
description: An easy-to-use dietary food supplement that can provide invisible support for your immune system with vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid)**.  **Vitamin B6 and folic acid (vitamin B9) contribute to the normal function of the immune system.
overview:
Dietary food supplement that contains two B-vitamins and two strains of lactic acid producing bacteria.
 

What It Does For You

Nutrilite Balance Within offers extra support to your immune system with vitamin B6 and B9 (folic acid)** to help keep you feeling good.

  • Supports your immunity. Vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid) support the normal function of the immune system.
  • Supports a positive mood. Vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid), often known as ‘mood vitamins’, contribute to normal psychological function.
  • Provides 6 billion units of scientifically well-documented lactic acid producing bacteria.
  • Integrates easily into your schedule because the fast-melting, pleasant-tasting powder can be put directly on the tongue and so can be taken anywhere, anytime.
  • Supports a healthy lifestyle by offering extra support to the immune system with vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid)** and complementing efforts to eat, sleep and exercise well.
  • Helps you to be proactive about your diet and focus on enjoying and looking after good health.

**Vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid) contribute to the normal function of the immune system

Why You Would Like It

Nutrilite Balance Within is a dietary food supplement that contains 2 B-vitamins that contribute to the normal functioning of your immune system and to a positive mood*. Each stick pack also contains 6 billion units of 2 scientifically well-documented strains of lactic acid producing bacteria. Coming in the form of a fast-melting, pleasant-tasting (thanks to a hint of vanilla) powder that can be placed directly onto the tongue and packed in single-portion stick packs, Nutrilite Balance Within is convenient and easy to integrate into any diet and any lifestyle. It’s a great way to support your healthy lifestyle.

*Vitamin B6 and folic acid (vitamin B9) contribute to the normal function of the immune system and normal psychological function.
 

Facts For You

  • 70% of the immune system is located in the gut (approximately 70% of immunologically active cells are in the intestinal lining). 
  • Nutrilite is the world’s No.1 selling vitamins and dietary supplements brand* and has 80+ years’ experience combining nature and science to help people live healthier.
  • The product is not suitable for vegans/vegetarians.

* Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
details:
Key Features

The B-vitamins B6 and B9 (folic acid) support the normal function of the immune system. They also contribute to normal psychological function (and so are often referred to as ‘mood vitamins’). Vitamin B6 contributes to the normal functioning of the nervous system. 

There are 6 billion lactic-acid-producing bacteria in every portion of Balance Within. There are 2 strains of lactic acid producing bacteria – Lactobacillus acidophilus (NCFM) and Bifidobacterium lactis (HN019) – both of which are scientifically well-documented. 

Bacteria arrive alive. The strains have a very good acid tolerance so you can be confident that the vast majority of the 6 billion lactic acid producing bacteria in each portion arrive alive in the gut. 

Convenient delivery method in the form of a fast-melting, pleasant-tasting powder in single-portion stick packs that can be taken on their own or with food or beverages, and can be used anytime and anywhere, with no need to refrigerate. 
 

How To Use

Nutrilite Balance Within can be integrated into any lifestyle.
Enjoy this pleasant-tasting, fast-melting powder quickly and conveniently. Anytime, anywhere. 

  • Open the stick pack and gently pour the powder onto your tongue and allow it to dissolve. 
  • Or mix with a cool or room-temperature beverage (e.g. juice or water).
  • Or enjoy it with a smoothie, shake, breakfast cereal or muesli. 
  • Take with you anywhere and use anytime.
  • No refrigeration is required.

name: All Plant Protein
description: Food preparation which provides an all-natural protein.
overview:
Nutrilite™ All Plant Protein provides high-quality plant-based protein to ensure optimal daily intake to keep you moving*.  


Why you’ll love it…

Proteins are known as the building blocks of life because they can be found in every single cell in the body where they help to repair damage and build new cells. Like a bicycle frame, they are the support structure for your body and they provide a framework for your bones and muscles. However, we are unable to store excess protein, so a consistent intake is essential. You may assume your diet has you covered but with the main dietary sources of protein being milk, eggs, cheese and red meat if you are vegetarian, or on any kind of special diet, you may not be hitting your requirement.

Nutrilite™ All Plant Protein is a balanced and healthy alternative to the more traditional forms of protein, and it contains all nine of the essential amino acids that contribute to good health. Quick, easy and very convenient, Nutrilite™ All Plant Protein can be mixed into food and drinks without impacting flavour. Try mixing a tablespoon of this protein into your daily post-workout smoothie.
 


Good to know…

  • Does not contain animal-sourced ingredients and is suitable for vegetarians.
  • Contains less than 0.5g of fat per serving.
  • Easy to digest.
  • You will find no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives in this convenient protein powder.
  • While some foods are rich sources of protein, they may also be high in cholesterol, saturated fat, salt and calories. Nutrilite™ All Plant Protein is a healthy alternative derived from soy, wheat and pea.
  • One tablespoon provides an 8g serving of protein. Each person requires at least 0.83g of protein per kg body weight per day. This means someone weighing 60kg requires approximately 50g of protein per day.  *
  • Easily added to warm or cold food and drinks without impacting flavour. Why not try adding it to a Pure Power Smoothie, Almond Energiser or cleansing carrot and orange smoothie?
  • Provides a balance of all nine essential amino acids. ‘Essential’ means the body cannot synthesise them itself and these include histidine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine, methionine, phenylalanine, threonine, tryptophan, and valine.

     


* Protein contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and muscle mass. https://www.efsa.europa.eu/en/press/news/120209.

Features

  • All Plant Protein provides an all-natural and almost fat-free protein.
  • All Plant Protein Powder provides high-quality protein, supplying balanced amounts of the nine essential amino acids.
  • One serving of All Plant Protein provides 8 g of protein per 10 g serving and is a healthy alternative to traditional sources of protein such as red meats, cheeses, eggs and whole milk.
  • Ingredients are derived from natural protein sources: soy, wheat and pea protein.
  • Can be added to food and drinks without affecting the flavour.
  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives added.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • Does not contain animal-sourced ingredients and is suitable for vegetarians.
details:
Check out the Amway Tracing tool

Suggested Usage

  • Those who do not consume adequate amounts of milk, meat, cheese or other high protein foods.
  • Those who exercise a lot.
  • Those concerned about calories and fat in their diets.
  • Those who skip meals, eat small portions or feel that they need extra protein in their diet.
  • Children (over 3 years), adolescents, the elderly, and pregnant or breast-feeding women who require additional protein.

Recommended dosage

According to need, add 1 scoop (about 10 g) of powder to milk or other drinks once or several times per day. Stir rapidly, or shake in a tightly-closed container, for 1 minute. Alternatively, sprinkle on cereals, soups, salads or other food.

Advisory

Not recommended for children under 3 years of age without seeking medical advice before use. Keep the container tightly closed. Store in a cool dry place. Product contents may settle during shipment. Net weight guaranteed.

Facts For You

name: Tray DOUBLE X™
description: Nutrilite DOUBLE X is a powerful multivitamin, multimineral and phytonutrient food 				supplement enriched with PhytoBlend™, a special blend of 22 plants and phytonutrients from 5 colour groups that provides 				scientifically proven support for your body.
overview:
Nutrilite DOUBLE X is a food supplement that provides a balanced combination of 12 essential vitamins and 10 essential minerals. It is enriched with PhytoBlend™, a special blend of 22 plants derived from fruits, vegetables and herbs that are not always easy to include in your everyday diet.

Nutrilite DOUBLE X adds variety to your diet by providing botanical elements from all 5 colour groups: green, white, yellow, red and purple. Each colour group delivers valuable nutrients. All plant ingredients are sourced from sustainable Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides. Sustainable farming is believed to generate strong, vigorous plants with a high nutritional value.

At times of stress or of seasonal change, Nutrilite DOUBLE X provides foundational nutrients to support overall well-being.

DOUBLE X is the world's #1 selling multivitamin multimineral with phytonutrients from five phytonutrient colour groups.1

1 Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/

 

What it does for you

Nutrilite DOUBLE X is designed to help you close any potential nutritional and phytonutrient gaps. This allows you to regain your inner balance and thereby enhance your natural potential.

It delivers premium support to your body in many forms:

  • Brain function: Iodine supports normal cognitive functioning. Vitamin B12 contributes to normal psychological functioning.
  • Nervous system: Copper supports the normal functioning of the nervous system.
  • Immune system: Vitamin C contributes to the normal functioning of the immune system. 
  • Energy-yielding metabolism: Niacin supports a normal energy-yielding metabolism. 
  • Management of inflammatory responses: Curcumin helps your body manage inflammatory responses.
  • Digestion and liver: Calcium supports the normal functioning of digestive enzymes. Rosemary and curcumin help support normal liver functioning.
  • Cells: Calcium has a role in the process of cell division and specialisation.
  • Oxidative stress: Vitamin E contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress.
  • Heart function: Vitamin B6 supports normal homocysteine metabolism and thiamine contributes to the normal functioning of the heart.
  • Bone function: Vitamin D is needed for the maintenance of normal bones.
  • Muscle function: Magnesium contributes to normal muscle functioning.
  • Eye function/vision: Vitamin A supports the maintenance of normal vision.
  • Skin, hair and nails: Biotin contributes to the maintenance of normal skin and hair. Vitamin C supports normal collagen formation, helping the skin function normally. Selenium and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal nails.
  • Balanced hormones: Vitamin B6 supports the regulation of hormonal activity and pantothenic acid contributes to the normal synthesis and metabolism of steroid hormones, vitamin D and some neurotransmitters.

In addition, a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle are of general importance.

Why you would like it

The human body is an ecosystem that is constantly attempting to maintain inner balance in order to function optimally.

For this, proper nutrition is vital. A balanced and varied diet is essential, both for your present-day mental and physical well-being and for your overall health for years to come.

In fact, 3 out of 4 adults worldwide do not consume the daily minimum of 5 helpings of fruits and vegetables recommended by the World Health Organisation (WHO)1.   This is why you may need help getting the full complement of nutrients and secondary plant compounds known as phytonutrients.

Nutrilite DOUBLE X contains plants and phytonutrients from all five colour groups: green, white, yellow, red, and purple.

Nutrilite DOUBLE X can help you close potential vitamin, mineral and phytonutrient gaps, making sure your body regains its inner balance and allowing you to enhance your natural potential.

1 Source: “Global assessment of select phytonutrient intakes by the level of fruit and vegetable consumption”; Mary M. Murphy, Leila M. Barraj and Judith H. Spungen; British Journal of Nutrition (2014), 112, 1004-1018.

Facts for you

The vast majority of adults (58-88%) worldwide report that they consume less than the minimum of 5 helpings of fruits and vegetables per day recommended by the World Health Organisation (WHO)2.

Fruits and vegetables are rich sources of vitamins, minerals and secondary plant compounds, also known as phytonutrients.


Because you deserve great nutrition, we control the entire process from seed to supplement so as to ensure a high-quality product:

  • It starts with specially selected seeds planted in the right soil and at the right depth on sustainable farms. Sustainable farming is believed to generate strong, vigorous plants with a high nutritional value.
  • All plant ingredients are sourced from sustainable NutriliteTM or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides.
  • We harvest the plants at their peak, using the parts with the best phytonutrient profile. These are processed within hours of the harvest, using state-of-the-art equipment.
  • Our scientists are constantly researching new ways to improve naturally derived ingredients by combining essential vitamins and minerals with plant-based phytonutrients.
  • Extensive tests are performed to ensure that DOUBLE X is safe. Before it reaches you, we execute 2,000 tests per production unit, starting with the plant material.

In times of stress or when dealing with seasonal change, you may need help in regaining your inner balance so as to allow your body and mind to function properly.

2 Source: “Global assessment of select phytonutrient intakes by the level of fruit and vegetable consumption”; Mary M. Murphy, Leila M. Barraj and Judith H. Spungen; British Journal of Nutrition (2014), 112, 1004-1018.
details:
Check out the Amway Tracing tool

Key Features

Provides a balanced combination of 12 essential vitamins, 10 essential minerals and 22 plants delivering a broad and beneficial spectrum of phytonutrients.

Nutrilite DOUBLE X is enriched with PhytoBlend™ – an exclusive complex derived from fruits, vegetables and herbs that are not always easy to include in your everyday diet. It provides botanicals and secondary plant compounds known as phytonutrients from all 5 colour groups: green, white, yellow, red and purple. Each colour group delivers valuable nutrients.

All plant ingredients are sourced from sustainable Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides. Sustainable farming is believed to generate strong, vigorous plants with a high nutritional value.

No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives are added.

How To Use

RECOMMENDED DOSAGE:
Adults should take one vitamin, one mineral and one phytonutrient tablet twice a day with a meal

Keep out of reach of young children.
Food supplements are no substitute for a balanced and varied diet and a healthy lifestyle.
Please do not exceed the recommended daily dosage.  Do not accept this package if seals are broken or foil packs are open. For freshness, keep tablets in foil packs. Store in a cool, dry place.

Ingredients

VITAMIN TABLET: calcium carbonate, stabilisers (microcrystalline cellulose, cross-linked sodium carboxymethylcellulose, acacia gum, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, agar, calcium salts of fatty acids), magnesium oxide, L-ascorbic acid, anti-caking agents (silicon dioxide, magnesium salts of fatty acids), maltodextrin, nicotinamide, D-alpha-tocopheryl acid succinate, calcium D-pantothenate, sucrose, emulsifier (sodium alginate), pea starch, modified corn starch, corn starch, zinc oxide, palm oil, pyridoxine hydrochloride, riboflavin, thiamine mononitrate, beta-carotene, lutein esters, antioxidants (ascorbyl palmitate, sodium ascorbate, alpha-tocopherol, tocopherol-rich extract), soy protein isolate, humectant (glycerol), lycopene (from tomato, Lycopersicon esculantum), retinyl acetate, glucose syrup, pteroylmonoglutamic acid, glazing agent (carnauba wax), D-biotin, sodium selenite, cyanocobalamin.

MINERAL TABLET: calcium carbonate, stabilisers (microcrystalline cellulose, cross-linked sodium carboxymethylcellulose, acacia gum, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, pectin), magnesium oxide, ferrous fumarate, maltodextrin, anti-caking agents (silicon dioxide, magnesium salts of fatty acids), peppermint extract 0,9% (Mentha x piperita), zinc oxide, parsley concentrate 0.6% (Petroselinum crispum), spinach concentrate 0.6% (Spinacia oleracea), copper gluconate, watercress concentrate 0.3% (Nasturtium officinale), manganese sulphate, corn starch, alfalfa concentrate 0.2% (Medicago sativa), humectant (glycerol), chromium chloride, sodium molybdate, glazing agent (carnauba wax), sodium selenite.

PHYTONUTRIENT TABLET: stabilisers (microcrystalline cellulose, cross-linked sodium carboxymethylcellulose, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, acacia gum, calcium sulphate, calcium salts of fatty acids), calcium carbonate, rosemary extract 12% (Rosmarinus officinalis), quercetin, magnesium oxide, acerola concentrate 6% (Malpighia glabra), maltodextrin, L-ascorbic acid, turmeric extract 3% (Curcuma longa), kelp powder 2% (Ascophyllum nodosum, Laminaria digitata), anti-caking agents (silicon dioxide, magnesium salts of fatty acids), grape extract 1% (Vitis vinifera), orange concentrate 1% (Citrus sinensis), amla concentrate 0.6% (Phyllanthus emblica), blackcurrant extract 0.4% (Ribes nigrum), grapefruit concentrate 0,3% (Citrus paradisi), onion extract 0.3% (Allium cepa), blueberry concentrate 0.2% (Vaccinium corymbosum), elderberry extract 0.2% (Sambucus nigra), sucrose, humectant (glycerol), lemon concentrate 0.1% (Citrus limon), mandarin concentrate 0.1% (Citrus reticulata), pea starch, corn starch, medium chain triglycerides, glazing agent (carnauba wax), potassium iodide, cholecalciferol, antioxidant (alpha-tocopherol).

  4. Gives your eyes several nutrients of relevance for vision: vitamin A, riboflavin (B2), zinc and DHA.3
  5. Provides essential fatty acids (EPA/DHA) to help support your heart4, brain5 and vision6
  6. Three high-quality products in one tailored bundle

Additionally, a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle are of general importance.

Why You Would Like It

Imagine your body works like a bike:

  • Vitamins and minerals can be compared to the wheels, which support the bike as they allow body and mind to work smoothly.
  • Nutrilite Daily is a daily multivitamin-multimineral food supplement containing 20 essential vitamins and minerals and botanical extracts to support multiple nutritional objectives by helping to fill potential gaps the daily diet.
  • Our bodies can't naturally produce essential Omega-3 fatty acids, and it may be challenging to obtain sufficient omega-3s from diet alone—less than 20% of the research population consumes enough healthy fats daily1. That's why supplementation is often recommended to ensure adequate Omega-3 intake2. What’s more, absorption of Omega-3 fatty acids may be variable from person to person and even for a given person from day to day, based on their lifestyle, food, stress, illness etc. For consumers seeking maximum benefits from omega-3 fatty acids, Nutrilite Omega-3 Triple Strength is formulated with breakthrough AquaCelle®3 technology, ensuring better absorption of DHA and EPA - allowing better availability to support your optimal health.
  • The each easy-to-swallow softgel contains highly concentrated, sustainably sourced fish oil and chia seed oil from NutriCert partner farms.
  • Just as the frame is the basic construction of a bicycle, proteins are the body’s building blocks – they are frames for muscle and bone. Nutrilite™ All Plant Protein provides high-quality plant-based protein to ensure optimal daily intake to keep you moving4.

Facts For You

  • 1 easy-to-swallow tablet of Nutrilite Daily is packed with vitamins, minerals and botanicals
  • All Plant Protein Powder provides high-quality protein, supplying balanced amounts of the nine essential amino acids.
  • Convenient one softgel of Nutrilite Omega -3 Triple Strength per day provides a concentrated dose6 of omega-3 fatty acids
  • Our Foundational Trio provides a wide range of nutrients which work together to help keep you going!1,2,3,4,5

1Vitamin C, vitamin D, zinc, iron and selenium support the normal function of the immune system.
2Thiamine (B1), biotin (B7), riboflavin (B2), niacin (B3), pantothenic acid (B5), vitamin B6, vitamin B12, iron and magnesium contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism.
3Protein contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and muscle mass.
4EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of EPA and DHA.
5Vitamin A, riboflavin (B2), zinc and DHA contribute to the maintenance of normal vision.
6DHA contributes to maintenance of normal brain function.

Additionally, a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle are of general importance

name: Morning Nutrition
description: Embrace each morning with essential nutrients to support your wellbeing!
overview:
Nutrilite™ Morning Nutrition provides essential nutrients that support your body and mind with a range of supportive resources to help you create a morning routine for holistic wellbeing.

Start the day the day right with great supplementation and delicious recipes!

 

What It Does For You

  • Regulates mood ¹
  • Stimulates the metabolism ²
  • Improves cognitive function ³
  • Protein supports muscles and bones ⁴
  • Offers a convenient way to increase your fibre intake
  • Supplies a diverse selection of delicious, balanced recipes tailored to any culinary preference, seamlessly integrating APP and fibre to support nutrition and metabolic wellbeing
  • Provides resources for workouts, yoga and mindfulness practices.

¹Vitamin B12 and magnesium contribute to normal psychological function and normal functioning of the nervous system
²Biotin and zinc contribute to normal macronutrient metabolism
³Iron, zinc and iodine contribute to normal cognitive function
⁴protein contributes to the maintenance and growth of muscle mass and the maintenance of normal bones

Why You Would Like It

In the hustle and bustle of a hectic week, preparing a healthy meal can feel challenging. However, developing the habit of enjoying a nutritious breakfast and following a morning routine can help.

Morning nutrition goes beyond just your first meal; it nurtures both your body¹ and mind². Nutrilite™ Morning Nutrition provides nutrients designed to support your overall health every day.

Seeking inspiration to personalise your morning routine? Here you'll find recipes (sweet and savoury), workouts, yoga flows and mindfulness practices.

Choose what suits you and start your day on a positive note!

¹Protein contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and the maintenance and growth of muscle mass
²Iron, zinc and iodine contribute to normal cognitive function

Facts For You

  • Nutrilite™ is the world’s No.1 selling vitamins and dietary supplements brand1
  • Nutrilite™ is the world’s No.1 selling protein supplement brand1
  • Nutrilite™ has been combining the power of science with the power of nature for 90 years to help people live healthier lives.
  • Nutrilite™ Double X™ contains plant ingredients, which are sourced from sustainable Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ farms that do not use toxic chemicals or pesticides.
  • Vegetarian friendly
  • Ideal for any dietary preferences
  • Affordable Bundle  
  • Offers a great variety of sweet and savoury breakfast options

1SOURCE: GlobalData, http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
details:
Key Features

  • Provides high protein intake for your morning meal which is associated with increased muscle protein synthesis and low frailty prevalence. ¹ ⁻ ²
  • Helps consume one to two daily meals with 30 g to 45 g of high-quality protein per meal, which may be an important strategy for increasing and/or maintaining lean body mass and muscle strength with ageing. ³
  • Supports frequency of morning meal consumption that is associated with higher daily protein intake and greater grip strength in adults. ⁴
  • Provides nutritious recipes and a variety of activities to suit every lifestyle.

¹Albertson AM, Thompson D, Franko DL, et al. Consumption of breakfast cereal is associated with positive health outcomes: Evidence from the National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute Growth and Health Study. Nutr Res. 2008; 28: 744–752. [123]
²Albertson AM, Wold AC, Joshi N. Ready-to-eat cereal consumption patterns: the relationship to nutrient intake, whole grain intake, and body mass index in an older American population. J Aging Res. 2012; [125]
³Song WO, Chun OK, Obayashi S, et al. Is consumption of breakfast associated with body mass index in US adults? J Am Diet Assoc. 2005; 105: 1373–1382. [Astbury 7; St Onge 33]
⁴Cho S, Dietrich M, Brown CJ, et al. The effect of breakfast type on total daily energy intake and body mass index: results from the Third National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES III). J Am Coll Nutr. 2003; 22: 296–302. [Astbury 11]

How To Use

DOUBLE X™ Nutrilite™ RECOMMENDED DOSAGE:

Adults should take one vitamin, one mineral and one phytonutrient tablet twice a day with a meal

Keep out of reach of young children.
Food supplements are no substitute for a balanced and varied diet and a healthy lifestyle.
Please do not exceed the recommended daily dosage.  Do not accept this package if the seals are broken or the foil packs are open. For freshness, keep the tablets in the foil packs. Store in a cool, dry place.

All Plant Protein Nutrilite™:

  • Those who do not consume adequate amounts of milk, meat, cheese or other high protein foods.
  • Those who exercise a lot.
  • Those concerned about calories and fat in their diets.
  • Those who skip meals, eat small portions or feel that they need extra protein in their diet.
  • Children (over 3 years), adolescents, the elderly and others who require additional protein.

Recommended dosage

According to need, add 1 scoop (about 10 g) of powder to milk or other drinks once or several times per day. Stir rapidly, or shake in a tightly closed container, for 1 minute. Alternatively, sprinkle on cereals, soups, salads or other food.
Advisory
Not recommended for children under 3 years of age without seeking medical advice before use. Keep the container tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place. Product contents may settle during shipment. Net weight guaranteed.

Fibre Powder Nutrilite™:

  • Those who do not consume sufficient amounts of complex carbohydrates in their diet.
  • Those who do not eat sufficient amounts of whole grains, fresh fruits and vegetables.

Recommended dosage

Always dissolve contents of 1 stick pack in 250 ml to 375 ml of water or juice, or sprinkle on food and drink a full glass (250 ml) of liquid with each serving. For adults and children of 12 years of age or older, 1 to 2 stick packs per day, gradually increasing their fibre intake. Best if consumed with a meal.

Advisory

Keep out of reach of young children.

Recipes and Activity Resources:

To be added in your morning routine based on your preferences and needs.

Ingredients

See the list of ingredients on single product pages:

All Plant Protein Nutrilite™

DOUBLE X™ Nutrilite™

Fibre Powder Nutrilite™

name: Fibre Powder
description: Food supplement in form of powder, which contains a blend of three soluble fibres.
overview:
NUTRILITE Fibre Powder is a special blend of three soluble fibres from naturally derived plant sources, offering a convenient way to get additional fibre. This taste-free, easy-to-mix dry powder can be sprinkled onto foods or mixed into liquids.

The recommended daily intake of fibre for an adult is 25–30 g. This product contains 5 g soluble fibre and can be taken in conjunction with other NUTRILITE fibre products, to provide you with different sources of fibre.

Suitable for vegetarians.

This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.

Features

  • Contains soluble dietary fibre from 3 plant sources.
  • Quick and convenient way to contribute to daily fibre intake.
  • Formulated to be gentle on the stomach.
  • Non-gritty and odourless powder blends easily with any non-carbonated beverage or can be sprinkled on food without adding significant taste.
  • Suitable for use in cooking.
  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives added.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.

name: Appetite Controller
description: Food supplement with glucomannan that helps you take control of your weight management and fight the urge to overeat.
size: Each pack contains 30 x 2.5 g sachets
overview:
Food supplement with glucomannan that helps you take control of your weight management and fight the urge to overeat.

What It Does For You

Helps you limit portion size, and still feel satiated.  When mixed with liquid it takes up space in your stomach creating the sensation of fullness.

Starts taming your appetite immediately – your first serving will help you feel fuller before and during your next meal.

Makes weight management easier - each serving comes in its own sachet and can be mixed easily with juice or water in just seconds.

It is tasteless, so can be mixed with water or favourite juice without effecting the flavour. 

It perfectly complements other Nutrilite weight management products.

Why You Would Like It

Appetite Controller is a food supplement that helps you control your appetite and fight overeating. When you’re in control of your appetite, weight management becomes easier. With Appetite Controller, you can still enjoy your food but you’re more empowered to control portion size.

The secret of Appetite Controller lies in a unique natural ingredient: glucomannan extract. This natural dietary fibre attracts water and turns to gel in the stomach. This gel presses against the stomachs walls thus helps you to feel fuller. Additionally, it contains naturally derived Black elderberry extract that gives the product a pleasant purple colour.

Facts For You

  • Proven to help people feel satisfied without overeating.
  • Made with ingredients from NutriCert™ certified sustainable farms.
  • Containing NutriCert™ Konjac Root (glucomannan) and NutriCert Black Elderberry
  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives added
  • Nutrilite has been the world's No. 1 selling vitamin and dietary supplements brand for the past 10 years.*
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
  • This product does not contain animal sourced ingredients.
  • Product does not contain ingredients of animal origin.

* Source GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
details:
Key Features

  • Appetite Controller is proven to be an effective weight management product that helps you to control your portion size.
  • Appetite Controller perfectly complements other NUTRILITE weight management products.
  • Appetite Controller uses natural ingredients: NutriCert™ Konjac Root (glucomannan) and NutriCert Black Elderberry with no added artificial sweeteners, colours, flavours or preservatives
  • Appetite Controller is packaged in convenient single-serve sachets that make preparation and consumption easy.

How To Use

  • Tear open the stick-shaped sachet packaging and sprinkle into a glass with 250 ml water or juice.
  • Consume immediately after preparation.
  • Consume 3 servings per day, 30 minutes before each main meal.
  • To be consumed only with liquids not with food. Sufficient intake with liquids is mandatory.
  • There is a risk of choking for people with swallowing difficulties or when ingesting with inadequate fluid intake.

For optimal results and to avoid risk of choking or swallowing discomfort, use only as directed on packaging.

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS: Konjac Root (52.3%; 1.0 g Glucomannan per portion), Dextrin, Black Elderberry Extract (1.2% / 30 mg elderberry per portion; composition: Elderberry, Maltodextrin), Anti-caking Agent (Silicon Dioxide).
