name: Electric High-Speed Blender
description: Easy-to-use, feature-rich powerful blender that turns even the toughest ingredients into fine smoothies.
overview:
Powerful Nutrilite Electric High-Speed Blender makes it easy to enjoy nutritious smoothies, shakes, dips and more, quickly and conveniently.

 

What It Does For You

  • Adds a stylish, powerful tool to your kitchen with its stainless-steel housing and an energy-efficient motor* that reaches up to 28,000 rpm.
  • Features a 1.8-litre glass jar with embossed scale that won’t leak chemicals or microplastics into your food.
  • Provides 3 pre-set programs (ice crush, smoothie, interval), pulse and stepless speed control to meet all your blending needs.
  • Enables you to blend multiple ingredients – including Nutrilite All Plant Protein or Fibre Powder – into delicious smoothies or healthy foods like hummus
  • Supports an active, on-the-go lifestyle with a Tritan Blend & Go Cup that is robust, light and easy to clean and carry.

*The blender and its motor provide off and standby modes which do not exceed the applicable power consumption requirements of the “Ecodesign” Directive 209/125/EC.

Why You Would Like It

The Nutrilite Electric High-Speed Blender is a stylish and powerful kitchen tool that supports your healthy-nutrition ambitions.

It’s equipped with a powerful 1200 W engine that provides blending at speeds of up to 28,000 rpm and three pre-set programmess (ice crushing, smoothie preparation, or interval) as well as pulse and stepless speed control settings.

And with the inclusion of a light-and-mobile Blend & Go Cup that comes with its own blending base featuring a sharp stainless-steel knife with 4 blades and a drinking lid, it’s a great way to support an active, on-the-go lifestyle.

The Nutrilite Electric High-Speed Blender is sold exclusively by Nutrilite.

Facts For You

  • 3 pre-set programmess (ice crush, smoothie, interval) as well as pulse and stepless speed control.
  • All components are dishwasher safe, except for the stainless-steel knife set and base.
  • Delivers up to 28,000 rpm using its 1200 W engine.
details:
Key Features

High-quality materials and components: Food-grade stainless-steel blades provide great blending results, while the durable glass jar prevents leakage of chemicals and microplastics into food. Slip-resistant feet and self-clean functions make it safe and easy to use.

Powerful engine, 8-blade knife set and rich range of features (including ice crush, smoothie and interval) mean that the blender is able to tackle a variety of ingredients and recipes, including smoothies, shakes, dips, sauces, soups and purees.

Blend & Go Cup made from BPA-free Tritan is light, robust and portable and comes with its own blending base and 4-blade knife set, making it easy to integrate nutritious and delicious blended smoothies into an active, on-the-go lifestyle.

How To Use

  • Read the manual thoroughly before first use and follow the instructions during use.
  • Removing the knife set with the tool from the jar requires some force. Given the power of the Nutrilite Electric High-Speed Blender, it is important that the knife set is fitted tightly to the glass jar to avoid any potential leakages. Please ensure the knife set fits tightly after cleaning / before operation.
  • The glass jar fits into the blender base easily and requires no twisting or turning – it’s ergonomically designed to be easy to use for left- and right-handed people.
  • Blend & Go Cup fits easily into the blender base, with no twisting or turning required. Press it down gently during blending.
  • All components apart from the knife sets and base can be washed in the dishwasher.

Technical Information

Weight:

  • Nutrilite Electric High-Speed Blender base + glass jar:  approx. 3.9 kg
  • Blend & Go Cup: approx. 0.3 kg
  • Knife opening tool: 40 g

Dimensions:

  • Nutrilite Electric High-Speed Blender with Glass Jar: 20 (L) x 17.5 (W) x 43.4 (H) cm
  • Blend & Go Cup: 24.5 (H) x 7 (W) cm

Blender and Blend & Go Cup knife sets are made of stainless steel (Food Grade SUS420)

Noise level:
At maximum speed, the noise level is less than 90 dB. When standing 1 metre from the product, the background noise level is less than 65 dB.

Capacity:
Blending jar: 1.8 litre
Blend & Go Cup 0.6 litre

The length of the power cord is approximately 1 metre.

description: The perfect replacement for 1-2 daily meals to support your weight-loss and healthy lifestyle goals.
overview:
Bodykey by NUTRILITE Meal Replacement Bars are a delicious, healthy way to get to your optimal you and your optimal weight.

What It Does For You

  • Contribute to weight loss and maintenance, but also great for healthy lifestyle seekers.
  • Provide a nutritionally balanced replacement for regular meals, thanks to vitamins, minerals, fibre and protein.
  • Convenient to enjoy ‘on the go’ and wherever you happen to be at meal time, thanks to handy, snack-size portions.
  • Treat your taste buds with delicious Dark Chocolate flavour and enjoy every bite of your weight-loss and healthy lifestyle journey.

Why You Would Like It

New Bodykey by NUTRILITE Meal Replacement Bars are an easy and effective way for you to replace 1-2 meals daily and achieve your weight-management and healthy lifestyle goals. Available in delicious Dark Chocolate and Tropical Fruits flavours, Bodykey Meal Replacement Bars are nutritionally balanced and come in handy 'snack bar’ portion sizes. This means you can enjoy every bite of your weight-management journey wherever your day takes you. Suitable for all Bodykey by Nutrilite diet types and packed with natural ingredients, vitamins and minerals. Meal Replacement Bars are the optimal way to achieve your optimal you.

Facts For You

  • Substituting 2 daily meals with Bodykey by NUTRILITE Meal Replacement Bars contributes to weight loss.
  • Substituting 1 daily meal with a bar contributes to the maintenance of weight after weight loss.
details:
Key Features

  • Conveniently packaged as single-portion bars.
  • Contain natural ingredients and are free from artificial colours, preservatives, flavours and GMO ingredients.
  • Enriched with 13 vitamins and 11 minerals (Nutritional Value) and high in fibre.

How To Use

  • Take Bodykey by NUTRILITE Meal Replacement Bars with you as part of your daily routine.

name: Shaker
description: Bodykey by Nutrilite™ Shaker
overview:
A convenient and practical shaker consisting of four compartments:

The main compartment for cold liquids, allows you to create drinks and shakes. Thanks to the advanced spiral design, you can create perfectly blended smoothies.

The second compartment is specially designed for keeping vitamin and mineral supplements in either tablet or capsule form. This compartment is divided into three parts and allows for the convenient storage of three different types of supplements. The third and fourth compartments are designed for powdered products such as shakes and powdered supplements.
details:

Before first time used and after each use, wash by hand and dry thoroughly.

Not dishwasher safe.

*Made from polyethylene and polypropylene. Does not contain BPA’s

name: Best Age Bundle
description: Stay fit and enjoy every day to the max, with the all-new Best Age Kit from the Nutrilite brand!
size: Size: 1x Coenzyme Q10 , 1x All Plant Protein, 1x Omega-3 Triple Strength
overview:
Support your everyday diet with high-quality plant-based proteins and omega-3 fatty acids, while fuelling your body with nutrients to perform at its best! The Nutrilite Best Age Bundle with a 5% discount provides a great selection of products which support the needs of mature bodies.

 

What It Does For You

  • Help you get the most out of life at any age 
  • Combines high-quality proteins with heart-healthy fats and CoQ10
  • Omega-3 fatty acids to support heart1, brain2 and vision3.
  • Three premium products 
  • Simple and convenient daily supplementation
  • Provides the nutritional coverage you may need 

1EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of EPA and DHA.
2DHA contributes to maintenance of normal brain function. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of DHA.
3DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal vision. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of DHA.

Why You Would Like It

For those who know that age is nothing but a number, the Nutrilite brand created the Nutrilite Best Age Bundle! Packed with three of the brand’s high-quality supplements, the bundle is all about living every single day to the max! 

Nutrilite All Plant Protein provides a generous dose of high-quality protein and nine essential amino acids, while Omega 3 Strength delivers DHA and EPA fatty acids which support the normal function of the heart1, brain2 and vision3. Meanwhile, Coenzyme Q10 optimises the conversion of food into energy, supporting the body for whatever the day brings!

Three premium supplements from the Nutrilite brand, perfectly paired for one combined benefit - a daily dose of wellbeing and vitality! 

1EPA and DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of EPA and DHA.
2DHA contributes to maintenance of normal brain function. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of DHA.
3DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal vision. The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 250 mg of DHA.

Facts For You

  • All Plant Protein - Provides high-quality protein, supplying balanced amounts of the nine essential amino acids.
  • Omega 3 Triple Strength – Formulated with AquaCelle®4 technology for better absorption, provides 500 mg of EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids.
  • Coenzyme Q10 - This enzyme is a chemical compound that helps to convert food into the vital energy the body needs.

4AquaCelle® is a registered trademark of Pharmako Biotechnologies Pty Ltd
details:
Key Features

  • All Plant Protein provides all-natural and almost fat-free protein, while supplying balanced amounts of the nine essential amino acids.
  • Omeag-3 Triple Strength provides 500 mg of EPA and DHA omega-3 fatty acids to support the normal functions of the heart1, brain2 and vision3.
  • Nutrilite Coenzyme Q10 is a supplementary source of the coenzyme Q10, a fat-soluble, vitamin-like substance present in almost every cell of the body, which decreases as we age.

name: Body Cleansing Program Bundle
description: An essential component of the Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program1, this pre- packed bundle contains specially selected products1 from Nutrilite, the world’s No. 1 selling vitamin and dietary supplements brand2.
overview:
An essential component of the Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program1, this pre-packed bundle contains specially selected products1 from Nutrilite, the world’s No. 1 selling vitamin and dietary supplements brand2.

1 With Nutrilite Milk Thistle supplement as milk thistle helps the body cleanse itself. Nutrilite Body Cleansing program is a 21- day holistic healthy lifestyle program that provides nutrition guidance, physical activity recommendations, hydration advice, and tools for a positive mindset.
2 Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/

 

What It Does For You

The Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program Bundle contains:

  • Nutrilite Milk Thistle1,
  • Nutrilite Balance Within
  • Nutrilite Fibre Powder
  • Nutrilite All Plant Protein
  • Welcome Flyer with program details.

This bundle is an essential part of the Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program2, which is based on key pillars of well-being – Nutrition, Hydration, Physical Activity, Positive Mind Set and Community Involvement and provides detailed guidance, as well as tools and content to support you.

The purpose of the 21- day program is to help you:

  • Strengthen your body’s natural cleansing function1
  • Support your digestive health3 and a positive mood4
  • Improve your appearance5
  • Support your immune system6
  • Stay more fit and active

It should also help you to:

  • Overcome challenges and stress
  • Improve the quality of your sleep
  • Build positive lifestyle habits

1 Milk thistle helps the body cleanse itself.
2 With Nutrilite Milk Thistle supplement as milk thistle helps the body cleanse itself.
3 Milk thistle promotes digestion.
4 Vitamin B6 and folic acid (B9) contribute to normal psychological function.
5 As a result of physical and mental exercises.
6 Vitamin B6 and folic acid (B9) contribute to the normal function of the immune system.

Why You Would Like It

We all want to live a healthier, happier life.  Sometimes this can be challenging due to the type of food we eat, our exposure to environmental factors, and alcohol consumption, all of which can put stress on the liver and the group of organs that work around the clock as part of our body’s natural cleansing function.

The Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program1 has been developed to help strengthen the body’s natural cleansing function1, providing the body the extra support it might benefit from in order to maintain this natural cleansing process.1

You will love the program because:

  • It is developed in partnership with Dr. Francesco Avaldi, a Nutrilite™ Nutrition Consultant with a Masters in Vegetarian Dietetics, who advises on sports nutrition for top European football teams and Olympic athletes
  • It provides free access to useful tools and content in the dedicated Destination Wellness section5 of the Amway Xperience mobile app and the Program Manual, which provide nutrition guidance, great recipes, active-lifestyle tips, motivational support and the opportunity to share your journey with a community of people like you.
  • Easy to follow, thanks to clear, simple steps and a flexible approach.
  • The program should help you to stay more fit and active2, improve your appearance3 and support your positive mood4.
  • Easy to stay on track and motivated with anytime-anywhere access to the Destination Wellness digital tool5 under Amway Xperience mobile app, where you will find great recipes, active-lifestyle tips, motivational support as well as the support of your Amway Business Owner.

details:
Key Features

The Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program is supported by a wealth of resources available anytime anywhere thanks to the Destination Wellness section in the Amway Xperience mobile app. There, you can find recipes, tips, tools and motivational content to keep you on track throughout the program.

How To Use

The Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program Bundle is your starting point for the holistic 21-day Body Cleansing Program. Once you receive your Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program Bundle, follow these steps:

  • Decide on your start date and then let your friends, family and colleagues know – they can support you or they might want to share the journey with you.
  • Plan your daily routine with the help of the Program Manual or mobile app.1

Use every Nutrilite product as directed, incorporating them into your daily meal plan as recommended in the supportive tools and Program Manual in the “Daily Meal Examples & Supplements” section.

Visit the Nutrilite Body Cleansing Program page2 to see a video that explains the program, step by step.

The program is only intended for adults

Do not take Nutrilite Milk Thistle during pregnancy or lactation. If you suffer from any kind of condition or disease affecting the liver or biliary tract, or any kind of obstruction of the bile duct/gallstones, the use of Nutrilite Milk Thistle is not recommended. If you are taking any medication, you should seek the advice of your doctor.

name: Coffee Beans Amway™
description: Coffee beans which are not espresso-roasted to deliver an especially mild taste.
overview:
The coffee beans will keep long term, if stored in a cool dry place. Using coffee beans allows you to grind only what is needed for each brew. Grind the beans to the consistency of choice, as different coffee extraction methods require different grinds. For best results, remember the longer the brewing time, the coarser the grind. These coffee beans are not espresso roasted.

Features

  • Made from 100% pure arabica beans.
  • These coffee beans are not espresso-roasted to deliver an especially mild taste.
  • They are packed using a one-way degassing valve to preserve the freshness of the newly-roasted beans.
  • They can be ground fine or coarse, allowing you to choose the consistency and grind to suit your preferred coffee-making method.
  • Suitable for use in pan method of extraction or with filter methods.

name: da Carapelli Extra Virgin Olive Oil Amway™
description: Superior category olive oil obtained directly from olives and solely by mechanical means.
overview:
Produced exclusively for Amway by Carapelli Firenze S.p.A. (Company certified with EN ISO 9001:2000).

Superior category olive oil obtained directly from olives and solely by mechanical means. Blend of olive oils of the European Union origin.

Features

  • Formulated exclusively for Amway in collaboration with Carapelli Firenze, a leading Italian producer of high-quality and exclusive products.
  • Superior quality surpassing legal requirements.
  • Only the best Mediterranean olives are chosen and harvested by hand.
  • Gentle handling of the fruit results in less bruising and ensures that the acidity level is kept very low (about 0.3%).
  • Contains oleic acid, polyphenols and vitamin E Pack content 2 x 0.75 litre Bottles.
details:
Suggested Usage

In the Mediterranean, cuisine olive oil is traditionally used for all types of food preparation (roasting, frying, grilling, basting, dressings, marinades, cooking ingredient, etc.). However, due to the fact that the unsaturated fatty acids in olive oil may be destroyed at high temperatures, we do not recommend olive oil for frying, grilling and roasting.

Advisory

Store at room temperature, ideally 20°C. Precipitation (cloudy oil) may occur if stored below 7°C. This is a normal process as olive oil tends to solidify, and does not affect the quality of the product. If precipitation is present, store the oil at room temperature for up to eight hours for the solids to return to their liquid state.

overview:
This tea is a speciality tea which has been grown, cultivated and processed in the tea gardens of the hilly Darjeeling region in India. When brewed, it has a naturally occurring taste with a light, easily sensed fragrance.

Darjeeling tea is widely acknowledged as being one of the finest teas because its flavour is so unique  that it cannot be replicated anywhere else in the world. Darjeeling is known and recognised as a delicate tea with a soft character.

Features

  • Single estate tea.
  • Delivers a consistent, high-quality and distinctive, flavoursome taste.
  • Contains individual tea bags, each tagged and enveloped.
details:
Suggested Usage

Use one tea bag per mug or cup and top up with boiling water. Stir and leave to brew for a minute or so, then remove the tea bag. Add lemon, milk and/or sugar to taste.

name: English Breakfast Tea Amway™
description: Blend of Assam and Kenyan tea combined with delicate leaves of other sublime teas.
overview:
This tea is a quality blend of Assam and Kenyan tea, combined with delicate leaves of other sublime teas. English Breakfast Tea from Amway comes from a carefully selected supplier who cares about their tea workers.

They provide homes, fair wages and medical care at specialised hospital facilities within key locations. They create employment in their tea-growing community, helping them learn new skills to develop their confidence and provide a way through education, subsidised food and income to change their life for the better. Our tea supplier is also a member of the Tea Sourcing Partnership.

Features

  • Blend of high-quality tea with delicious flavour.
  • Packed in foiled pouches for ultimate freshness.
  • Individual square tea bags – create less waste in the production process and allow improved brew performance as there is greater surface area to the tea. This means that more water gets into the tea leaves and brewing is more even.
details:
Suggested Usage

Use one tea bag per mug or cup and top up with boiling water. Stir and leave to brew for a minute or so, then remove the bag. Add lemon, milk and/ or sugar to taste.

name: Espresso Coffee Amway™
description: Fine grind in this espresso ground coffee delivers quick brewing time with consistent thickness.
overview:
A good espresso extraction should take only 15-20 seconds in an espresso machine, where hot water is forced over the finely-ground coffee at high pressure. Espresso is not just strong coffee, but a unique taste and flavour.

The beans for this specially-prepared coffee are espresso roasted and it takes more than 40 coffee beans to make one cup of espresso coffee.

Features

  • Made from 100% pure arabica beans.
  • Fine grind delivers quick brewing time with consistent thickness.
  • Vacuum-sealed to preserve full aroma.
  • Espresso is a base for many coffee treats like cappuccino, latte, mocha and more.

name: Filter Coffee Amway™
description: Filter coffee made from 100% pure arabica beans.
overview:
Types of roasts

The coffee industry generally has four types of roast:

  • high (or double) roast has a strong, slightly bitter burnt taste
  • full roast has a less bitter taste, and without the burnt taste
  • medium roast delivers a strong, full taste without the bitter taste
  • light (or pale) roast gives a mild, smooth, delicate taste

Amway’s Espresso Coffee comes from the high, double roast, while the other coffees are medium to full roast.

Features

  • Made from 100% pure arabica beans.
  • Air-tight sealed after careful roasting to preserve the full aroma.
  • Evenly roasted beans are used as base.
  • Coffee contains caffeine, a mild stimulant.
  • Coffee is low in calorie, fat and carbohydrates.
details:
Suggested Usage

Preparation

  • Filter coffee needs to be infused with hot water. The amount used is subjective and depends on individual taste. The most common mistake is not using enough quantity of ground coffee. For best results, the coffee should be brewed just off the boil (95–98°C) and should not be left on a warmer for more than 15–20 minutes.
  • Any leftover coffee should be discarded.

Usage

  • Suitable for use in any preferred infusion method.
  • Also ideal as a base for recipes where liquid coffee is required.

name: Instant Coffee Amway™
description: Instant freeze-dried coffee from 100% arabica beans.
overview:
Freeze-dried coffee is considered to be the best method for instant coffee production. The coffee is brewed, then frozen into slabs and ground into particles which are then put into a vacuum with a small amount of heat. This turns the ice directly into steam, leaving the ground particles dry, chunky and ready for use.

Features

  • Made from 100% pure arabica beans.
  • Pure Columbian blend.
  • Instant freeze-dried coffee granules preserve the original coffee-flavour.
  • Instant coffee is hot water-soluble for convenient, instant preparation.
  • Easy and quick to make a single cup of coffee, with no waste.
  • Perfect to cater for individual tastes – you can make a different brew strength per person.
details:
Suggested Usage

Preparation

Use one heaped teaspoon of Instant Coffee granules and top up with hot water to make one mug of delicious coffee.

Further Usage

Also suitable for use in a variety of recipes that require a coffee flavour, but not necessarily a coffee liquid.

name: Modena Balsamic Vinegar AMWAY™
description: Speciality vinegar obtained from the musts of Trebbiano and Lambrusco grapes from the Modena region in Italy.
overview:
This speciality product is obtained from the musts of Trebbiano and Lambrusco grapes from the Modena region in Italy. It is in the Modena countryside that, since ancient times, Trebbiano and Lambrusco vines have produced grapes renowned for their excellence, and where it is in the attics and not the cellars of the homes of Modena that the casks for the ageing and maturing of balsamic vinegar are kept.

The quality of the product is certified by the ‘Italian Consortium for Balsamic Vinegar of Modena’ and by the Control Agency Cermet, which is demonstrated by the official red label placed on the neck of the bottle.

Features

  • Certified by the ‘Italian Consortium for Balsamic Vinegar of Modena’ and the Control Agency Cermet.
  • Only Trebbiano and Lambrusco grapes are used from the Modena countryside.
  • Matured in oak barrels to provide intense, fruity aroma and exquisite sweet-and-sour flavour.
details:
Suggested Usage

Serve drizzled over fruit, salads, grilled meats, poultry and seafood or add to sauces and stews.

Ingredients

Ingredients:  Wine Vinegar, Cooked Grape Must, Colour E 150 D, Antioxidant E 224 (Contains Sulphites).

name: Electrolyte Drink Orange Lime Flavour
description: Stay at the top of your game. Experience a new level in refreshment with an advanced, performance-enhancing sports 				drink. It is a perfect replacement of electrolytes during a workout.
overview:
XS™ Sports Electrolyte Drink helps you stay at the top of your game by providing a balanced blend of carbohydrates and electrolytes.
 

Why you will love it…

The right fuel powers better exercise endurance. The slow, medium and fast-releasing carbohydrates and five key electrolytes in XS™ Sports Electrolyte Drink enhance the body’s absorption of water. This helps to prevent dehydration for better endurance during prolonged exercise. Make it your go-to sports drink when you need long-lasting and consistent energy.

What makes XS™ Sports Electrolyte Drink so special is its juicy citrus flavour of oranges and limes and a performance-boosting blend of Guarana, Maca Root and Quercetin. This trio of plants are grown in South America and are thought to contain natural compounds that improve focus and concentration.
 

Good to know…

  • Replenishes with 5 key electrolytes lost through sweat during exercise.   Deficiencies in electrolytes may result in muscle cramping.
  • Carbohydrate-electrolyte solution also fuels workouts, contributing to the maintenance of endurance performance during prolonged endurance exercise.
  • Helps increase mental and physical strength so you can work out powerfully for a long time - May help improve focus and concentration with a trio of South American plants. Guarana seeds contain approximately four times the amount of caffeine as coffee beans. Maca Root is a flowering Peruvian plant containing an abundance of nutrients such as fatty acids and amino acids. Lastly, Quercetin is a flavonoid found in foods such as tomatoes, berries and broccoli.
  • Pour one sachet into 500ml of water for a hypotonic drink or 400ml of water for an isotonic drink and enjoy during sports and exercise.

  • Fast-acting and refreshing, designed to be used during or after exercise to replenish fluids and provide helpful energy support
  • Packed with powerful ingredients and key electrolytes
  • Best used in conjunction with other XS Sports products

Dilute 1 sachet in 500 ml of water for hypotonic or 400ml for an isotonic drink. Consume during or after your workout. 

One sachet contains 60 mg of caffeine.

name: Hydrolyzed Whey Protein Powder Cocoa – Chocolate Flavour
description: Recover faster, supports your muscles to prepare you for your next adventure.
overview:
XS™ Hydrolyzed Whey Protein Powder delivers a delicious and fast-digesting dose of protein to fuel lean muscle growth.
 

Why you will love it…

XS™ Hydrolyzed Whey Protein Powder has a fast-digesting hydrolyzed formula which supports protein synthesis to help reduce recovery times. Whether you are working to achieve a new personal best, or improve your performance on the court, XS Hydrolyzed Whey Protein Powder may help you achieve your goals. This delicious cocoa chocolate-flavoured protein powder also contains vitamins C and E which support your cells from oxidative stress during exercise.
 

Good to know…

  • One serving of fast-acting hydrolyzed whey protein provides 29 grammes of high-quality protein to build and maintain lean muscle mass.

Why You Would Like It

Rich vitamin-B complex, containing 4 B-vitamins, contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue and contributes to normal psychological function, so you can be at your best from morning to night and live your life to the fullest. 

The special formula contains collagen, biotin and vitamin E to help you look your best. Collagen is the major structural protein for skin, biotin supports hair and skin wellbeing, while vitamin E protects cells from oxidative stress. 

Light and refreshing lemon-peach flavour and no added sugar*, colours or flavours make this a delicious, easy and quick way to support you, all through the day.

name: The Electric High-Speed Blender Glass Jar
description: The Nutrilite™ Blender glass jar replacement part fits into the blender base easily and is great for creating the most delicious smoothies.
overview:
The glass jar fits into the blender base easily and requires no twisting or turning – it’s ergonomically designed to be easy to use for left- and right-handed people.

Should you need a new glass jar, simply replace it with this original replacement glass jar.

Also, if you are preparing different foods at the same time, it is more convenient to have a second glass jar and a second knife base readily available, so you can spend less time cleaning.

 

What It Does For You

  • A large capacity of 1,8L/1.8L
  • An engraved scale to measure directly in the glass jar (ml, fl. oz., pints, cups)
  • The glass jar is made of 3 natural ingredients: silica sand, soda ash and limestone. The glass is 100% recyclable material and can be recycled with no loss of quality. https://www.gpi.org/glass-recycling-facts
  • It can be used to blend warm ingredients up to 40 degrees Celsius.

Why You Would Like It

You can use this jar to replace any broken or damaged glass jars, sent to you for your own convenience. Alternatively, you may want an extra jar for when the other one is being washed or when it is drying on the sink rack!
details:
Key Features

The Glass Jar has the following features: A large capacity of 1,8L/1.8L, an engraved scale to measure directly in the glass jar (ml, fl. oz., pints, cups), and can blend warm ingredients up to 40 degrees Celsius

How To Use

  • Read the Nutrilite Electric High-Speed manual thoroughly and follow the instructions.

Ingredients

None

name: The Electric High-Speed Blender Knife Base
description: The knife base comes with stainless steel blades that are perfect for blending hot and cold ingredients. This product is only suitable for the Nutrilite Blender as a replacement part.
overview:
The knife base with a food-grade stainless steel 8-blade knife set provides great blending results.

Should you need a new knife base, simply replace it with this original knife base with an 8-blade knife set.

Also, if you are preparing different foods at the same time, it is more convenient to have a second knife base and glass jar readily available, so you can spend less time cleaning.

 

What It Does For You

  • Stainless steel blades
  • Dishwasher safe
  • It can be used to blend warm ingredients up to 40 degrees Celsius

Why You Would Like It

The Nutrilite Blender Knife Base is a replacement product to help maintain the functionality of the original product: the Nutrilite Blender. You may want to get this replacement product if repeated use has caused your blades to become blunt OR if you are experiencing leaks due to a broken base.
details:
Key Features

  • The Knife Base is a single product used to replace the blades for the Nutrilite Blender.
  • They are stainless steel and dishwasher safe.

How To Use

  • Read the Nutrilite Electric High-Speed manual thoroughly and follow the instructions.
     
  • Removing the knife set with the tool from the jar requires some force. Given the power of the Nutrilite/Nutriway Electric High-Speed Blender, it is important that the knife set is fitted tightly to the glass jar to avoid any potential leaks. Please ensure the knife set fits securely after cleaning/before operation.

name: 3-in-1 Volume Mascara
description: Plant-powered lash-loving mascara with a transformative brush to lengthen, define and volumise lashes.
overview:
Go from naturally defined to bold lashes with this 3-in-1 water-resistant mascara with powerful plant ingredients that deliver dramatic looks while caring for your lashes.

 

What It Does For You

  • Volumises, lengthens and defines: Twist the transformative brush to create multiple lash effects.
  • Provides long-lasting wear: Lasts up to 10 hours without flaking.
  • Resists daily challenges: Sweat-, smudge-, water-, transfer- and humidity-resistant.
  • Removes easily: No scrubbing or make-up remover needed, just use warm water.
  • Cares for your lashes: With Nutrilite-grown botanicals, plant-based and active ingredients to support fuller-, lifted-, longer- and thicker-looking lashes. 

Why You Would Like It

Whether you want to enhance your natural beauty or create more dramatic looks, feel confident all day with this 3-in-1 mascara that can level up any look.

Made with 68%*+ natural-origin ingredients and 100% mineral-based pigment, this mascara was clinically tested to provide a 1.5x increase in volume immediately after application**.

* Natural-origin percentage calculated according to ISO 16128-2 standard.
**Based on 3rd party Clinical Study 

Facts For You

  • 87% agreed it made their lashes look fuller*.
  • 89% agreed it made their lashes look more defined*. 
  • 89% agreed it gave their lashes a weightless volume*.
     
  • Clean and safe. Made without parabens, phthalates and mineral oil.
  • Fragrance-free. Dermatologist- and allergy-tested to minimise risk of allergies.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

* study involving 115 participants ages 25-55 who used the mascara for one week
details:
Key Features

  • Made with plant-derived fibre that adheres to lashes to create volume.
  • Made with Copernicia cerifera (carnauba) wax, a botanical setting agent that provides a durable film to support fuller, more defined lashes.
  • Clinically tested to boost lash volume. 
  • Safe for use around the eyes and contact lens wearers. 

How To Use

Before you use it, gently wipe excess product off the tip of the mascara brush.

For longer and defined lashes: Use the applicator in the full, elongated position. 
For fuller volume: Simply twist the applicator to shorten its position. Apply several coats for more dimension.

  • Apply the mascara by wiggling the wand at lash roots before sweeping through to lash tips.
  • Allow mascara to dry between layers for best results.
  • To remove at the end of the day, use warm water to conveniently wipe away. Make-up remover or cleansing oil can be used for a thorough removal.

Ingredients

Plant-based ingredients

  • Pumpkin seed extract (Cucurbita pepo): supports fuller-, more lifted- and longer-looking lashes.
  • Phyto-proof complex – plant-derived fibre (cellulose) and botanical setting agent: supports thicker-looking lashes.
  • Nutrilite white chia seed extract and Nutrilite pomegranate extract.
  • Hydrolysed pea protein, corn protein, hibiscus flower extract and aloe vera leaf extract.

Key ingredients

  • Vitamin C Complex: including vitamin C, B7 and E.

name: Cream & Powder Blush
description: A weightless, long-lasting blush duo for unlimited multi-finish looks.
size: cream blush: 5 g powder blush: 4 g
overview:
Discover this buildable, blendable blush duo which gives a natural-looking glow and up to 10 hours of wear. Enjoy its lightweight formula with skin-loving ingredients!
 

What It Does For You

  • Features two textures in one - the luminous matte powder in lighter shade or the velvety cream in deeper shade. Can be used on their own for a natural hue or layered for higher-intensity colour.
    • Cream texture – Our innovative technology delivers comfortable wear, even pigment and natural colour that resembles a natural looking flush.
    • Powder texture – Our unique cosmetic technology creates a lustrous 3D finish through micro-fine light diffusing pearls. It creates a plumper, firmer appearance with its luminous finish – and helps set the look in place. 
  • Delivers long-lasting wear for up to 10 hours, ensuring colour stays fresh throughout the day.
  • It’s multi-functional: designed for cheeks, the cream blush is wearable on lips, too. Use it alone for a soft touch of colour, or layer it over a lip balm for a more vivid look. (Tip: keep it in your bag for on-the-go touch-ups!)
  • Provides a healthy-looking radiance thanks to antioxidant-rich Nutrilite™ Pomegranate Extract, and Vitamins E & B5. 
  • Ensures a weightless, breathable finish with its hydrating, non-drying formula.

Why You Would Like It

Add a soft, luminous finish to every look with this versatile blush duo rich in natural skin-loving ingredients. Enjoy how it effortlessly blends, delivering long-lasting colour with depth and dimension. Its clean formula enriched with Nutrilite Pomegranate Extract and vitamins E & B5 helps nourish your skin for all-day comfort. Elevate your confidence with a blush designed to keep up with your lifestyle.

Available in shades for both warm and cold skin tones, offering the colours you crave: 

127473 Pink Spring Fling - recommended for warm skin tones

  • Cream: Carnation Fields – Darker, peachy-pink shade with a hint of orange. 
  • Powder: Camelia Bloom – Light, bright, warm pink.

127474 Mauvy Night - recommended for cold skin tones

  • Cream: Fuchsia Flirt – Deeper pink shade with a hint of purple.
  • Powder: Lilac Luster – Cool mauve shade.

Facts For You

This formula meets Artistry Clean standards, a rigorous set of guidelines that ensures Artistry™ products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Formulated with no mineral oil, parabens, or phthalates
  • No talc or carmine red
  • Dermatologically tested
  • Allergy tested 
  • No animal-derived ingredient
  • Not tested on animals
  • Registered with The Vegan Society
  • Fragrance-free 

In a Consumer test of Artistry Go Vibrant Cream & Powder Blush:

  • 96% said it provides skin with a natural, healthy-looking glow*
  • 95% said it feels comfortable and weightless*

Packaging:

  • Includes a mirror for convenient and on-the-go application and a cream protector sheet.
  • The case is made with post-consumer recycled plastic. Carton is printed on FSC-certified paper and is 100% recyclable** 

*After 1 week, in a consumer test of 109 women ages 24-55.
**Where appropriate recycling facilities are available; check locally.
details:
How To Use

Using the cream and powder shade individually: 

  1. Apply the cream blush on the apples of the cheeks with a blush brush or dab a dot or two along the apples of the cheeks with your fingers. Then, blend out to achieve a soft wash of colour. 
  2. Apply the powder blush on the upper cheekbones with a blush brush.

Using both blush types together:

  • For a healthy-looking glow, begin by applying the powder blush on the upper cheeks with a brush. Next, use your fingertips to layer the cream blush onto the apples of your cheeks.
  • For a lasting effect, start by applying the cream blush using your fingertips or a brush. Then, layer the powder blush on top to set and intensify the colour, adding depth and dimension.

How to recognise if you have a warm or cold skin tone and pick up the right blush (127473 Pink Spring Fling - recommended for warm skin tones, 127474 Mauvy Night - recommended for cold skin tones).

There are three undertone categories: COLD, WARM, and NEUTRAL, and most definitely you fall into one of them. Find your undertone by answering 3 questions:

  1. Look at the veins on the inside of your wrist, if they look greenish, then your skin may have warm undertones. If the veins appear blue or purple, then you may have cool undertones. If you have neutral undertones, then your veins may appear both green and purple.
  2. Assess your jewellery. Traditional gold jewellery typically looks better on warm undertones. Silver, platinum and rose gold jewellery tends to flatter cooler undertones. You may have neutral undertones if you tend to look good in both silver and gold.
  3. Neutral-coloured clothing can also indicate your undertones. Cold white and black tends to favour cooler undertones, while warm undertones look better in warm white and brown. Like jewellery, if you have a neutral undertone, you look good in all colours.
     

Ingredients

  • Nutrilite-grown pomegranate extract helps provide antioxidant benefits.
  • Enriched vitamin complex (E and B5) and moisturising complex (ceramide).
  • Naturally derived mineral pigments (no carmine) to achieve natural-looking hues.

name: Cream Lipstick
description: Artistry Go Vibrant Lipstick - lip-loving nutrients and long-lasting hydration in one colourful, vibrant stroke. A universal palette of cream shades enriched with plant-derived ingredients like White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter.
overview:
Discover healthy beauty with Artistry Go Vibrant Lipstick - a flattering line-up of lipsticks formulated with lip-loving ingredients and developed with Artistry™ advanced colour technology. The perfect fit for your colour-loving style and your passion for clean beauty.

 

What It Does For You

  • Packed with lip-loving, plant-based nutrients
  • Hydrating formula leaves lips feeling soft, moisturised and comforted
  • Deep nourishing thanks to White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter
  • One-stroke application with custom curved bullet shape for a precise and intense colour finish
  • Reduces the appearance of fine lines
  • Universal shades created to complement all skin tones
  • Created clean: vegan formula meets the Artistry Clean standards

Why You Would Like It

Artistry Go Vibrant Cream & Matte Lipsticks are infused with lip-loving ingredients, such as Nutrilite™ -grown White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter. Vegan and fragrance-free - discover vibrant shades that give you intense colour and long-lasting hydration with one-stroke application! The super creamy, hydrating formula leaves your lips looking healthy and full. It reduces the look of fine lines and gives you a perfect satin-shine finish. Your lips have never felt and looked better!

Facts For You

Formulated with Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter.

Meets Artistry™ Clean Beauty standards:

  • Formulated with no parabens
  • Free from animal derived ingredients
  • Dermatologically-tested
  • Allergy-tested
  • Carton is 100% recyclable.

Customer Tested*: 85% of users said it leaves my lips feeling healthy.

  • Contains no animal-derived ingredients; registered with the Vegan Society. No animal testing.

  • Starting at the centre of the top lip, apply moving out toward the corner. Repeat on bottom lip. Follow the natural shape of your lip.

name: Eyeshadow Quad

details:
How To Use

To create an easy eye look with any palette:

  1. Apply the lighter matte shade as a base all over eyelid, from lash line to under the eyebrow
  2. Follow with the satin shade in the crease and at outer corner of eye
  3. Then gently press the shimmer shade on the center of eyelid as a highlighter, and blend into inner corner
  4. Finish with the deeper matte shade, smudging it along the upper lash line for definition

Or, get creative with your own style and techniques. Keep it casual by applying only the first two shades. Go smoky by layering on the deeper matte shade, then blending and blurring.

name: Longwearing Foundation SPF 25 PA+++
description: A long-wearing foundation that offers up to 24-hour matte perfection with SPF 25 PA+++ protection.
overview:
Enjoy flawless and matte complexion for up to 24 hours while protecting and nourishing your skin.

 

What It Does For You

  • Perfects: A waterproof and touchproof lightweight formula provides up to 24 hours of medium-to-full coverage to conceal redness, pores, and imperfections while controlling sebum.
     
  • Mattifies: Ideal for normal-to-oily skin, it transforms from a hydrating cream to a nourishing powder for a natural, matte and oil-free finish.
     
  • Protects: SPF 25 PA+++ protection shields against harmful UV rays, preventing sun damage and premature aging. Antioxidant protection from external aggressors, keeping skin healthy-looking and radiant.
     
  • Hydrates: Skin-loving ingredients, including Nutrilite™ botanicals, prevent moisture loss, leaving skin smooth without dryness.
     
  • Matches your skin tone: Available in 17 shades to perfectly match every skin tone, ensuring a natural, seamless finish.

Why You Would Like It

Experience the confidence of flawless skin with up to 24-hour matte coverage that lasts through everything your day brings. Artistry Ever Perfect™ Longwearing Foundation long-wear formula keeps your skin flawless staying put through heat, sweat, and pollution, so you can trust your make-up will look great no matter what. Enjoy your daily activities with SPF 25 PA+++ protection, your skin is shielded from harmful UV rays, keeping you safe from sun damage.

Without drying out the skin, it soothes with skin-supporting botanicals and other nourishing ingredients that hydrate and provide antioxidant protection, keeping your skin smooth and healthy-looking throughout the day.

Facts For You

  • Available in 17 shades to suit every skin tone
  • Lightweight packaging for ultimate convenience
  • Formulated without parabens, phthalates, mineral oil
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested to minimise risk of allergies
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

In Consumer testing of Artistry Ever Perfect Longwearing Foundation SPF 25 PA+++:

  • 94% agreed it is comfortable to wear.*
  • 90% agreed it perfected the appearance of their skin and blurred imperfections.*
  • 83% said it provides buildable coverage for a flawless, natural look.*

*In a study involving 120 participants ages 25-55 who used the foundation for one week.
details:
Key Features

  • Ideal for normal-to-oily skin and suitable for all skin types.
  • Cream-to-powder texture offers a flawless finish that absorbs excess oil, keeping your skin matte and fresh all day.
  • SPF 25 PA+++ protect skin from sunburn.
  • Lightweight, fine particles offer full, cohesive, yet weightless coverage that absorbs sebum production over a 24-hour period to support healthy-looking skin and prevent makeup from breaking down.
  • Hydrating formula with ingredients that help prevent moisture loss and protect against dryness.
  • Plant-based formula contains ingredients from Nutrilite-grown plants to foster Healthy Beauty.

How To Use

  • Before use, shake well—especially if you haven’t used it in a while.
  • Place one or two pumps onto the back of your hand.
  • Using your fingertips or preferred applicator, apply the foundation starting at the centre of the face (or wherever more coverage is needed).
  • Smooth over face, moving outward.
  • Focus on one area at a time and blend well.
  • To build coverage, add a little more foundation.
  • Spend time on blending and layering well also towards the neck and decollete, according to your outfit.
  • Set with Artistry Ever Perfect Loose Powder to lock in your look all day.

How to recognise if you have a warm or cold skin tone and pick up the right shade:

  1. Pick the intensity of your skin colour with the help of the Shades Finder. There are four of them. Light – medium – tan and deep level.
  2. Determine your undertone amongst cold, warm and neutral. You may understand it by answering some questions.
    • Look at the veins on the inside of your wrist, if they look greenish, then your skin may have warm undertones. If the veins appear blue or purple, then you may have cool undertones. If you have neutral undertones, then your veins may appear both green and purple.
    • Assess your jewellery. Traditional gold jewellery typically looks better on warm undertones. Silver, platinum and rose gold jewellery tends to flatter cooler undertones. You may have neutral undertones if you tend to look good in both silver and gold.
    • Neutral-coloured clothing can also indicate your undertones. Cold white and black tends to favour cooler undertones, while warm undertones look better in warm white and brown. Like jewellery, if you have a neutral undertone, you look good in all colours.
  3. Finally, in case you are still unsure, pick a shade marked for Neutral undertone, as often Neutral will complement either cool or warm undertones.
  4. For deeper skin tones, you might look for foundations that have a yellow or golden undertone, as in most cases that will be the ideal fit.
  5. How to choose the right foundation for you between Artistry Ever Perfect™ and Artistry Future Glow™

Ingredients

  • Film former: a silky smooth layer of highly cross-linked film that acts as a “second skin” to prevent moisture loss, keeping foundation makeup layers from wearing off.
  • Silica and mica: a combination of two special powders that form an even, flawless matte finish.
  • Nutrilite -grown pomegranate extract and acerola cherry extract: help defend skin against external stressors.
  • Camellia japonica flower extract: helps protect against environmental stressors
  • Hibiscus esculentus fruit extract: helps moisturise in depth.
  • Sodium Hyaluronate (salt form of Hyaluronic Acid): supports skin hydration.
  • SPF 25 PA+++: provides UV protection from sunburn. The PA+++ rating indicates protection from UVA, or “ageing” rays that cause sunburn.

INGREDIENTS / SASTOJCI / СКЛАД / СОСТАВ /ҚҰРАМЫ: WATER, METHYL TRIMETHICONE, ISODODECANE, ISOTRIDECYL ISONONANOATE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, PHENYL TRIMETHICONE, POLYGLYCERYL-3 POLYDIMETHYLSILOXYETHYL DIMETHICONE, SILICA, DIMETHICONE, GLYCERIN, SORBITAN ISOSTEARATE, VP/HEXADECENE COPOLYMER, DISTEARDIMONIUM HECTORITE, DIMETHICONE/VINYL DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER, TRIMETHYLSILOXYSILICATE, MAGNESIUM SULFATE, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, DIPHENYLSILOXY PHENYL TRIMETHICONE, TRIETHOXYCAPRYLYLSILANE, ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, LAUROYL LYSINE, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, PROPANEDIOL, RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL, DIMETHICONE/PHENYL VINYL DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER, MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, ANTHEMIS NOBILIS FLOWER OIL, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, THUJA ORIENTALIS EXTRACT, CITRUS AURANTIUM AMARA (BITTER ORANGE) FLOWER EXTRACT, SORBITAN OLIVATE, CAMELLIA JAPONICA FLOWER EXTRACT, PHENOXYETHANOL, HIBISCUS ESCULENTUS FRUIT EXTRACT, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CETYL PALMITATE, TOCOPHEROL, CETEARETH-12, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, GLYCERYL STEARATE, CETEARETH-20, CAPROIC ACID, SODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, TETRAHYDROXYPROPYL ETHYLENEDIAMINE, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, +/- TITANIUM DIOXIDE, MICA, IRON OXIDES (CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499)

name: Loose Setting Powder
description: Ensure your makeup stays perfect all day long!
overview:
Ensure your makeup stays perfect all day long and give your skin a flawless finish.

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides a soft-focus effect: Instantly blurs pores, fine lines and wrinkles for a perfected appearance.
     
  • Controls shine: Absorbs excess sebum, keeping your skin shine-free throughout the day and helping extend makeup wear. Lightweight texture ensures a weightless application without caking.
     
  • Optimises light reflection: The spherical powder provides a refined, reflective finish and a healthy-looking, youthful glow.
     
  • Hydrates: Skin-supportive botanicals soothe and nourish without clogging pores or drying out skin.

Why You Would Like It

Discover the power of this essential final step on your makeup.
Artistry Ever Perfect™ Loose Setting Powder effortlessly sets your makeup while offering a soft-focus effect that blurs pores and fine lines, smooths your skin and erases shine all day long. Enjoy the confidence of a weightless powder that feels light and comfortable on your skin without drying it.

Facts For You

  • Available in 3 versatile shades
  • Includes a convenient powder puff for easy application
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested to minimise risk of allergies
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

In a Consumer perception study of Artistry Ever Perfect™ Loose Setting Powder:

  • 96% agreed it helped reduce shine and oil.*
  • 95% agreed it helped set makeup in place, providing a long-lasting, flawless finish.*
  • 95% agreed it felt weightless on their skin, ensuring comfort throughout the day.*

*In a study involving 119 participants ages 27-55 who used the powder for one week.
details:
Key Features

  • Ideal for normal-to-oily skin and is suitable for all skin types.
     
  • Finely milled powder in Artistry Ever Perfect™ Loose Setting Powder provides a weightless application that smooths your skin and blurs imperfections for a softening effect without feeling heavy.
     
  • Reduces shine and absorbs excessive sebum without drying the skin.
     
  • The Highlight shade optimises light reflection for a refined finish and healthy-looking glow.
     
  • Formulated with skin-loving ingredients, including Nutrilite™-grown botanicals, to soothe and nourish your skin while keeping it looking flawless all day.

 

  • The Powder Puff applicator:
    • Is specifically designed for loose powder, with a flexible texture that gently hugs the skin – ensuring even adhesion and transparent finish.
    • Regulates the amount of powder when pressed into the container, making it feel just right on the skin – light, transparent, comfortable and even – without clumping.
    • Enhances the natural look of makeup, giving the appearance of a delicate illumination – almost invisible and weightless.
    • 10 mm thick.

How To Use

  • Try it on your arm first to avoid over-application: how it appears on your arm is how it will appear on your face.
     
  • Apply it gently where you feel your skin is more oily.
     
  • Fold the powder puff to adapt it to all face areas.
     
  • You may use it also on the eyelid to set up the eyeshadow.

Ingredients

  • Mica: finely milled, very lightweight, it creates a perfecting finish without creasing.  
  • Silica: porous texture reduces excess sebum on the face with high-absorption abilities to extend makeup wear.
  • Nutrilite-grown pomegranate extract and acerola cherry extract: help defend skin against external stressors.
  • Sunflower oil: contains Vitamin E, which is known for its antioxidant properties.
  • Sodium Hyaluronate (salt form of Hyaluronic Acid): recognized for its ability to support skin hydration.
  • Calendula officinalis flower oil: helps to soothe the skin and support moisture retention.
  • Meadowfoam seed oil: a nourishing oil that contributes to skin hydration.

INGREDIENTS/INGRÉDIENTS/INGREDIENTES/SASTOJCI/СКЛАД/СОСТАВ/ҚҰРАМЫ:

  • HIGHLIGHT: MICA, SILICA, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, DIMETHICONE, SYNTHETIC FLUORPHLOGOPITE, METHICONE, TITANIUM DIOXIDE (CI 77891), LAUROYL LYSINE, GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE, IRON OXIDES (CI 77491), IRON OXIDES (CI 77499), ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, LIMNANTHES ALBA (MEADOWFOAM) SEED OIL, RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, Red 30 (CI 73360), MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER, SORBITAN OLIVATE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CAPROIC ACID
  • LIGHT TO MEDIUM: MICA, SILICA, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, DIMETHICONE, METHICONE, LAUROYL LYSINE, GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE, IRON OXIDES (CI 77492, CI 77499, CI 77491), BUTYLENE GLYCOL, LIMNANTHES ALBA (MEADOWFOAM) SEED OIL, RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER, SORBITAN OLIVATE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CAPROIC ACID
  • MEDIUM TO DEEP: MICA, SILICA, DIMETHICONE, IRON OXIDES (CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499), CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, LAUROYL LYSINE, GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, LIMNANTHES ALBA (MEADOWFOAM) SEED OIL, RICINUS COMMUNIS (CASTOR) SEED OIL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, CALENDULA OFFICINALIS FLOWER, SORBITAN OLIVATE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM HYALURONATE, CAPROIC ACID

name: Matte Lipstick
description: Artistry Go Vibrant Lipstick - lip-loving nutrients and long-lasting hydration in one colourful, vibrant stroke. A universal palette of matte shades enriched with plant-derived ingredients like White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter.
overview:
Discover healthy beauty with Artistry Go Vibrant Lipstick - a flattering line-up of lipsticks formulated with lip-loving ingredients and developed with Artistry™ advanced colour technology. The perfect fit for your colour-loving style and your passion for clean beauty.

 

What It Does For You

  • Packed with lip-loving, plant-based nutrients
  • Hydrating formula leaves lips feeling soft, moisturised and comforted
  • Deep nourishing thanks to White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter
  • One-stroke application with custom curved bullet shape for a precise and intense colour finish
  • Reduces the appearance of fine lines
  • Universal shades created to complement all skin tones
  • Created clean: vegan formula meets the Artistry Clean standards

Why You Would Like It

Artistry Go Vibrant Cream & Matte Lipsticks are infused with lip-loving ingredients, such as Nutrilite™-grown White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter. Vegan and fragrance-free - discover vibrant shades that give you intense colour and long-lasting hydration with one-stroke application! The smooth-gliding, hydrating formula leaves your lips looking healthy and full. It reduces the look of fine lines and gives you the perfect natural matte finish. Your lips have never felt and looked better!

Facts For You

Formulated with Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract and Shea Butter.

  • Meets Artistry™ Clean Beauty standards:
  • Formulated with no parabens
  • Free from animal derived ingredients
  • Dermatologically-tested
  • Allergy-tested
  • Carton is 100% recyclable.

Customer Tested*: Users are loving Artistry Go Vibrant Matte Lipstick!

  • 88% of users said the product stayed comfortable.​
  • 97% of users said it delivered bold color in one stroke.​
  • 85% of users said it does not bleed or feather.​
  • 77% of users said it leave my lips feeling healthy.​

*After 1 week in a consumer test of n=107 women
details:
Key Features

  • Lip-loving formula enhanced by advanced colour technology, which helps deliver long lasting colour.
  • Universal shades that complement all skin tones.
  • Infused with White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Extract, and Shea Butter.
  • Contains no animal-derived ingredients; registered with the Vegan Society. No animal testing.
  • Formulated with no mineral oil, parabens, phthalates.

How To Use

  • Starting at the centre of the top lip, apply moving out toward the corner. Repeat on bottom lip. Follow the natural shape of your lip.
  • For a softer look, apply with your finger and press and roll along your lips.
  • Can be layered over Artistry Go Vibrant Sheer Lip Balm for extra hydration.

Ingredients

The formula includes a carefully curated blend of plant derived ingredients to replenish lip skin from within:

  • Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Oil
  • Shea Butter
  • Ginseng Extract

name: Powder Foundation Bundle - 101 Shell
description: This bundle includes a refill and a reusable compact, designed to reduce plastic waste and save money
overview:
Perfect your skin with this lightweight powder, enriched with skin-loving ingredients for a soft-focus, flawless matte finish that lasts all day. 2 Puff applicators included.

 

What It Does For You

  • Mattifies: Controls oil* for up to 24 hours while staying sweatproof, waterproof and resistant to heat** and humidity**.
  • Perfects: Medium to full buildable coverage for blemishes, pores, wrinkles and redness/yellowness.
  • Nourishes: With Nutrilite™-grown botanicals and nourishing ingredients to hydrate your skin and give a natural, radiant look.
  • Protects: All-day defense against external aggressors with Nutrilite™ Pomegranate Extract.

*Clinically tested. 2.25× stronger sebum control vs. Artistry Exact Fit powder foundation based on a third-party study (n=31). Results may vary.
**Clinically tested for heat (40 °C) and humidity (90%) resistance for 30 mins. Based on a third-party study (n=31–32).

Why You Would Like It

Enjoy healthy-looking, seamless skin with a perfectly matte finish for up to 24 hours, knowing your Powder Foundation also nourishes and protects your skin from external aggressors.

Effortlessly blend it onto your face and forget you're wearing it - water, sweat, humidity, or heat won't compromise your look.

2 Ever Perfect Powder Foundation Puffs are included for easy, effective application.

Facts For You

  • 96% agreed the powder foundation feels weightless on the skin*.
  • 94% agreed it gives the skin a smooth appearance*.        
  • 95% agreed that the powder foundation reduces the appearance of oil, immediately after application*. 
     
  • Clean and safe. Made without parabens, phthalates and mineral oil.
  • Dermatologist- and allergy-tested to minimise risk of allergies.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

*study involving 129 participants ages 25-55 who used the foundation for one week
details:
Key Features

  • Light as air, non-drying powder that’s easy to blend into skin
  • Does not crease or cake. Does not settle into fine lines and wrinkles.
  • Suitable for acne-prone skin; non-comedogenic 
  • Contains Moisturising Complex that helps to hydrate the skin.
  • Compact and replaceable Refill system to lower plastic waste and help you save money.
  • 10 shades available. 2 Puffs included with every Refill.

How To Use

How to assemble the Compact and Refill for the first time: 

  • Peel off the transparent sticker on the bottom label of the Refill.
  • Place it into the Compact and press down firmly to secure it.

How to change the Refill: 

  • Remove the used Refill by inserting a pin into the hole on the underside of the Compact to release it.
  • Then follow the same steps as above to insert the new Refill.

How to apply the product:

  • Always complete your Artistry™ skincare routine before beginning your make-up look 
  • Using the puff applicator provided, gently swipe to capture the product. 
  • Tap the powdered side of the puff on the back of your hand to remove excess before using it on the face. 
  • For best results, apply the product in thin layers to the face, blending the formula outward from the centre. 
  • Reapply throughout the day to touch up make-up as desired. 

Once empty, don’t forget to save the compact and use it with foundation refills.

You can use the Ever Perfect Powder Foundation alone for a lighter, breathable make-up, or layer it over your favourite liquid foundation for added coverage and longer wear.

Check our foundations shade chart to mix and match them.

Ingredients

Plant-based ingredients

  • Nutrilite™ pomegranate extract: helps protect the skin against external stressors such as pollution.
  • Backhousia citriodora leaf extract: supports the control and reduction of sebum.
  • Naturally-derived powder (corn starch)

name: Powder Foundation Bundle - 102 Cashmere
description: This bundle includes a refill and a reusable compact, designed to reduce plastic waste and save money
overview:
Perfect your skin with this lightweight powder, enriched with skin-loving ingredients for a soft-focus, flawless matte finish that lasts all day. 2 Puff applicators included.

 

What It Does For You

  • Mattifies: Controls oil* for up to 24 hours while staying sweatproof, waterproof and resistant to heat** and humidity**.
  • Perfects: Medium to full buildable coverage for blemishes, pores, wrinkles and redness/yellowness.
  • Nourishes: With Nutrilite™-grown botanicals and nourishing ingredients to hydrate your skin and give a natural, radiant look.
  • Protects: All-day defense against external aggressors with Nutrilite™ Pomegranate Extract.

*Clinically tested. 2.25× stronger sebum control vs. Artistry Exact Fit powder foundation based on a third-party study (n=31). Results may vary.
**Clinically tested for heat (40 °C) and humidity (90%) resistance for 30 mins. Based on a third-party study (n=31–32).

Why You Would Like It

Enjoy healthy-looking, seamless skin with a perfectly matte finish for up to 24 hours, knowing your Powder Foundation also nourishes and protects your skin from external aggressors.

Effortlessly blend it onto your face and forget you're wearing it - water, sweat, humidity, or heat won't compromise your look.

2 Ever Perfect Powder Foundation Puffs are included for easy, effective application.

Facts For You

  • 96% agreed the powder foundation feels weightless on the skin*.
  • 94% agreed it gives the skin a smooth appearance*.        
  • 95% agreed that the powder foundation reduces the appearance of oil, immediately after application*. 
     
  • Clean and safe. Made without parabens, phthalates and mineral oil.
  • Dermatologist- and allergy-tested to minimise risk of allergies.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

*study involving 129 participants ages 25-55 who used the foundation for one week
details:
Key Features

  • Light as air, non-drying powder that’s easy to blend into skin
  • Does not crease or cake. Does not settle into fine lines and wrinkles.
  • Suitable for acne-prone skin; non-comedogenic 
  • Contains Moisturising Complex that helps to hydrate the skin.
  • Compact and replaceable Refill system to lower plastic waste and help you save money.
  • 10 shades available. 2 Puffs included with every Refill.

How To Use

How to assemble the Compact and Refill for the first time: 

  • Peel off the transparent sticker on the bottom label of the Refill.
  • Place it into the Compact and press down firmly to secure it.

How to change the Refill: 

  • Remove the used Refill by inserting a pin into the hole on the underside of the Compact to release it.
  • Then follow the same steps as above to insert the new Refill.

How to apply the product:

  • Always complete your Artistry™ skincare routine before beginning your make-up look 
  • Using the puff applicator provided, gently swipe to capture the product. 
  • Tap the powdered side of the puff on the back of your hand to remove excess before using it on the face. 
  • For best results, apply the product in thin layers to the face, blending the formula outward from the centre. 
  • Reapply throughout the day to touch up make-up as desired. 

Once empty, don’t forget to save the compact and use it with foundation refills.

You can use the Ever Perfect Powder Foundation alone for a lighter, breathable make-up, or layer it over your favourite liquid foundation for added coverage and longer wear.

Check our foundations shade chart to mix and match them.

Ingredients

Plant-based ingredients

  • Nutrilite™ pomegranate extract: helps protect the skin against external stressors such as pollution.
  • Backhousia citriodora leaf extract: supports the control and reduction of sebum.
  • Naturally-derived powder (corn starch) 
  • Nutrilite™ acerola cherry 

Key ingredients

  • Vitamin Complex: including vitamin B3, B5, B7, B12 and vitamin C.
  • Moisturising Complex: including hyaluronic acid to help hydrate the skin.
  • Silica and boron nitride: a combination of two special, light-diffusing powders that blur imperfections.

**Clinically tested for heat (40 °C) and humidity (90%) resistance for 30 mins. Based on a third-party study (n=31–32).

Why You Would Like It

Enjoy healthy-looking, seamless skin with a perfectly matte finish for up to 24 hours, knowing your Powder Foundation also nourishes and protects your skin from external aggressors.

Effortlessly blend it onto your face and forget you're wearing it - water, sweat, humidity, or heat won't compromise your look.

2 Ever Perfect Powder Foundation Puffs are included for easy, effective application.

Facts For You

  • 96% agreed the powder foundation feels weightless on the skin*.
  • 94% agreed it gives the skin a smooth appearance*.        
  • 95% agreed that the powder foundation reduces the appearance of oil, immediately after application*. 
     
  • Clean and safe. Made without parabens, phthalates and mineral oil.
  • Dermatologist- and allergy-tested to minimise risk of allergies.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

*study involving 129 participants ages 25-55 who used the foundation for one week
details:
Key Features

  • Light as air, non-drying powder that’s easy to blend into skin
  • Does not crease or cake. Does not settle into fine lines and wrinkles.
  • Suitable for acne-prone skin; non-comedogenic 
  • Contains Moisturising Complex that helps to hydrate the skin.
  • Compact and replaceable Refill system to lower plastic waste and help you save money.
  • 10 shades available. 2 Puffs included with every Refill.

How To Use

How to assemble the Compact and Refill for the first time: 

  • Peel off the transparent sticker on the bottom label of the Refill.
  • Place it into the Compact and press down firmly to secure it.

How to change the Refill: 

  • Remove the used Refill by inserting a pin into the hole on the underside of the Compact to release it.
  • Then follow the same steps as above to insert the new Refill.

How to apply the product:

  • Always complete your Artistry™ skincare routine before beginning your make-up look 
  • Using the puff applicator provided, gently swipe to capture the product. 
  • Tap the powdered side of the puff on the back of your hand to remove excess before using it on the face. 
  • For best results, apply the product in thin layers to the face, blending the formula outward from the centre. 
  • Reapply throughout the day to touch up make-up as desired. 

Once empty, don’t forget to save the compact and use it with foundation refills.

You can use the Ever Perfect Powder Foundation alone for a lighter, breathable make-up, or layer it over your favourite liquid foundation for added coverage and longer wear.

Check our foundations shade chart to mix and match them.

Ingredients

Plant-based ingredients

  • Nutrilite™ pomegranate extract: helps protect the skin against external stressors such as pollution.
  • Backhousia citriodora leaf extract: supports the control and reduction of sebum.
  • Naturally-derived powder (corn starch) 
  • Nutrilite™ acerola cherry 

Key ingredients

  • Vitamin Complex: including vitamin B3, B5, B7, B12 and vitamin C.
  • Moisturising Complex: including hyaluronic acid to help hydrate the skin.
  • Silica and boron nitride: a combination of two special, light-diffusing powders that blur imperfections.
