name: Serum Concealer
description: Multipurpose concealer that covers imperfections and under-eye circles and doubles as a highlighter or contour.
overview:
Multipurpose concealer that covers imperfections and under-eye circles and doubles as a highlighter or contour.

 

What It Does For You

  • Smooths: Reduces the look of dark circles, blemishes, pores, redness and fine lines.
  • Highlights or contours: Use lighter shades to brighten or darker shades to define and sculpt.
  • Lasts long: Provides up to 24 hours of buildable, medium to full coverage.
  • Glides on: Skincare-like formula that feels lightweight and comfortable.
  • Makes you radiant: Creates a natural-looking, airbrushed glow.

Why You Would Like It

Looking for a versatile, long-lasting concealer that also cares for your skin?

This multipurpose product covers imperfections seamlessly while doubling as a highlighter or contour to sculpt your features. 

Easily layer and blend the serum-like texture for full day coverage that also brightens, soothes and nurtures your skin thanks to its skin-loving formula infused with plant-based goodness and Nutrilite™-grown ingredients.

Facts For You

  • Provides effective blemish coverage. After 8 hours of testing, the coverage’s lasting rate was 99%*.
  • 92% agreed the concealer gives a rested look, making the under-eye area appear brighter**.
  • 93% agreed the concealer offers strong coverage**.
  • 91% agreed it reduces the appearance of blemishes***.
     
  • Clean and safe. Made without parabens, phthalates, mineral oil, cyclic silicones, sulfate surfactants, talc and over 1,700 other concerning ingredients.
  • Dermatologist and allergy-tested to minimise risk of allergies.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society.

Third-party clinical testing and consumer perception test
** Study involving 115 participants ages 25-55 who used the concealer for one week
*** Study involving 111 participants ages 25-55 who used the concealer for one week
details:
Key Features

  • Phyto-lamellar liposomes (Phyto-L™ Complex) encapsulated with Nutrilite™ ingredients for brightening and soothing benefits.
  • Includes Nutrilite™ ingredients with skin brightening benefits.
  • Carefully selected pigments enable excellent coverage.
  • Six long-lasting shades.
  • Suitable for all skin types, including acne-prone skin.

How To Use

Swipe or dab the applicator over the skin, then blend using your fingers, a brush or beauty sponge. The specially designed applicator brush glides and applies the formula easily over the curves of the face.

You can use it:

  • As a face concealer: select your skin tone shade and apply to areas of concern.
  • As an under-eye concealer: select your skin tone or 1 shade lighter and gently apply to the area under the eyes.
  • As a highlighter: select 1-2 shades lighter than your skin tone and apply to the brow bone, bridge of the nose, chin, and tops of the cheekbones.
  • For contouring: select 1-2 shades darker than your skin tone and apply to desired areas, such as the hairline, jawline and below the cheekbones.

Always complete your Artistry™ skin care routine before applying make-up. Then, use concealer to cover dark under-eye circles, blemishes, and imperfections, or to highlight and contour. Apply Liquid Foundation for higher coverage, then layer Powder Foundation for fuller coverage and longer wear. For a lighter look, use Powder Foundation alone.

Ingredients

Plant-based ingredients

  • Nutrilite™ pomegranate extract: antioxidant-rich, helps soothe and protect skin from free radicals.
  • Nutrilite™ white chia seed extract: helps calm and soothe the skin.
  • Tea tree leaf oil: helps hydrate, moisturise and brighten the dark under-eye area.
  • Sunflower seed oil.

Key ingredients

  • Escin and caffeine: depuff the look of the eye area.
  • Hydrating ingredients: hyaluronic acid, hydrolysed hyaluronic acid and sodium hyaluronate.
  • Vitamin Complex: including provitamin B5, vitamin B1, B2, B3, B6, B7, B9, vitamin C and vitamin E.

name: Serum Foundation SPF 35 PA++
description: Achieve a flawless, radiant, youthful look with Artistry Future Glow Serum Foundation, packed with skin-loving ingredients and developed with Artistry advanced technology.
overview:
Artistry Future Glow Serum Foundation is the perfect pairing of makeup and skincare in one, combining plant-based ingredients, advanced skincare technology and our proven makeup know-how for a firmer, flawless look.

 

What It Does For You

  • Helps you achieve a firmer, brighter, more-youthful look
  • Creates a Healthy Glow finish for a flawless, healthy appearance, thanks to the rich serum-cream texture and the exclusive patented Brightening Blend.
  • Includes skin-caring skincare ingredients and sheer-to-medium coverage to help address the look of skin imperfections like premature signs of ageing and complexion concerns around skin tone.
  • Effectively delivers key ingredients to skin’s surface thanks to Phyto-L Complex, a plant-derived complex that helps ingredients penetrate into skin.
  • Provides SPF 35 PA++ sunscreen protection, pollution protection and antioxidant benefits to help protect skin from external aggressors.
  • Helps improve skin moisture thanks to the inclusion of Hyaluronic Acid Complex.
  • Lasts for 10 hours and is waterproof, meaning you can wear comfortably and confidently all day without needing to re-apply.

Why You Would Like It

Artistry Future Glow Serum Foundation SPF 35 PA++  is the perfect pairing of makeup and skincare in one. Thanks to naturally derived ingredients and Artistry science, this breakthrough formula cares for both your skin (Youth Care) and your complexion (Complexion Care).

Youth Care is delivered via antioxidant protection and ingredients like Phyto-Collagen and Natural Skin Booster, which contribute to a firmer, smoother look, and are boosted by the proven anti-ageing benefits of sunscreen SPF35 PA++ protection.

Complexion Care comes in the form of skin-loving ingredients that minimise the look of dark spots and uneven skin tone while contributing to a brighter, flawless look.

The innovative formula also includes our exclusive Phyto-L Complex – a plant-derived liposome that helps ingredients like Pomegranate, Rosemary and White Chia Seed penetrate skin's surface and be effectively delivered to the areas where they can have the greatest impact.

Facts For You

Clean formula
The formula used in Artistry Future Glow Serum Foundation SPF 35 PA++ meets Artistry Clean standards, a rigorous set of guidelines that ensures Artistry™ products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Registered with The Vegan Society
  • No mineral oil, parabens, phthalates
  • Fragrance-free
  • Contains no animal-derived ingredients and involves no animal testing.

Consumer testing

TEXTURE

  • 88% said it feels Weightless on the Skin*
  • 90% said it is Comfortable to Wear*
  • 81% said it leaves skin feeling Hydrated*

FINISH

  • 89% said it provides Buildable Coverage*
  • 83% said it gives skin a Healthy Glow*
  • 87% said it is Long-Wearing*

Sustainability
Product packaging carton is printed on FSC-certified paper and is 100% recyclable.
Bottle is recyclable (where appropriate recycling facilities exist)

*After 1 week, in a consumer test of 109 women.
details:
Key Features

Phyto-L Complex.
Technically a ‘liposome’, this serves as a special delivery system that’s designed like protective “bubbles” made of lipid molecules that the skin can recognise and absorb. It effectively delivers key ingredients within skin’s surface.

Youth Care + Complexion Care In One
A foundation formula that supports a youthful appearance while seeking to address any imperfections.

Nutrilite™ -sourced ingredients
Pomegranate Extract, White Chia Seed Extract and Rosemary Extract are sourced from Nutrilite or NutriCert™ partner farms, where sustainable farming methods are practised, and every effort is made to respect the land and communities that inhabit it.

Cover Fit Powder technology
This dual-approach technology delivers more-even and stable colour distribution on skin to ensure a smooth, even finish and long-lasting coverage. The powder particles are designed to blur the look of imperfections like fine lines and wrinkles, without caking or clogging.

Glow Fit System
A special blend of complexion-friendly oils with a high refractive index, meaning it is extra-effective at reflecting light and helps to achieve a flawless, radiant appearance.

Custom Match Technology
An innovative approach that combines the art and the science of colour to make sure there’s a perfect match for people of any skin tone.

Hyaluronic Acid Complex
To help improve skin moisture.

How To Use

  • Before use, shake well—especially if you haven’t used it in a while.
  • Place one or two pumps onto the back of your hand.
  • Using your fingertips or preferred applicator, apply the foundation starting at the centre of the face (or wherever more coverage is needed).
  • Smooth over face, moving outward.
  • Focus on one area at a time and blend well.
  • To build coverage, add a little more foundation.

It’s easy to customise your look by changing your technique:

  • Sheer, Tinted-Moisturiser Effect: Use one pump and your fingertips. Rub the foundation between your fingers first to warm the formula, then apply. Work from the centre of the face, blending outward until smooth. Finish by lightly pressing the formula into skin with fingertips or palms.
  • Dewy Sheer-to-Medium Coverage: Use two pumps and a damp sponge (any shape is fine). Work from the centre of the face to the edges, ‘bouncing’ the foundation onto your skin. Blend outward. Finish by flipping the sponge to the clean side for a final blending pass.
  • Flawless Medium Coverage: Use two pumps and a brush. Apply to cheeks, nose, chin and forehead (in that order), then blend outward. Add more foundation to build coverage. Finish by lightly pressing and blending the formula into skin with your fingertips.

Ingredients

These key ingredients in Artistry Future Glow Serum Foundation SPF 35 PA++ work as part of the overall formula to help the foundation deliver its Youth Care + Complexion Care benefits.

  • Patented* Brightening Blend to help reduce the appearance of hyperpigmentation.
  • Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Extract, known for its calming, soothing benefits.
  • Nutrilite-grown Pomegranate Extract, known for its antioxidant benefits.
  • NutriCert-certified Rosemary Extract to help support the balance of skin’s microbiome.
  • Phyto-Collagen and Natural Skin Booster, derived from plants, plus other carefully selected ingredients to help skin look firmer and smoother.

*U.S. Patent No. 8,685,472 B2

 

INGREDIENTS/INGREDIENTES/SASTOJCI/СОСТАВ/ҚҰРАМЫ: WATER, PHENYL TRIMETHICONE, GLYCERIN, ZINC OXIDE, DIMETHICONE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL DICAPRYLATE/DICAPRATE, ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, TITANIUM DIOXIDE, OCTOCRYLENE, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, CETYL PEG/PPG-10/1 DIMETHICONE,
NIACINAMIDE, HYDROGENATED POLYDECENE, LAURYL PEG-8 DIMETHICONE, METHYL TRIMETHICONE, SODIUM CHLORIDE, SILICA, POLYGLYCERYL-4 ISOSTEARATE, ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, SYNTHETIC BEESWAX, HEXYL LAURATE, POLYGLYCERYL-4 DIISOSTEARATE/POLYHYDROXYSTEARATE/SEBACATE, LIMNANTHES ALBA (MEADOWFOAM) SEED OIL, STEARALKONIUM HECTORITE, DIMETHICONE/VINYL DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER, TRIETHOXYCAPRYLYLSILANE, SORBITAN OLIVATE, STEARIC ACID, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, SODIUM BENZOATE, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, PROPYLENE CARBONATE, ISONONYL ISONONANOATE, HYDROGENATED LECITHIN, POTASSIUM SORBATE, TRISODIUM ETHYLENEDIAMINE DISUCCINATE, GLYCERYL GLUCOSIDE, PROPANEDIOL, ADENOSINE, FRAGRANCE, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED EXTRACT, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, HYDROLYZED COLLAGEN, GLYCINE, ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (ROSEMARY) LEAF EXTRACT, TRIFOLIUM REPENS EXTRACT, PHENOXYETHANOL, HYALURONIC ACID, HYDROLYZED HYALURONIC ACID, SODIUM HYALURONATE, COPPER TRIPEPTIDE-1. MAY CONTAIN +/- TITANIUM DIOXIDE (CI 77891), IRON OXIDES (CI 77492, CI 77491, CI 77499)

name: Sheer Lip Balm
description: Artistry Go Vibrant Sheer Lip Balm - lip-loving nutrients and long-lasting hydration in one stroke. Love your lips with this luxuriously intense moisture balm with plant-derived ingredients: Nutrilite™-grown White Chia Seed, Ginseng Oil, Shea Butter, Sunflower Seed Oil and Aloe Vera Extract.
overview:
Discover healthy beauty with Artistry Go Vibrant Sheer Lip Balm – an advanced conditioning formula with lip-loving ingredients that nourish lip skin from within. The perfect fit for your passion for clean beauty.

 

What It Does For You

  • Packed with lip-loving, plant-based nutrients
  • Hydrating formula leaves lips feeling soft, moisturised and comforted
  • Deep nourishing thanks to Nutrilite™-grown White Chia Seed, Ginseng Oil, Shea Butter, Sunflower Seed Oil and Aloe Vera Extract.

Artistry Go Vibrant Sheer Lip Balm is infused with lip-loving ingredients such as Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed, Ginseng Oil, Shea Butter, Sunflower Seed Oil and Aloe Vera Extract.

Vegan and fragrance-free! The Artistry Go Vibrant Sheer Lip Balm gives you intense moisture and long-lasting hydration, for lips that feel healthy, soft, and comfortable. 

Facts For You

Formulated with Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed, Ginseng Oil, Shea Butter, Sunflower Seed Oil and Aloe Vera Extract.

  • Meets Artistry™ Clean Beauty standards:
  • Formulated with no parabens
  • Free from animal derived ingredients
  • Dermatologically-tested
  • Allergy-tested

details:
Key Features

  • Lip-loving formula brings together a carefully selected blend of ingredients that nourish lip skin from within. Infused with White Chia Seed Oil, Ginseng Oil, Shea Butter, Sunflower Seed Oil and Aloe Vera Extract.
  • Contains no animal-derived ingredients; registered with the Vegan Society. No animal testing.

  • Starting at the centre of the top lip, apply moving out toward the corner. Repeat on bottom lip. Follow the natural shape of your lip.
  • Apply any time, throughout the day. Apply before bed for a night time moisture boost.

  • Ginseng Oil
  • Shea Butter
  • Sunflower Seed Oil
  • Aloe Vera Extract

name: Waterproof Brow Pencil & Tinted Gel
description: Shape your best brow look with this 2-in-1 Waterproof Brow Pencil + Tinted Gel that defines, colours and effortlessly contours brows.
overview:
2-in-1 Waterproof Brow Pencil + Tinted Gel infused with naturally derived ingredients for a defined and impactful brow look that lasts 10 hours and won’t smudge or transfer.

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides natural, soft colour.
  • Sets brows in place while leaving a natural, healthy-looking tint.
  • Enables precision application thanks to the pencil’s ingenious triangle tip, which works from multiple angles, while the short brush for gel is angled for high precision when applying.
  • Lasts all day (10 hours).
  • Stands up to water (pencil), smudging and unintentional transfer (pencil and gel) making it great for active lifestyles.
  • Strokes on easily, thanks to a creamy formula for the pencil and a gel formula that dries quickly.
  • Provides skin- and hair-loving ingredients that help make your brows look healthy and beautiful.

Why You Would Like It

Brows shape the face and frame every eye look, so you want them to be just right. Shaped to perfection. Filled in with natural, soft colour that creates the definition you want. And firmly set in place to last all day.

Now, have it all with this two-in-one Waterproof Brow Pencil & Tinted Gel from the Artistry Go Vibrant collection. The waterproof (pencil only) smudge-proof and transfer-proof formulas create a defined brow look that lasts 10 hours.

Containing skin- and hair-loving ingredients like Nutrilite™ Pomegranate extract, a custom vitamin complex (E, C and Biotin) and naturally derived botanical oils and Carnauba wax, the formulas strike the perfect balance between science and nature. With Artistry™ products, you know you can feel good about what you’re putting on your skin. This is beauty without compromise – the perfect mix for your makeup-loving style and clean-seeking lifestyle.

Pick from three shades colours – True Black, Taupe or Dark Brown – to achieve your unique, flawless look.

Facts For You

Clean formula
The formula used in Artistry Go Vibrant Waterproof Brow Pencil & Tinted Gel meet Artistry Clean standards, a rigorous set of guidelines that ensures Artistry™ products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Registered with The Vegan Society
  • No mineral oil, parabens, phthalates

details:
Key Features

Innovative 2-in-1 format
Pencil and gel with applicator brush in a single format makes it easy to take this beauty tool with you and achieve your desired definition wherever you are, whenever you need to.  

Nutrilite-sourced ingredients
Ingredients like Pomegranate Extract are sourced from Nutrilite or NutriCert™ partner farms, where sustainable farming methods are practised, and every effort is made to respect the land and communities that inhabit it.

Custom Vitamin Complex
With Vitamins E and C, plus Biotin (Vitamin H), and enhanced with a pro-moisture blend including Hyaluronic Acid and Ceramide.
 
Naturally derived botanical oil and Carnauba wax
Form a waterproof film that sets colour and moisture within each stand of brow (pencil only).

How To Use

Start with the triangular-shaped pencil to fill, colour and define, as desired.

  • Use the full tip of the pencil for broad filling and colouring-in of your brow.
  • Use the pointed edge to define the outer end, or tail, of each brow.

Next, apply the gel to tint your brows and set them in place.

  • First brush toward the nose (opposite of hair growth) to deposit colour and add texture.
  • Then brush up and out (following the direction of hair growth) to create your desired brow shape and set brows in place.

Or, just use either the pencil or gel, depending on your mood and to achieve a specific look for your brows.

Ingredients

Key ingredients for healthy beauty

  • Nutrilite Pomegranate Extract, to help provide antioxidant benefits.
  • Custom Vitamin Complex with Vitamins E and C, plus Biotin (Vitamin H), enhanced with a pro-moisture blend that includes Hyaluronic Acid and Ceramide.
  • Naturally derived botanical oil and Carnauba wax form a waterproof film that sets colour and moisture within each strand of your brows (pencil only).

name: Waterproof Length Serum Mascara
description: Experience Healthy Beauty on every lash with a clean-formulated serum mascara that cares for your lashes while making them look longer and more defined.
overview:
Enjoy lovely long-looking, naturally defined lashes all day with this waterproof, smudge-proof and non-flaking serum mascara, packed with plant-based ingredients.

 

What It Does For You

Why You Would Like It

Enjoy longer-looking lashes and a natural defined look with Artistry Go Vibrant Waterproof Length Serum Mascara. Good for all-day wear (10 hours), the waterproof formula stands up to rain, sweat and tears without smearing. And because it’s clump-proof, flake-proof and smudge-proof, you can apply it with minimum effort and wear it with maximum enjoyment and confidence.
 
The special crescent brush lifts and curls lashes for an overall lengthened look and makes it possible to customise application of the mascara for any eye look.

The Serum Mascara formula contains a custom vitamin complex (E, F & C), botanical seed oils (Jojoba, Grape and Macadamia Ternifolia), and Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Extract, which is known for its calming and soothing benefits. These are just some of the safe, effective ingredients that you can find in the Artistry Clean formula and mean you can feel confident and comfortable about what you put on your lashes. This is beauty without compromise – perfect for your makeup-loving style and clean-seeking lifestyle.

Facts For You

Clean formula
The formula used in Artistry Go Vibrant Waterproof Length Serum Mascara meets Artistry Clean standards, a rigorous set of guidelines that ensures Artistry™ products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Registered with The Vegan Society
  • No mineral oil, parabens, phthalates
  • Fragrance-free

Formulated with No Carbon Black. This clean formula sets Artistry Go Vibrant Waterproof Length Serum Mascara apart from mascaras that use Carbon Black.

details:
Key Features

Plant-derived Phyto-Proof Complex
To help the formula deliver waterproof, smudge-proof, transfer-proof wear. Containing a plant-derived fibre and a botanical setting agent, Phyto-Proof Complex sets into a waterproof matrix on the surface of each lash.

Unique crescent curved brush
The specially designed crescent curved brush features carefully selected fibre and is designed to coat each lash from root to tip, providing an even application with exceptional separation and definition. The outside of the crescent has longer bristles to separate each lash, while the bristles on the inside of the crescent lay down more formula and help enhance the lengthening effect.

How To Use

For upper lashes,

  • Hold the wand horizontally and sweep on from root to tip.
  • Use a down/up motion with every stroke.
  • Don’t zig zag.

For a natural, defined look, apply the mascara with the crescent curved side up. The outside of the crescent has longer bristles to separate each lash.

For maximum effect, apply the mascara with the concave curved side up. The inside of the crescent lays down more formula and helps enhance the lengthening effect.

For lower lashes,

  • Hold the wand vertically and use the tip to coat lashes.
  • Wait a few seconds for the formula to set before you blink.
  • Remove the mascara with Artistry Skin Nutrition Cream Makeup Remover or Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser

Ingredients

Key ingredients for healthy beauty

  • Nutrilite White Chia Seed Extract, known for its calming, soothing benefits –included for the delicate eye skin near the lashes.
  • Custom Vitamin Complex with Vitamins E, F and C.
  • Curated Botanical Seed Oils including Jojoba Seed Oil, Grape Seed Oil and Macadamia Ternifolia Seed oil.
  • Phyto-Proof Complex, for plant-based waterproofing.

name: Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum
description: High-performance brightening serum that fights visible lines and wrinkles, and plumps the look of skin
overview:
Skin serum that is packed with vitamin C, powerful antioxidants and 3 types of hyaluronic acid (HA)

 

What It Does For You

  • Dramatically brightens skin and reveals a more even-toned, radiantly healthy look
  • Visibly reduces the look of lines, wrinkles and expression lines, and plumps skin with hydration
  • Provides powerful antioxidant protection to help prevent visible damage caused by environmental aggressors

  • Complements the beneficial effects of your Artistry Skin Nutrition moisturiser

Why You Would Like It

Artistry Skin Nutrition Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum is a high-performance, multi-benefit brightening serum that fights visible lines and wrinkles, and plumps your skin with every fresh drop, leaving it looking and feeling its healthy best.

Building on the success of the previous formula, Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum is better than ever. Compared to the previous product, the upgraded formula delivers:

  • 2X more Vitamin C (now 10%)
  • 2.4X more antioxidant power
  • 3 types of Hyaluronic Acid for more hydration
  • Nutrilite™-grown White Chia Seed
  • Formula developed according to Artistry™ Clean Beauty standards
  • Faster results

Facts For You

CONSUMERS LOVED DAILY SERUM

  • After just one use, 83% said it makes skin look brighter, with a youthful radiance
  • In just 5 days, 84% said it brightened their skin and 8 out of 10 said it leaves skin looking more even toned
  • With just one bottle, 87% said it helped their skin look and feel its healthy best.
details:
Check out the Amway Tracing tool

Key Features

  • This super-enriched Artistry Skin Nutrition formula includes 10% Vitamin C – the highest-ever concentration in an Artistry formula. It’s an ingenious blend of 100% Pure Vitamin C housed in an innovative Activating Cap, as well as phytonutrient-enhanced Vitamin C from Nutrilite-grown Acerola Cherry Extract in the serum.
  • Contains the highest-ever concentration of Hyaluronic Acid (HA) in an Artistry formula. The carefully constructed Artistry HA3 Triple Hyaluronic Acid Fusion works on multiple levels to address the natural loss of HA that can emphasise the look of lines and wrinkles and the loss of elasticity and firmness.
  • Features a Line-Smoothing Peptide Blend that contains two proven peptides to help neutralise the effects of facial movements on creating future lines – helping protect skin against micro-stresses and helping slow the transition of expressions into visible lines.
  • Contains White Chia Seed grown on our own sustainable Nutrilite farm. Regarded as one of nature’s richest superfoods, White Chia Seed Liposome delivers skin-boosting benefits deep within skin’s surface. This helps the serum strengthen the skin’s vital moisture barrier and maintain moisture levels, which is imperative for healthy-looking skin.
  • Follows the Artistry Clean philosophy, which means it’s registered with The Vegan Society, free from animal-derived ingredients, is not tested on animals and is formulated with no mineral oil, no parabens, no phthalates, no sulfate surfactants and no cyclic silicones. In short, it’s formulated to be kind to your skin and the planet.

How To Use

  1. Before first use, follow the instructions to activate the product.
  2. Apply every morning and evening after cleansing and toning your skin.
  3. Place 4-5 drops of the activated Daily Serum onto the palm, then apply to face with fingertips.
  4. Apply all over, while avoiding direct contact with eyes.
  5. Follow with other treatment serums as desired, and your moisturiser.

Ingredients

  • Vitamin C helps brighten, firm, and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and provide antioxidant protection
  • HA3 Triple Hyaluronic Acid Fusion to address the natural loss of HA that can emphasize the look of lines and wrinkles
  • Line-Smoothing Peptide Blend to help protect skin against micro-stresses and slow the transition of expressions into visible lines
  • White Chia Seed to address oiliness and dryness/tightness, and to strengthen the skin’s vital moisture barrier and maintain moisture levels.

overview:
PROTEIN PEPTIDE RICH SERUMS FOR AGELESS SKIN

This lightweight, fast-absorbing serum provides plant-derived peptides and other powerful phytonutrients that target the leading signs of premature skin ageing, helping skin to look and feel younger and healthier.

 

What It Does For You

  1. 10 Healthy Skin Benefits in 1. scientifically proven to address 10 signs of ageing, resulting in visibly younger-, healthy-looking skin in just 1 week.
  2. NEW INGREDIENT TECHNOLOGY Featuring new ingredients like amino acids with pore reduction technology which diminishes the appearance of pores while essential proteins help skin feel more elastic.
  3. VISIBLE RESULTS INSTANTLY HYDRATES AND SMOOTHS SKIN AND DIMINISHES THE APPEARANCE OF FINE LINES The look of pores reduced in just 1 week. Results continue to improve over time.

10 BENEFITS IN 1

  1. Supports the skin's natural barrier
  2. Hydrates and plumps the skin
  3. Improves radiance
  4. Minimises the appearance of pores
  5. Helps to reduce fine lines
  6. Promotes natural skin exfoliation
  7. Provides antioxidant protection.
  8. Even my skin tone
  9. Improves the appearance of sallowness
  10. - Soothes and hydrates skin.

Why You Would Like It

The Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum helps to delay and diminish early signs of ageing thanks to the perfect blend of science and nature.

Powerful phytonutrients and plant-based peptides protect and help renewing skin´s proteins like collagen and elastin while deeply hydrating skin for a healthier and radiant complexion.

The Nutrilite-sourced White Chia Protein Peptide provides powerful antioxidant protection against environmental aggressors, while the White Chia Liposome strengthens the skin moisture barrier.


Get your multi-tasking serum to target and visibly reduce early signs of ageing!

Facts For You

Clean formula
The Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum formula meets Artistry Clean standards, a rigorous set of guidelines that ensures Artistry™ products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Registered by the Vegan Society*
  • No animal testing.
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Dermatologically and Allergy tested to minimise the risk of allergies
  • For all skin types (normal, oily, combination, dry)

Safe for sensitive and acne prone skin.

Sustainability
Pump package made with 30% post-consumer resin (PCR) material.  

Defying Serum
After 1 use

  • 65%1 immediate improvement to skin’s moisture barrier function
  • 162%1 immediate increase in skin’s moisture level

After 8 weeks

  • 91%2 of study outcomes indicated improvement to skin’s overall appearance
  • 100%2 of study outcomes revealed improvement in skin’s radiance

In-use study

  • 88%3 agreed that the serum helps minimise the appearance of pores
  • 86%3 recognised that the serum helps minimise the appearance of fine lines immediately after application
  • 96%3 affirmed that the serum leaves (face&neck) skin feeling smooth
  • 95%3 agreed that the serum leaves skin looking and feeling more supple

1 Based on Clinical Moisturisation & TEWL Study (AIM Lab Study). Individual results may vary
2 Based on a clinical evaluation of 37 women after 8 weeks of use in a Clinical Grading (Validated Claim Support Study). Individual results may vary.
3 Based on Consumer Perception (CSS/datatelligence Study): 88% of panelists agreed at Week 2, n=120; 86% of panelists agreed at Week 12, n=110; 96% of panelists agreed at Week 2, n=120; 95% of panelists agreed at Week 4, n=120.

 

Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum + Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Vitamin C+HA3:  Pairing the Defying Serum ingredients with Artistry Skin Nutrition Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum helps protect the skin from the external stressors that contribute to early signs of skin ageing – works 55% better than just using Artistry Skin Nutrition Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum alone.

Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum + Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Moisturisers: Prevent Complex Booster
Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum was specifically designed to work in tandem with Skin Nutrition Hydrating Moisturisers to create a powerful Prevent Complex Booster, increasing skin’s natural defence system by 378%.

*In vitro testing

**In vitro testing of Defying Serum ingredients and Prevent Complex (found in Skin Nutrition Balancing and Hydrating Moisturisers).

Defying Serum’s powerful phytonutrient blend combined with the Prevent Complex found in Skin Nutrition Hydrating Moisturisers is shown to help reduce skin stress from pollution by 96%.**

**In vitro testing of Defying Serum ingredients and the Prevent Complex.
 

When you know what ingredients go into our products, you can trust what goes on your skin!

  • We say NO to harsh chemicals, focusing on gentler alternatives.
  • We say YES to only ingredients that are good for your skin: like white chia seed, pomegranate, spinach, acerola cherries, aloe vera, and more.
details:
Check out the Amway Tracing tool

Key Features

Key Phytonutrients *Nutrilite™ Exclusive Phytonutrients

  • White Chia Protein Peptide* Soothes skin while providing powerful antioxidant protection against environmental aggressors
  • White Chia Liposome* Repairs and strengthens skin barrier
  • Olive Extract Boosts radiance and diminishes appearance of fine lines
  • Glycoprotein Complex Evens tone, smooths texture and locks in moisture
  • Amino Acids Naturally derived Copper and L-proline combined with pore reduction technology to minimise the appearance of pores, diminish the look of fine lines and support collagen to improve the feel of elasticity.
  • Japanese Plum helps maintain skin’s resilience, improve the feel of elasticity and even tone while helping reduce the appearance of sallowness / yellowness
  • White Willow Bark & Lactic Acid Complex This power duo helps encourage gentle exfoliation and supports healthy skin renewal
  • Holy Basil delivers calming and antioxidant benefits, helping

TOP NOTE: Tonic, Bergamot | Mid Notes: Green tea, Jasmine, Oak Moss | Base Notes: Clean Woods, Musk, Amber

Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum shares the same delightful scent as the cleansers, toners, and moisturisers in Skin Nutrition Hydrating line.

All Artistry Skin Nutrition™ fragrances were custom created to blend beautifully, so you can easily incorporate the Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum into your personalised routine.

How To Use

  1. Cleanse and Tone: Start with a clean face by cleansing and toning your skin.
  2. Dispense Serum: Pump 3 pumps onto your fingertips.
  3. Apply: Gently massage the serum onto your face and neck, avoiding the eye area.
  4. Frequency: Use morning and evening for optimal results.
  5. Moisturise Follow with your favourite moisturiser.
  6. Discontinue if Irritated: If you experience persistent irritation, stop using the product.

Recommended Routine
Prep: Set the stage with any Artistry Skin Nutrition™ cleanser and toner.

Treat Pre-Treat with Artistry Skin Nutrition™ VC+HA3 Daily Serum, then Treat with Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Defying Serum.

Moisturise and Protect (Day): Moisturise with any Artistry Skin Nutrition™ SPF Moisturiser and Eye Cream.

Moisturise and nourish (Night): Moisturise skin with any non-SPF Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Moisturiser and Eye Cream. Follow with Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Sleeping Mask for ultimate relaxation and skin barrier support.

Ingredients

name: Rich Cream
description: A rejuvenating rich cream that delivers a gravity-defying lift for firmer skin with defined contours.
overview:
Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream is our most advanced moisturiser, supporting the skin’s natural vitality and renewal to help reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles, dark spots and help improve the appearance of sagging, texture, and crepiness. 

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides a gravity-defying lift, visibly softening deep wrinkles for firm skin with more defined contours.
  • Energises skin’s renewal process, helping to remove age related energy-stealing “zombie” cells for a rejuvenated appearance.
  • Moisturises skin for 24 hours, leaving it plumped with hydration.
  • Instantly improves the look of radiance and brightness. 
  • Helps improve the look of texture and dark spots.

Why You Would Like It

Cellular Vitality – The future of your skin.

The Artistry LongXevity collection supports your skin’s natural renewal cycle, helping it repair, hydrate, and boost collagen for a visibly younger, firmer look. With over 30 newly selected ingredients and more Nutriway™ botanicals than any Artistry™ skincare product before - including Milk Thistle, White Chia Seed Oil, Spinach, and Acerola Cherry - this collection blends the power of nature and science. Clinically shown to make skin look up to 17 years younger,1 it’s your complete solution for radiant, resilient skin at any age.

1Based on a clinical study (Cutometer Analysis, n=33, ages 35–64), many participants showed skin characteristics comparable to up to 17 years younger. Individual results may vary.

Facts For You

  • Meets Artistry Clean Beauty Guidelines (Vegan, No animal testing).
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested.
  • Non-comedogenic.
  • Suitable for all skin types and tones - ideal for dry to very dry skin.
  • Features packaging with post-consumer recycled (PCR) material.
  • Key ingredients like Milk Thistle are sustainably sourced from NutriCert™ certified farms.

Backed by clinical results and customer perception study to deliver visible skin transformation:

  • +157% improvement of the Vitality and Resilience Index.2
  • 98% of users say it leaves skin looking smooth and feeling soft immediately.3
  • 86% of users say it helps skin look younger after 3 days.3
  • 87% of users say skin feels firmer after 1 week.3
  • 85% of users say it helps reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles in 2 weeks.3
  • 83% of users say it helps jawline appear more angled and defined in 8 weeks.3

2The Vitality and Resilience Index is defined as “a measure of various factors associated with healthy-looking and resilient skin for the Face and Eye Creams”. Based on an in vitro gene expression analysis (Bioassay Study RPT-CS-25021; Attachment 043). Rich Cream upregulated genes linked to skin vitality and resilience by 157% vs. untreated control. Individual results may vary.
3Based on a consumer perception study (CSS/Datatelligence Study 76123A) with participants aged 40–60 (n=112–125). Reported after 3 days to 8 weeks of Rich Cream use. Consumer perception results. Individual experiences may vary.
details:
How To Use

Apply pearl-sized amount of Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream to the face and neck using upward motions. Avoid contact with eyes. 

For best results, use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare ritual to help combat visible signs of ageing at the cellular level. 

  • Start by cleansing with any Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Cleanser.
  • Next, apply Artistry LongXevity Toner Essence.
  • Follow with your favorite Artistry Skin Nutrition Serum. 
  • Apply Artistry LongXevity Eye Cream around the delicate eye area.
  • Then apply Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream.
  • In the morning, always finish with an Artistry Skin Nutrition SPF product.
  • Take your skincare routine to the next level with Artistry Derma Architect device to get the most out of the Artistry products.

Ingredients

  • Milk Thistle from NutriCert™ farms - firms, soothes, brightens and protects skin. 
  • Plant-Based Stem Cell Blend - energises and re-densifies skin.
  • Gingko Biloba - removes energy-stealing and age-related “zombie” cells, revealing a rejuvenated appearance.
  • 24K Gold & Diamond Powder - diffuses light to soften the look of wrinkles and enhance skin’s luminosity.
  • Summer Snowflake Extract - helps reduce the appearance of wrinkles for smoother, more youthful-looking skin. 
  • Peony Extract - provides a fuller and plumping effect.
  • Cardiolipin + Olive Leaf Stem Cells + Glycogen - helps recharge cellular energy to increase the look of firmness and decrease look of wrinkles.
  • Mastic Resin Liposome - helps preserve natural radiance and support skin’s rejuvenating appearance.
  • Japonica Leaf Extract - delivers a gravity-defying lift for firmer, more sculpted contours.
  • Spinach - helps soothe the skin.
  • Argan Stem Cells - helps support skin cell wellness.
  • Nutriway-grown White Chia Seed Oil/ Omega Liposome - Moisturisation and help strengthen and support the skin’s natural barrier.
  • Nutriway-grown Acerola Cherry - high antioxidant value, rich in vitamin C.

name: Eye Cream
description: 360 degrees of eye care to help reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles and undereye puffiness.
overview:
Artistry LongXevity™ Eye Cream is a gentle yet powerful eye cream that hydrates for 24 hours while targeting wrinkles, puffiness, and dark circles for a visibly smoother, firmer, and more youthful appearance.

 

What It Does For You

  • Visibly helps reduce puffiness and crepiness for a fresher, more rested appearance. 
  • Instantly smooths the look of fine lines and brightens the entire eye area.
  • Softens the appearance of deep wrinkles and lifts sagging skin.
  • Helps reduce the appearance of three types of undereye discoloration for a more even skin tone. 
  • Creates a smooth, hydrated base perfect for seamless eye make-up application.

Why You Would Like It

Cellular Vitality – The future of your skin.

The Artistry LongXevity collection supports your skin’s natural renewal cycle, helping it repair, hydrate, and boost collagen for a visibly younger, firmer look. With over 30 newly selected ingredients and more Nutriway™ botanicals than any Artistry™ skincare product before - including Milk Thistle, White Chia Seed Oil, Spinach, and Acerola Cherry - this collection blends the power of nature and science. Clinically shown to make skin look up to 17 years younger,1 it’s your complete solution for radiant, resilient skin at any age.

1Based on a clinical study (Cutometer Analysis, n=33, ages 35–64), many participants showed skin characteristics comparable to up to 17 years younger. Individual results may vary.

Facts For You

  • Meets Artistry Clean Beauty Guidelines (Vegan, No animal testing).
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested.
  • Suitable for all skin tones and types – from normal, oily to combination skin types.
  • Features packaging with post-consumer recycled (PCR) material.
  • Key ingredients like Milk Thistle are sustainably sourced from NutriCert™ certified farms.

Backed by clinical results and consumer perception study to deliver visible skin transformation:

  • +157% improvement of the Vitality and Resilience Index.2
  • 81% of users say it helps give eyes a lifted look in 1 week.3
  • 79% of users say it reduces the look of fine lines immediately.4
  • 83% of users say it helps reduce the look of under-eye puffiness in 3 days.4
  • 81% of users say it helps reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles after 2 weeks.4

2The Vitality and Resilience Index is defined as “a measure of various factors associated with healthy-looking and resilient skin for the Face and Eye Creams”. Based on an in vitro gene expression analysis (Bioassay Study RPT-CS-25021; Attachment 043). Eye Cream upregulated genes linked to skin vitality and resilience by 157% vs. untreated control. Individual results may vary.
3After 1 Week Use: In a consumer perception study (CSS/datatelligence Study 76123C, n=121, ages 40–60).
4Based on a consumer perception study (CSS/Datatelligence Study 76123C). Individual experiences may vary.
details:
How To Use

Dispense one pump of Artistry LongXevity Eye Cream onto your ring finger and gently apply to both upper and lower eye areas. Using a soft 360° tapping motion, move from the inner corner outward and around the entire eye contour. Avoid rubbing or pulling. 

For best results, use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare ritual to help combat visible signs of ageing at the cellular level. 

  • Start by cleansing with any Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Cleanser.
  • Next, apply Artistry LongXevity Toner Essence.
  • Follow with your favorite Artistry Skin Nutrition Serum.
  • Apply Artistry LongXevity Eye Cream around the delicate eye area.
  • Then apply Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream.
  • In the morning, always finish with an Artistry Skin Nutrition SPF product.
  • Take your skincare routine to the next level with Artistry Derma Architect device to get the most out of the Artistry products.

Ingredients

  • Milk Thistle from NutriCert™ farms - firms, soothes, brightens and protects skin.
  • Plant-Based Stem Cell Blend - energises and re-densifies skin.
  • Caffeine Blend - helps reduce the appearance of three types of undereye discoloration: yellow/ brown, red and blue.
  • Gingko Biloba - removes energy-stealing and age-related “zombie” cells, revealing a rejuvenated appearance.
  • 24K Gold & Diamond Powder - diffuses light to soften the look of wrinkles and enhance skin’s luminosity.
  • Mastic Resin Liposome - helps preserve natural radiance while supporting skin’s rejuvenating appearance.
  • Japonica Leaf Extract - delivers a gravity-defying lift to the skin.
  • White Lupine & Alfalfa - helps reduce puffiness and tones the undereye area. 
  • Cardiolipin + Olive Leaf Stem Cells + Glycogen - helps recharge cellular energy to increase the look of firmness and decrease the look of wrinkles.
  • Nutriway-grown White Chia Seed Oil/ Omega Liposome - Moisturisation and help strengthen and support the skin’s natural barrier.

name: Toner Essence
description: “Liquid gold-like” formula helps improve the look of fine lines, texture and radiance.
overview:
Artistry LongXevity™ Toner Essence is far more than just a toner - it’s your daily glow boost! Based on 20 years of research on cellular processes, this lightweight formula immediately increases moisture level by 358%,1 smooths the looks of fine lines and refreshes dull, stressed skin. 

1Based on AIM Lab Study RPT-008-24-ASC-A; n=30, aged 21–59. Individual results may vary.

 

What It Does For You

  • Reduces the look of skin fatigue and refines skin’s clarity.
  • Visibly improves the look of fine lines and evens out rough texture.
  • Boosts skin’s radiance and resilience over time.
  • Plumps skin with hydration.
  • Boosts the penetration of Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream by more than 5 times (430%).2
  • Contains ingredients to help protect against environmental damage.

2Based on in vitro skin penetration assay (Bioassay Study RPT-CS-5,004). For informational purposes only.

Why You Would Like It

Cellular Vitality – The future of your skin.

The Artistry LongXevity collection supports your skin’s natural renewal cycle, helping it repair, hydrate, and boost collagen for a visibly younger, firmer look. With over 30 newly selected ingredients and more Nutrilite™ botanicals than any Artistry™ skincare product before - including Milk Thistle, White Chia Seed Oil, Spinach, and Acerola Cherry - this collection blends the power of nature and science. Clinically shown to make skin look up to 17 years younger,3 it’s your complete solution for radiant, resilient skin at any age.

3Based on a clinical study (Cutometer Analysis, n=33, ages 35–64), many participants showed skin characteristics comparable to up to 17 years younger. Individual results may vary.

Facts For You

  • Meets Artistry Clean Beauty Guidelines (Vegan, No animal testing).
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested.
  • Non-comedogenic.
  • Features packaging with post-consumer recycled (PCR) material.
  • Key botanical ingredients like Milk Thistle are sustainably sourced from NutriCert™ certified farms.

Backed by clinical results and customer perception study to deliver visible skin transformation:

  • +410% improvement on the Artistry Skin Vitality and Resilience Index,4 when paired with the Rich Cream.
  • 90% of users say it immediately gives skin a healthy-looking glow.5 
  • 91% of users say it refines the look of skin texture in 3 days.5
  • 88% of users say it reduces fine lines due to dryness in 3 days.5

4The Vitality and Resilience Index is defined as “a measure of various factors associated with healthy-looking and resilient skin for the Face and Eye Creams”. Based on an in vitro gene expression analysis (Bioassay Study RPT-CS-25021; Attachment 040). Individual results may vary.

5Based on a consumer perception study (CSS/Datatelligence Study 76123D). Individual experiences may vary.
details:
How To Use

Shake well before use. Pour two to four shakes into your hand, press your palms together to distribute the product, then gently smooth, press, and massage over your face and neck for even coverage. Avoid contact with eyes.

For best results, use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare ritual to help combat visible signs of ageing at the cellular level. 

  • Start by cleansing with any Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Cleanser.
  • Next, apply Artistry LongXevity Toner Essence.
  • Follow with your favorite Artistry Skin Nutrition Serum.
  • Apply Artistry LongXevity Eye Cream around the delicate eye area.
  • Then apply Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream.
  • In the morning, always finish with an Artistry Skin Nutrition SPF product.

name: Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+
description: The ultimate protection from the sun (SPF 50+ PA++++), pollution and so much more.
overview:
Shield your skin from every angle with this lightweight, water-resistant (up to 80 minutes) facial lotion that meets the highest sunscreen standard and goes beyond, protecting you from UVA and UVB rays, blue and infrared lights, pollution and free radicals.

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides very high sun protection with SPF 50+/PA++++, meeting the highest standards for its category.
  • More than just a sunscreen, it offers broad-spectrum defense against UVA/UVB rays, as well as blue light and infrared light—factors that contribute to daily skin ageing from both sun exposure and our screen-filled world.
  • Delivers all-day, time-release antioxidant protection against pollution, ozone and smoke, and strengthens the barrier against dry, over-air-conditioned areas like offices, stores and airplanes.
  • Helps prevent dullness, lines/wrinkles, spots and other early signs of ageing by boosting the skin’s ability to protect itself by 350%* with the advanced Prevent Complex.
  • Allows you to swim and enjoy other water activities freely with its up to 80-minute water-resistant formula.

*Based on in vitro studies demonstrating a 350% promotion of oxidative stress defenses through activation of the Nrf2-ARE pathway, supporting the skin's ability to protect itself.

Why You Would Like It

The sun is not the only stressor on your skin. Scientists believe that photodamage (caused by UVA and UVB rays, blue light and infrared light) and oxidative damage from free radicals may lead to around 80% of the signs of premature ageing and unhealthy-looking skin**.
Therefore, wearing multi-aspect sunscreen with antioxidants, is essential all year round!

Packed with naturally-sourced and plant-derived ingredients, Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+ amplifies your existing Artistry Skin Nutrition™ regimen:

  • Meets the highest sunscreen standards, providing 'Full Light' protection through a combination of carefully selected UV filters and Carnosine.
  • Contains 5X antioxidant ingredients, many of which are phytonutrients derived from plants, to defend your skin from different free radicals and give you the holistic power of some of Nature's best nutrients.

Thus, by shielding you in multiple ways, this lotion protects a more healthy-looking future for the skin, preventing signs of ageing and keeping it looking and feeling younger.

The beautiful, silky-light texture glides over skin and absorbs quickly and invisibly, yet leaves a nice, lightly moisturised after-feel. The formula works without dulling or clouding your natural skin tone, primes skin for makeup application and removes easily with any cleanser.

**Source: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24101874/

Facts For You

The Skin Cancer Foundation recommends this product as an effective broad spectrum sunscreen.***

Consumers loved Artistry Skin Nutrition Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+
In consumer testing, women said:

  • It helps make skin feel protected more than ever
  • It feels hydrating
  • It absorbs quickly and looks invisible
  • It blends in completely without leaving any white residue

This product is dermatologically and allergy tested and clinically shown to be gentle and mild. It is suitable for all skin types (normal, oily, combination, dry).

It contains phytonutrients grown on our own Nutrilite™ or partner farms, with sustainable farming practices that respect the environment and the farming communities.

Artistry™ Clean formulated:

  • NO Mineral Oil, Parabens, Phthalates, Sulfate Surfactants, Cylic Silicones
  • Non-comedogenic, won’t cause clogged or blocked pores
  • Registered with The Vegan Society, free from animal-derived ingredients, no animal testing

Zero Reef Ravagers:
Without Oxybenzone and Octinoxate, ingredients that are often under scrutiny for their potential harm to coral reef ecosystems while still providing reliable sun protection.

***The Skin Cancer Foundation grants the seal of recommendation to products that meet the criteria and standards established by The Skin Cancer Foundation’s Photobiology Committee based on scientific material submitted to The Skin Cancer Foundation. For more information, visit Skincancer.org.
details:
How To Use

Apply evenly to face and neck daily avoiding the eye area.

Use Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+ as the last step in your morning regimen.

  1. Cleanse and tone using any Artistry Skin Nutrition cleanser and toner
  2. Pre-Treat using Artistry Skin Nutrition Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum
  3. Treat the skin with Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying or Correcting Serums
  4. Moisturise using any Artistry Skin Nutrition Face and Eye Cream*
  5. Protect: complete your skincare routine with Artistry Skin Nutrition Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+

You can continue using your existing Artistry Skin Nutrition moisturiser with SPF 30 but also combine with Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+ for enhanced protection. Our SPF 30 moisturisers offer targeted skincare benefits, while Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+ focuses on advanced sun protection and antioxidant defense. (Note that SPF values do not add together; the higher number indicates your level of protection.)

*While Multi-Defense UV Protect SPF 50+ offers some moisturising benefits, it may not provide the full spectrum of benefits offered by our Artistry Skin Nutrition moisturisers.

Ingredients

FROM SCIENCE

  • Multi-Filter Blend: a blend of the 5 best sunscreen ingredients to deliver broad spectrum protection against UVA and UVB rays with the highest SPF and PA rating.
  • Carnosine Peptide: helps address the visible effects of damage from blue light and infrared light, and has powerful antioxidant properties.

FROM NATURE

  • Artistry Skin Nutrition Prevent Complex: crafted from Australian Daisy, Blackberry Extract and our traceable ingredient Nutrilite™-grown Acerola Cherry; together they enhance the skin’s ability to protect itself by 350%**, helping to delay the appearance of visible signs of ageing.
  • Nutrilite-grown Pomegranate: traceable ingredient, it provides powerful antioxidant protection and has the extraordinary ability to combat irritation from 6 major types of pollution, soothing and protecting the skin.
  • Cica Extract: included in a sustained release delivery system to offer 8-hour, all-day antioxidant protection; it’s a phytonutrient derived from a flowering plant.
  • Chrysanthemum Morifolium Flower Extract: it’s an antioxidant that helps protect the skin against damage from free radicals and environmental insults to prevent visible signs of ageing, including dullness, wrinkles, and dark spots.
  • Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed: traceable ingredient, it delivers skin-boosting benefits deep within the skin’s surface, helping strengthen its vital moisture barrier and maintain moisture levels, which is imperative for healthy-looking skin.

**Based on in vitro studies demonstrating a 350% promotion of oxidative stress defenses through activation of the Nrf2-ARE pathway, supporting the skin's ability to protect itself.

INGREDIENTS: WATER, DIBUTYL ADIPATE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, ALCOHOL, BUTYLOCTYL SALICYLATE, PHENETHYL BENZOATE, BIS-ETHYLHEXYLOXYPHENOL METHOXYPHENYL TRIAZINE, DIETHYL- AMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE, DIGLYCERIN, ETHYLHEXYL TRIAZONE, POLYSILICONE-15, POLYPHENYLSILSESQUIOXANE, METHYLENE BIS-BENZOTRIAZOLYL TETRAMETHYLBUTYLPHENOL, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, POLYMETHYLSILSESQUIOXANE, C20-22 ALKYL PHOSPHATE, HYDROXYACETOPHENONE, NYLON-12, ACRYLATES/C10-30 ALKYL ACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, C20-22 ALCOHOLS, TROMETHAMINE, METHYL METHACRYLATE/GLYCOL DIMETHACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, SODIUM ACRYLATES CROSSPOLYMER-2, MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, CARNOSINE, POTASSIUM CETYL PHOSPHATE, POLYACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER-6, DECYL GLUCOSIDE, FRAGRANCE(PARFUM), ISONONYL ISONONANOATE, DIPROPYLENE GLYCOL, MALTODEXTRIN, CENTIPEDA CUNNINGHAMII EXTRACT, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED EXTRACT, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, GLYCERIN, RUBUS FRUTICOSUS (BLACKBERRY) LEAF EXTRACT, XANTHAN GUM, PHENOXYETHANOL, T-BUTYL ALCOHOL, CENTELLA ASIATICA EXTRACT, CHRYSANTHEMUM MORIFOLIUM FLOWER EXTRACT

name: Sleeping Mask
description: Leave-on mask to elevate your evening skincare with an extra layer of overnight moisture for dreamy skin.
overview:
Elevate your evening skincare with up to eight hours of overnight soothing and wake up to well-rested and radiant skin.

 

What It Does For You

  • Helps soothe and moisturise skin for up to 8 hours, thanks to the effects of fermented CICA (Centella Asiatica) extract, which soothes two times more and moisturises seven times more, compared to non-fermented CICA.
  • Enhances skin's moisture barrier overnight, thanks to key ingredients like niacinamide, seven plant extracts and tan hua flower.
  • Instantly helps skin look hydrated and evens out skin tone’s appearance, tackling dullness and a loss of radiance by energising and revitalising the look of skin.
  • Embraces you with an indulgent fragrant experience inspired by lavender essential oils sourced from plants grown on a NutriCert™-certified partner farm in Bulgaria and bergamot essential oils.
  • Spreads and absorbs well on the skin, thanks to a T-shaped massager.

Why You Would Like It

Did you know that skin regenerates three times faster while you sleep and your body is busy increasing blood circulation, opening pores to evacuate toxins and stress, and restoring nerve cells?

Support your skin’s night-time regeneration and enjoy some indulgent ‘me’ time with the Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask – a smooth, beautifully scented leave-on mask that moisturises and soothes your skin for up to 8 hours while you sleep.

The Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask provides your skin with plant-derived ingredients, vitamins, antioxidants, and a rich pampering experience that serves as the perfect conclusion to your evening skincare routine. Close your eyes and drift off, confident that you’re taking good care of your skin and will wake up with skin that looks and feels well rested, smooth and healthy.

Indulge, enjoy, and support your skin while you sleep.

Facts For You

Artistry™ Clean
The formulas used in Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask have been developed in accordance with the Artistry Clean philosophy, rigorous guidelines that ensure products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Registered by the Vegan Society
  • No mineral oil, parabens or phthalates
  • Contains no animal-derived ingredients and involves no animal testing

Proven formula

  • Non-comedogenic formulation, won’t cause clogged or blocked pores
  • Dermatologically tested
  • Clinically shown to help skin look well-rested

Consumers loved it!
In consumer testing, women said the Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask:

  • Feels hydrating *
  • Spreads and absorbs well *
  • Smells good *
  • Helps skin feel tighter.

Sustainability
The jar contains 30% post-consumer resin material, as part of our commitment to using more sustainable packaging (Artistry Pledge).

Nutrilite™-grown natural ingredients
Every Artistry Skin Nutrition product features at least one phytonutrient ingredient grown on Nutrilite or Nutrilite partner farms. The Nutrilite-grown ingredients in the Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask are White Chia Seed Oil and essential oils from lavender flowers.


*Based on Consumer Perception Study (self-assessment from clinical study; P&K Skin Research Center, PNK-19808-M1R; n=22, Age Range 20-59)
details:
Check out the Amway Tracing tool

How To Use

The Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Sleeping Mask works in perfect harmony with other Artistry Skin Nutrition products to elevate your night-time skincare routine.

  • Cleanse away impurities. A // Artistry Skin Nutrition Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser
  • Tone, treat and moisturise your skin with your favourite Artistry™ products.
  • Use the t-shaped massager to scoop out an almond-sized amount of Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask onto the back of your hand using the bottom, flat end of the massager.
  • Apply evenly to the face and neck.
  • Pat onto the face until well-absorbed. For special care, gently massage the face using the upper head of the massager.

The T-Shaped Massager is made of zinc alloy on the inside and is platinum plated on the outside.  It doesn’t contain ‘nickel’ and it is allergy-safe. To clean it, you should simply rinse or wash it with a neutral soap, wipe clean and then leave it to dry.
 

Ingredients

  • White Chia Seed extract helps to hydrate and protect skin’s healthy beauty. Our white chia seed is grown on a Nutrilite™ farm, allowing unprecedented “seed-to-skin” traceability and transparency you can trust.  
  • Fermented CICA (Centella Asiatica) extract is known to help soothe and moisturise skin. Fermented CICA extract soothes two times more and moisturises seven times more, compared to non-fermented CICA.
  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) helps visibly even the appearance of skin tone and helps improve skin’s moisture barrier.
  • Botanical complex containing the plant extracts rosemary, chamomile, skullcap, Asian knotweed, centella, liquorice and tea help soothe skin and help give it a more energised appearance.
  • Chrysanthemum morifolium flower extract + Ascorbyl glucoside are antioxidants known to help protect skin against oxidative stress caused by free radicals.
  • Lavender essential oils sourced from plants grown on a NutriCert-certified partner farm in Bulgaria and bergamot essential oils provide a pleasant and calming fragrance.
  • Tan hua flower (also known as “Aqualuna” or “Queen of the Night”) helps maintain skin hydration.
  • Inulin is the prebiotic ingredient from chicory root.

description: Effectively removes even long-wear and waterproof make-up, while gently cleansing your skin in a single step.
overview:
Effectively removes even long-wear and waterproof makeup, while gently cleansing your skin in a single step.

 

What It Does For You

  • Super effective formula— it just WORKS!
  • Quickly removes all types of eye, lip and face makeup, even long-wear and waterproof makeup
  • Effectively removes pollution as fine as PM 2.5 to help prevent irritation
  • Rinse-free formula, with no water needed
  • Leaves skin feeling clean, comfortable and healthier, without feeling oily
  • Microbiome friendly and will therefore not disrupt your skin’s natural protective barriers
  • Suitable for all skin types

Why You Would Like It

Like a makeup magnet, the formula immediately removes even tenacious long-wear, waterproof, transfer-resistant or smudge-proof makeup.

Because it’s so effective, it works without excessive rubbing or tugging on your skin, which helps avoid irritation. There’s no oily residue and it even conditions your skin and your eyelashes!

Facts For You

  • In consumer testing, 92% of women said Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser effectively removes longwearing, smudge-proof or transfer resistant makeup.
     
  • Artistry™ Clean formulated, meaning NO: Mineral Oil, Parabens, Phthalates, Sulphate-Based Surfactants

  • Non-stripping and non-drying

details:
How To Use

  • Shake well.
  • Saturate a cotton pad.
  • To remove eye makeup: hold saturated cotton pad over closed eyes for a few seconds then gently wipe without harsh rubbing.
  • To cleanse skin and remove makeup: gently wipe saturated cotton pad over skin until completely clear of makeup and impurities.
  • No need to rinse.

Use your Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Makeup Remover as the first step in your PM skincare routine, to take off the day’s makeup. It can also be used anytime you need to remove makeup.

For those who prefer a double-cleansing routine, Artistry Skin Nutrition Makeup Removers are ideal as the first step AM and PM. They leave skin perfectly prepared for a thorough foam cleansing with any of our Artistry Skin Nutrition Cleanser formulas.

Ingredients

  • Nutrilite™-grown White Chia Seed – Included in all Artistry Skin Nutrition products, its potent phytonutrients help to visibly nourish and protect skin’s healthy beauty.
  • Watermelon Extract – A fruit extract that helps protect skin from damage caused by free radicals.
  • Micelles – Magnet-like molecules that attract and lift away impurities.

name: Cream Makeup Remover
description: Artistry Skin Nutrition Cream Makeup Remover quickly and effectively removes make-up while soothing sensitive skin to help avoid irritation.
overview:
Hydrates and conditions skin as it works to remove all types of makeup, including long-wear, waterproof, transfer-resistant and smudge-proof formulas.

 

What It Does For You

  • Super effective — it just WORKS!
  • Luscious formula with a rich, creamy texture dissolves all eye, lip and face makeup,  even long-wear and waterproof formulas, leaving it feel soft and supple
  • Removes irritating pollution (including PM 2.5), helping to keep skin comfortable
  • Helps boost skin’s resistance against external stressors
  • Suitable for all skin types
  • Microbiome friendly and will therefore not disrupt your skin’s natural protective barriers

Why You Would Like It

The luscious cream spreads gently over skin to instantly and easily remove all types of makeup, conditioning your skin as it works, leaving it feeling soft, supple and comfortable.

The highly effective formula is even great at removing irritating pollution (including PM 2.5) and impurities from skin. This helps stop the cascade of irritation before it can begin, keeping your skin comfortable.

Facts For You

  • In consumer testing, 98% of women agreed it has a rich, creamy texture that leaves skin feeling moisturised, soft and smooth.
     
  • Artistry™ Clean formulated, meaning NO: Mineral Oil, Parabens, Phthalates, Sulphate-Based Surfactants
  • Registered with The Vegan Society, free from all animal-derived ingredients, no animal testing
  • Non-stripping and non-drying
  • pH balanced, fragrance-free and soap-free
  • Non-comedogenic formulation, won’t cause clogged or blocked pores
  • Dermatologically tested, allergy tested
  • Clinically shown to be gentle and mild – suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin
  • Safety-tested for use in the eye area and suitable for contact lens users
  • Biodegradable formula
  • Contains phytonutrient(s) grown on our own Nutrilite™ or partner farms, with sustainable farming practices that respect the environment and the farming communities
details:
How To Use

  • Massage a generous amount over face, eyes, and lips using gentle circular motions.
  • Rinse or tissue off.
  • Use your Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Makeup Remover as the first step in your PM skincare routine, to take off the day’s makeup. It can also be used anytime you need to remove makeup.

For those who prefer a double-cleansing routine, Artistry Skin Nutrition Makeup Removers are ideal as the first step AM and PM. They leave skin perfectly prepared for a thorough foam cleansing with any of our Cleanser formulas.

Ingredients
