name: Derma-Architect™ Boosting Gel
description: Water-based gel facilitating the transmission of energy from Derma-Architect into the skin and helping provide relief from heat during use, evenly distributing energy from Derma-Architect™ Skin Fitness to the skin.
overview:
Artistry Derma-Architect™ Boosting Gel is designed to help enhance the effectiveness of the Artistry Derma-Architect Skin Fitness mode, evenly distributing thermal and ultrasound energy into the skin and supporting skin comfort during use.

 

What It Does For You

  • Helps protect the skin from the heat generated by Radiofrequency, supporting skin comfort during use.
  • Enhances energy distribution from the device to the skin, thanks to its high conductive properties
  • Enables the Derma-Architect device to glide smoothly without pulling the skin
  • Soothes and calms skin

Why You Would Like It

Artistry Derma-Architect™ Boosting Gel will improve your experience with Artistry Derma-Architect Skin Fitness, helping protect the skin from heat generated by radio frequency during use and helping you get even better results by evenly distributing the energy from the device onto the skin.

The gel texture is easy to spread, allowing Derma-Architect to glide smoothly without pulling the skin, and easy to clean after use. Moreover, it will deliver a fresh sensation on the skin, helping provide relief from heat during use.

Facts For You

Clean formula:

  • Meets the Artistry™ Clean standards
  • Registered with The Vegan Society
  • No animal testing
  • No Mineral Oil
  • No Parabens
  • No Phthalates
  • No Sulphate Surfactants
  • No Cyclic Silicones
  • No Alcohol
  • No Artificial Colourants
  • Dermatology tested
  • Allergy tested

Consumer tests key results:

  • 93% agree that the boosting gel assists in comfortably feeling the heat provided by the Skin Fitness mode on the skin.*
  • 90% agree that the boosting gel helps minimise skin irritation when using the Skin Fitness mode.*
  • 90% agree that the boosting gel enables the device to glide smoothly with less irritation.*

*When used as a system – Skin Fitness Mode with Artistry Derma-Architect Boosting Gel, and Skin Nutrition Mode with Artistry Skin Nutrition Correcting Serum.
details:
Key Features

  • Heat Shock Protein
    Includes Heat Shock Protein boosting ingredients to protect skin from heat
  • Mineral Water
    Rich in minerals such as calcium, sodium, magnesium, and potassium, mineral water is specifically formulated for devices transmitting energies. It can help optimise energy distribution and enhance the experience during device use.
  • Fermentia CICA
    Soothing and calming.

How To Use

Use Artistry Derma-Architect™ Boosting Gel with Artistry Derma-Architect Skin Fitness mode:

  1. Squeeze a coin-sized amount (approximately 4 cm diameter) of the gel onto your hand.
  2. Apply gel evenly across the entire face and neck using your fingertips.
  3. Use the device with the Skin Fitness.
  4. When finished, use a soft cloth or tissue to remove any remaining gel on your hand, face or device.
  5. Proceed with the Skin Nutrition Day regimen.

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS:WATER, METHYLPROPANEDIOL, GLYCERIN, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, NIACINAMIDE, 1, 2-HEXANEDIOL, ACRYLATES/C10-30 ALKYL ACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, TROMETHAMINE, XANTHAN GUM, PROPANEDIOL, POLYGLYCERYL-10 LAURATE, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, ADENOSINE, HYDROGENATED LECITHIN, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, DISODIUM EDTA, FRAGRANCE, BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER, PHYTOSTEROLS, HYDROLYZED PEA PROTEIN, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, SQUALANE, SOLUBLE PROTEOGLYCAN, MALTODEXTRIN, CENTELLA ASIATICA EXTRACT, ACHILLEA MILLEFOLIUM EXTRACT, CERAMIDE NP

name: Derma-Architect™
description: Your at-home device for next-level skincare.
overview:
Artistry Derma-Architect™ is your new advanced skincare device to stimulate collagen production and enhance the absorption of Artistry™ phyto micronutrients* for healthy-looking skin that appears firmer, smoother and more lifted. 

* Phyto micronutrients from the Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying Serum and Correcting Serum.

 

What It Does For You

  • Softens wrinkles, increases skin elasticity and improves skin´s firmness
  • Evens skin´s tone and texture and leaves skin smoother
  • Boosts natural collagen production by 411% in 90 seconds*  
  • Improves skin elasticity resilience by 162% in 4 weeks**.
  • Enhances the absorption of Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum by 270%***
  • Improves the absorption of Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Serums by 158%****

* Collagen mRNA expression was analysed by using Real-Time PCR
** Test site: Cheek area.
*** Vitamin C from Artistry Skin Nutrition Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum. When compared to control group, 90s treatment.
**** When used with Skin Nutrition and Skin Fitness together. It is used with Artistry Skin Nutrition Correcting Serum. All test results are based on comparisons after 4 weeks of use with the baseline.

Why You Would Like It

Artistry Derma-Architect™ takes your skincare regimen to the next level by offering 2 functions merging 6 technologies inspired by professional procedures.
Skin Fitness combines Radio Frequency, Ultrasound technologies and Red LED to enhance natural collagen production, helping increase skin elasticity and firmness, soften wrinkles, and improve skin tone and texture.
Skin Nutrition combines Electroporation, Sonophoresis and Iontophoresis technologies for more efficient and targeted absorption of Artistry™ phyto micronutrients* into the skin, enhancing the effectiveness of skincare formulations for healthier-looking skin.

*Phyto micronutrients from the Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying Serum and Artistry Skin Nutrition Correcting Serum

Facts For You

Skin Fitness

  • + 3.3% facial lifting in 4 weeks
  • 90% agree that the Skin Fitness mode leaves skin looking firmer. *
  • 88% agree that the Skin Fitness mode leaves skin feeling lifted. **
  • 86% agree that the Skin Fitness mode leaves skin feeling tighter. *

Skin Nutrition
Skin Nutrition formulas:

  • +270% enhanced penetration of vitamin C
  • +158% enhanced penetration of Skin Nutrition Serums

Pores:
Addressing the five main signs of ageing in pores results in noticeable reduction and shrinkage.

  • Clinically proven to reduce the appearance of pores by 23.24%***
  • Clinically proven to minimise the pore area by 30.66%***
  • Clinically proven to minimise the pore density by 23.09%***
  • Clinically proven to minimise the pore volume by 28.23%***
  • Clinically proven to minimise the pore depth by 16.13%***

*When used as a system – Skin Fitness Mode with Artistry Derma-Architect Boosting Gel, and Skin Nutrition Mode with Artistry Skin Nutrition Correcting Serum.
**When used as a system – Skin Fitness Mode with Artistry Derma-Architect Boosting Gel, and Skin Nutrition Mode with Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying Serum.
***When used with Skin Nutrition and Skin Fitness mode together. It is used with Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying Serum. All test results are based on comparisons after 4 weeks of use with the baseline.
details:
Key Features

Skin Fitness function combines three key technologies:

  • Radio Frequency stimulates the skin’s natural processes of collagen production
  • Ultrasound generates vibration energy to help enhance the skin's natural processes of protein synthesis.
  • Red LED helps soothe the skin.

Skin Nutrition function  is divided into 2 modes: Vitamin C mode to be used with Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum, and Skincare mode to be used with Artistry Skin Nutrition Serums and Artistry Skin Nutrition Moisturiser products. These two modes also combine three advanced technologies for skincare enhancement:

  • Electroporation creates temporary micro-pores on the skin layer to help enhance the penetration of Artistry Skin Nutrition products.
  • Sonophoresis widens the spaces between skin cells, helping enhance the absorption of phyto micronutrients into the skin.
  • Iontophoresis, in Vitamin C mode, delivers minus charges, equal to that of Vitamin C itself, to help enhance penetration and support absorption into the skin. In Skincare mode, it generates positive charges to help enhance the absorption of phyto micronutrients* into the skin.

*Phyto micronutrients from the Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying Serum and Artistry Skin Nutrition Correcting Serum

How To Use

Artistry Derma-Architect™ consists of two different regimens:
I. SKIN NUTRITION Day
II. SKIN FITNESS Day

I. Use Skin Nutrition every day, morning and evening, adding it to your usual Artistry skincare regimen as follows:

  1. Cleanse and Tone: Start with a clean face by cleansing and toning your skin.
  2. Apply Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum
  3. Mount the Skin Nutrition ring on your device, select Vitamin C mode and gently glide it on the skin from the centre outwards for 90 seconds.
  4. Apply Artistry Skin Nutrition Defying or Correcting Serum
  5. Moisturise and protect (Day): Moisturise with any Artistry Skin Nutrition SPF Moisturiser and Eye Cream.
  6. Moisturise and nourish (Night): Moisturise skin with Artistry Skin Nutrition Moisturiser and Eye Cream.
  7. At the end of your skincare routine, select Skincare mode on your device and gently glide it on the skin.

II. Use Skin Fitness 2 times a week, giving your skin a couple of days to rest in between:

  1. After cleansing and toning your face, apply a coin-sized amount of the Artistry Derma-Architect Boosting Gel to the entire face and neck.
  2. Mount the Skin Fitness ring on your device and turn it on. Give 20 shots on your cheeks, 20 on your jawline and neck and 10 on the forehead. Avoid the nose, lips, philtrum, eye, and thyroid areas.
  3. When finished, proceed with the Skin Nutrition function.


Don’t forget to buy your Artistry Derma Architect Boosting Gel: it is indispensable for a good experience with the Skin Fitness function.

Artistry Derma-Architect™ - Warranty document

Artistry Derma-Architect™ User Manual

name: Rich Cream Refill
description: Smart, sustainable refill for your Artistry LongXevity™ Rich Cream, designed to reduce plastic waste.
overview:
The Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream Refill is designed to fit perfectly into your existing jar. Featuring an eco-conscious inner cup made from post-consumer recycled materials, it offers savings for both the planet and your pocket. This luxurious cream is our most advanced moisturiser, supporting the skin’s natural vitality and renewal to help reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles, dark spots and help improve the appearance of sagging, texture, and crepiness.

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides a gravity-defying lift, visibly softening deep wrinkles for firm skin with more defined contours.
  • Energises skin’s renewal process, helping to remove age related energy-stealing “zombie” cells for a rejuvenated appearance.
  • Moisturises skin for 24 hours, leaving it plumped with hydration.
  • Instantly improves the look of radiance and brightness. 
  • Helps improve the look of texture and dark spots.

Why You Would Like It

Cellular Vitality – The future of your skin.

The Artistry LongXevity collection supports your skin’s natural renewal cycle, helping it repair, hydrate, and boost collagen for a visibly younger, firmer look. With over 30 newly selected ingredients and more Nutrilite™ botanicals than any Artistry™ product before - including Milk Thistle, White Chia Seed Oil, Spinach, and Acerola Cherry - this collection blends the power of nature and science. Clinically shown to make skin look up to 17 years younger,1 it’s your complete solution for radiant, resilient skin at any age.

1Based on a clinical study (Cutometer Analysis, n=33, ages 35–64), many participants showed skin characteristics comparable to up to 17 years younger. Individual results may vary.

Facts For You

  • Refillable packaging reduces plastic waste, using 72% less plastic than the original Artistry LongXevity Rich Cream jar.
  • Refill cup made with 30% post-consumer recycled (PCR) materials, supporting a circular economy.
  • Same powerful formula with Argan Stem Cells and Milk Thistle to rejuvenate, lift, and brighten your skin – with the added benefit of savings compared to buying a completely new product.
  • Meets Artistry Clean Beauty Guidelines (Vegan, No animal testing).
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested.
  • Non-comedogenic.
  • Suitable for all skin types and tones - ideal for dry to very dry skin.
  • Key botanical ingredients like Milk Thistle are sustainably sourced from NutriCert™ certified farms.

Backed by clinical results and customer perception study to deliver visible skin transformation:

  • +157% improvement of the Vitality and Resilience Index.2
  • 90% of users say it leaves skin looking smooth and feeling soft immediately.3
  • 86% of users say it helps skin look younger after 3 days.3
  • 87% of users say skin feels firmer after 1 week.3
  • 85% of users say it helps reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles in 2 weeks.3
  • 83% of users say it helps jawline appear more angled and defined in 8 weeks.3

2The Vitality and Resilience Index is defined as “a measure of various factors associated with healthy-looking and resilient skin for the Face and Eye Creams”. Based on an in vitro gene expression analysis (Bioassay Study RPT-CS-25021; Attachment 043). Rich Cream upregulated genes linked to skin vitality and resilience by 157% vs. untreated control. Individual results may vary.
3Based on a consumer perception study (CSS/Datatelligence Study 76123A) with participants aged 40–60 (n=112–125). Reported after 3 days to 2 weeks of Rich Cream use. Consumer perception results. Individual experiences may vary.
details:
How To Use

  1. Remove the gold faceted outer closure. Pinch the tabs on the inner cup and lift it out of the base jar. Discard the empty cup.
  2. Take the refill cup and remove the service closure, then discard it.
  3. Align the tabs on the refill cup with the corresponding slots on the outer jar. Insert the refill cup into the base jar until it clicks securely into place.
  4. Keep the disc cover on the refill cup, then reattach the gold faceted outer closure.

Apply pearl-sized amount to the face and neck using upward motions. Avoid contact with eyes. 

For best results, use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare ritual to help combat visible signs of ageing at the cellular level. 

Ingredients

  • Milk Thistle from NutriCert™ farms - firms, soothes, brightens and protects skin. 
  • Plant-Based Stem Cell Blend - energises and re-densifies skin.
  • Gingko Biloba - removes energy-stealing and age-related “zombie” cells, revealing a rejuvenated appearance.
  • 24K Gold & Diamond Powder - diffuses light to soften the look of wrinkles and enhance skin’s luminosity.
  • Summer Snowflake Extract - helps reduce the appearance of wrinkles for smoother, more youthful-looking skin. 
  • Peony Extract - provides a fuller and plumping effect.
  • Cardiolipin + Olive Leaf Stem Cells + Glycogen - helps recharge cellular energy to increase the look of firmness and decrease look of wrinkles.
  • Mastic Resin Liposome - helps preserve natural radiance and support skin’s rejuvenating appearance.
  • Japonica Leaf Extract - delivers a gravity-defying lift for firmer, more sculpted contours.
  • Spinach - helps soothe the skin.
  • Argan Stem Cells - helps support skin cell wellness.
  • Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Oil/ Omega Liposome - Moisturisation and help strengthen and support the skin’s natural barrier.
  • Nutrilite-grown Acerola Cherry - high antioxidant value, rich in vitamin C.  

 

INGREDIENTS/SASTOJCI/СКЛАД: WATER/AQUA/EAU, PETROLATUM, PROPANEDIOL, GLYCERIN, ISOSTEARYL PALMITATE, DIMETHICONE, GLYCERYL STEARATE, PEG-100 STEARATE, SQUALANE, TRIETHYLHEXANOIN, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, CETYL ALCOHOL, CAPRYLIC/ CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED OIL, PUNICA GRANATUM STEROLS, SORBITAN STEARATE, BEHENYL ALCOHOL, CALCIUM SODIUM BOROSILICATE, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, ARGININE, CARBOMER, HYDROXYACETOPHENONE, CHLORPHENESIN, POLYSILICONE-11, SPINACIA OLERACEA (SPINACH) LEAF EXTRACT, OLEA EUROPAEA (OLIVE) LEAF EXTRACT, PHENOXYETHANOL, ALLANTOIN, C12-15 ALKYL BENZOATE, OPHIOPOGON JAPONICUS ROOT EXTRACT, DISODIUM EDTA, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, PANTHENOL, GLYCOGEN, ISOMALT, SACCHAROMYCES FERMENT, PAEONIA ALBIFLORA ROOT EXTRACT, 4-t-BUTYLCYCLOHEXANOL, ISOHEXADECANE, MALTODEXTRIN, DIPOTASSIUM GLYCYRRHIZATE, TRIBEHENIN, LECITHIN, PISTACIA LENTISCUS (MASTIC) GUM, HYDROLYZED OPUNTIA FICUS-INDICA FLOWER EXTRACT, AMMONIUM POLYACRYLOYLDIMETHYL TAURATE, LESPEDEZA CAPITATA LEAF/STEM EXTRACT, SODIUM HYALURONATE, GINKGO BILOBA LEAF EXTRACT, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, 1,2 HEXANEDIOL, LEUCOJUM AESTIVUM BULB EXTRACT, GARDENIA JASMINOIDES MERISTEM CELL CULTURE, TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, LAUROYL LYSINE, SILYBUM MARIANUM EXTRACT, CERAMIDE NG, ISODONIS JAPONICUS LEAF/STALK EXTRACT, POLYSORBATE 80, CITRIC ACID, PEG-10 PHYTOSTEROL, GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE/CAPRATE, POLYSORBATE 20, CARNOSINE, DIAMOND POWDER, XANTHAN GUM, CYAMOPSIS TETRAGONOLOBA (GUAR) GUM, LACTIC ACID, TOCOPHEROL, ACACIA SENEGAL GUM, ARGANIA SPINOSA CALLUS CULTURE EXTRACT, SODIUM BENZOATE, CERAMIDE NP, BHT, BETA-SITOSTEROL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, CARRAGEENAN, DISODIUM BIS-DIOLEOYL GLYCEROPHOSPHOGLYCERIN, OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL, PALMITOYL HEXAPEPTIDE-12, PERILLA OCYMOIDES SEED OIL, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL, GOLD, ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA EXTRACT, ACETYL CEDRENE, LINALYL ACETATE, TETRAMETHYL ACETYLOCTAHYDRONAPHTHALENES, TRIMETHYLBENZENEPROPANOL, GERANYL ACETATE.

name: Eye Cream Refill
description: Smart refill for your Artistry LongXevity™ Eye Cream, designed to reduce plastic waste.
overview:

name: Retexturizing System
description: Intensively treat and repair specific ageing skin concerns.
overview:
Inspired by professional treatments, the Artistry Labs™ Retexturizing System was created for ageing skin and is clinically proven to help skin’s texture look 8 years younger in just 4 weeks.*

 

What It Does For You

  • The Artistry Labs Retexturizing System helps makes skin texture look up to 8 years younger in just 4 weeks, when the products are used together as advised.
  • Retexturizing Peel exfoliates skin with Triple-Exfoliating Complex, allowing enzymes to work longer and more efficiently at loosening and removing dull, dead cells so you can enjoy an effective-yet-gentle experience.
  • Retexturizing Serum addresses skin’s total epidermal appearance – reinforcing and protecting the skin moisture barrier, encouraging skin’s natural cell renewal with exfoliation, reducing the appearance of pores, and soothing.
  • The Aquabrasion device mechanically exfoliates loosened, dead skin cells and extracts pores for deep cleaning. It also boosts the activity of key ingredients in the Artistry Labs Retexturizing Serum by 10×† for improved antioxidant and skin barrier function.
  • With its two functions – Suction Mode and Serum Mode – the Aquabrasion Device, maximises the effectiveness of the Artistry Labs Retexturizing Peel and Retexturizing Serum.

Why You Would Like It

Fast, remarkable results
Used together, the products in the Artistry Labs Retexturizing System – Peel, Serum and Aquabrasion Device can help to reduce the appearance of visible damage and reveal healthier-looking skin.

Using science to maximize the beneficial effects of nature
Artistry Labs products, such as the Retexturizing Serum, feature beneficial natural ingredients such as Lentil Seed and perilla leaf extracts. Red light Serum Mode boosts the activity of these key ingredients by 10×† for improved antioxidant and skin barrier function.

Synergistic systems
Each of the products – Peel, Serum and Aquabrasion Device – work together to amplify the power of the others.

At-home convenience
Using the Artistry Labs Retexturizing System at home can be easier, faster and cheaper than leaving the house for a professional treatment. 86% of consumers would use Artistry Labs Retexturizing System instead of a professional treatment**.
 
For best results, use the Artistry Labs Retexturizing System for 4 weeks once a quarter to maximise the benefits of skin’s natural cell-renewal process and leave your skin looking and feeling smoother, fresher and younger.

Facts For You

Brands you can trust
The Artistry Labs Retexturizing System combines the best of the Artistry™ brand’s extensive skin science expertise with sustainably grown ingredients from Nutrilite™ – the world’s no.1 vitamin and dietary supplement brand***.

Product claims:
The Retexturizing System is backed by a wealth of positive claims based on a clinical study and consumer feedback:

Immediately after**

  • 85% of clinical study panellists showed improvement in the look/appearance of skin brightness
  • 88% of consumers agreed that it leaves their skin feeling smoother
  • 88% of consumers agreed that it leaves their skin feeling cleaner

After 2 weeks**

  • 86% of consumers agreed that the system erases skin roughness
  • 97% of consumers agreed that the system leaves skin feeling softer  

After 4 weeks**

  • 97% of consumers agreed that:
    • the system showed improvement in the appearance of fine lines
    • the system showed improvement of the look/appearance of skin  
    • they had softer-feeling skin
  • 100 % of consumers agreed that they had smoother-feeling skin


* Results may vary. Clinical tests were conducted on a 36 sample size between the ages 36-71. Based on Image Analysis, Advanced Imaging and Measurement Lab Study RPT-006-23-ASC Report C, after 4 weeks, statistically significant improvement shown in skin texture equivalent to 8 years improvement on a Texture vs. Age reference curve.
** Results may vary. Clinical tests were conducted on women aged between 36 and 71. Based on Consumer Perception (SGS Study C22-D185 Cells 1-3 Consumer Results).
*** Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
details:
Key Features

Inspired by professional treatments
The Artistry Labs™ Retexturizing System is inspired by 3 professional treatments – chemical peel, enzyme peel and hydra facial. 86% of consumers agreed they would use the Artistry Labs Retexturizing System instead of going for a professional treatment.*

NutriCert certified ingredients
Artistry Labs Retexturizing Peel and Retexturizing Serum contain NutriCert-certified ingredients. This means:

  • Sustainable farming practices that benefit the environment.
  • Socially responsible practices that positively affect people.
  • Smart business practices that provide assurance of quality control.

Nutrilite, the brand behind the NutriCert certification, is the world’s no.1 selling vitamin and dietary supplement brand.**

Artistry Labs Aquabrasion device
A multi-function skincare device with two modes:
Suction mode: Leverages hydradermabrasion – a non-invasive, evolutionary technology of microdermabrasion that uses vacuum suction and water infusion to thoroughly clean pores.

Serum mode: Serum Mode uses a dome-shaped attachment to evenly emit a light with the intensity of 620~625 nm to provide a synergistic effect with Artistry Labs Retexturizing Serum.

 

* Results may vary. Clinical tests were conducted on a sample size of 71 of women aged between 36 and 71. Based on Consumer Perception (SGS Study C22-D185 Cells 1-3 Consumer Results), after 4 weeks, 86% of panellists (Cell 1 + Cell 2) agreed they would do the treatment system regimen instead of going to a skincare professional.
** Source: GlobalData | http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/

 

How To Use

The Retexturizing System fits simply into your morning skin care routine and offers a self-care ritual in the evenings. It is designed to be used for 4 weeks at a time and repeated every quarter.

This treatment system consists of two different regimens: peel day and non-peel day. Follow the weekly skin care regimen below for four weeks – and ensure the peel is used on non-consecutive days.

Regimen on peel days:
AM

  1. Cleanse & Tone
  2. Apply 2 pumps of Retexturizing Serum to the entire face using fingertips
  3. Moisturize/SPF

PM

  1. Cleanse
  2. Apply 6-8 pumps of Retexturizing Peel for 8 minutes and rinse off
  3. Use Aquabrasion Device with suction nozzle
  4. Tone
  5. Apply 2 pumps of Retexturizing Serum to the entire face using fingertips
  6. Use Device in Serum Mode + dome attachment
  7. Moisturise

Regimen on non-peel days:
AM

  1. Cleanse & Tone
  2. Apply 2 pumps of Retexturizing Serum to the entire face using fingertips
  3. Moisturize/SPF

PM

  1. Cleanse
  2. Tone
  3. Apply 2 pumps of Retexturizing Serum to the entire face using fingertips
  4. Use Device in Serum Mode + dome attachment
  5. Moisturise

Check out the details of the recommended routine here: {LINK}

Details about the Artistry Labs Aquabrasion Device product warranty can be found here

The Artistry Labs Aquabrasion Device User Manual can be found here

 

Ingredients

  • Artistry Labs Retexturizing Peel
    • Triple Exfoliating Complex, which includes mushroom enzymes, pomegranate enzymes (with NutriCert certification) and mandelic acid.  The mushroom enzymes mimic the activity of the naturally occurring enzymes in the skin, while mandelic acid serves to make this enzyme work 25% better in exfoliating superficial, dead skin cells. The pomegranate enzymes increase desquamation rates to remove the outer layer of dead skin cells that can trap dirt and debris. Mandelic acid remains at the surface of the skin, which has a lower pH level, and provides an optimum environment for enzymes to work.
    • Opuntia Ficus Fruit Extract provides soothing benefits to the skin.
    • Pomegranate Extract, sourced by Nutrilite, offers soothing advantages.

 

  • Artistry Labs Retexturizing Serum
    • Pore Refining Complex, featuring Lentil Seed, Red Algae and Tara Fruit to provide comprehensive pore care, including tightening the appearance of pores and applying a ‘second skin’ to prevent dirt and debris from getting in.
    • Soothing Complex, featuring Nutrilite-sourced Pomegranate Extract, Liquorice Root Extract, Perilla Leaf and 4-T-Butylcyclohexanol to soothe and revitalise skin’s appearance.
    • Barrier Enforcing Complex, featuring Rosemary Liposome, Omega liposome and Hydrogenated Lecithin to maintain a healthy-looking stratum corneum layer of the epidermis – our first line of defence against environmental factors.

 

 

  • Artistry Labs Retexturizing Peel:

WATER/AQUA/EAU, PROPANEDIOL, LACTOBACILLUS/PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT FERMENT EXTRACT, GLYCERIN, MANDELIC ACID, MUCOR MIEHEI EXTRACT, PPG-24-GLYCERETH-24, POLYSORBATE 20, SPHINGOMONAS FERMENT EXTRACT, OPUNTIA FICUS-INDICA FRUIT EXTRACT, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, SODIUM CITRATE, CHLORPHENESIN, CITRIC ACID, SODIUM BENZOATE, DISODIUM EDTA, LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE, SACCHAROMYCES CEREVISIAE EXTRACT, POTASSIUM SORBATE, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, GLYCERYL ACRYLATE/ACRYLIC ACID COPOLYMER, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, PHENOXYETHANOL, PVM/MA COPOLYMER, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, PHYTIC ACID

 

  • Artistry Labs Retexturizing Serum:

WATER/AQUA/EAU, PROPANEDIOL, SQUALANE, TRIETHYLHEXANOIN, HDI/TRIMETHYLOL HEXYLLACTONE CROSSPOLYMER, HYDROGENATED LECITHIN, POLYGLYCERYL-10 MYRISTATE, DIMETHICONE, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, GLYCERIN, SODIUM BENZOATE, CAESALPINIA SPINOSA FRUIT EXTRACT, SPHINGOMONAS FERMENT EXTRACT, CHLORPHENESIN, GLYCOLIC ACID, 4-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXANOL, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, LENS ESCULENTA (LENTIL) SEED EXTRACT, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, LACTIC ACID, SODIUM MAGNESIUM SILICATE, CITRIC ACID, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, DISODIUM EDTA, DEXTRIN, KAPPAPHYCUS ALVAREZII EXTRACT, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, HYDROLYZED OPUNTIA FICUS-INDICA FLOWER EXTRACT, LECITHIN, STEARYL GLYCYRRHETINATE, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, SILICA, XANTHAN GUM, PHENOXYETHANOL, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, SODIUM HYALURONATE, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED OIL, ULEX EUROPAEUS LEAF/ ROOT/ STEM EXTRACT, CERAMIDE NP, BETA-SITOSTEROL, PERILLA OCYMOIDES LEAF EXTRACT, OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL, PERILLA OCYMOIDES SEED OIL, TOCOPHEROL, ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (ROSEMARY) LEAF EXTRACT, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, BHT

name: Hydration + Antioxidant Boost Moisturizer
description: Fight back against dry and dull skin with this innovative, lush crème, featuring a blend of tropical fruit extracts and hydrating botanicals.
overview:
Give your skin a daily treat infused with vitamins and antioxidants. The pretty, pink lightweight gel cream hydrates, soothes & brightens to show off skin’s radiance.

 

What It Does For You

  • Lightweight gel cream helps to amplify your radiance
  • Moisturising botanicals deliver an invigorating burst of hydration
  • Vitamins + antioxidants help support skin, safeguarding against environmental aggressors and soothing oxidative stress
  • Doubles as a makeup primer, creating a smooth, hydrated canvas
  • Suitable for sensitive skin

Why You Would Like It

Make Zen + Energy your beauty attitude, with calming and invigorating ingredients. A powerful duo!

  • Shea (Zen) – Soothing hydration
  • Superfruit Juice (Energy) – Energising botanicals and antioxidants help brighten skin

Fab fragrance: Exotic Berry – A daily treat of tropical, memorable scent

Facts For You

Check why other consumers like it!*

  • 92% of consumers agreed it leaves their skin feeling moisturised
  • 90% of consumers agreed it is light enough to wear under makeup during the day
  • 89% of consumers agreed it provides a burst of hydration
  • 86% of consumers agreed it feels soothing on their skin

It meets Artistry™ Clean Beauty standards:

  • No Animal Testing
  • Registered by the Vegan Society
  • No parabens and no mineral oil
  • Dermatologically tested, non-comedogenic

*Percent of women agreed, based on consumer preference study of 68 panelists.

name: Hydrating Mask
description: Time to treat dry skin with the moisture-infusion of the 				Artistry Signature Select™ Hydrating Mask.
overview:
Artistry Signature Select™ Hydrating Mask delivers instant and long-lasting moisture while helping to protect skin from the environment.

Why you will love it...

Skin that feels tight, dry and uncomfortable, is a sure sign that it is in need of an infusion of moisture. Artistry Signature Select Hydrating Mask contains a special moisturising liposome and Sodium Hyaluronate that restores lost moisture in the skin while creating long-lasting hydration. Nutrilite ™-sourced Green Tea Extract provides antioxidant protection and helps to defend skin against external irritants such as pollution, air-conditioning and even recycled air on an aeroplane.

Apply a generous layer of this luxurious soufflé-like mask onto areas where you’re experiencing dryness and dehydration, such as your forehead, cheeks and nose, and don’t forget to bring it down onto your neck and décolleté which often get overlooked. Relax with the fresh and uplifting scent of juicy green notes and sparkling citrus.

Use in combination with other Artistry Signature Select masks to create your own personalised multi-masking experience.  

Top notes: Green Tea, Citrus Blend
Middle note: Floral Accord
Base Notes: Warm Musk

Good to know...

  • The Artistry Signature Select Masks are designed to be used in different zones of your face so you can create a personalised treatment and multi-mask your way to radiant skin.
  • Suitable for all skin types, but especially beneficial for dry and dehydrated skin.
  • Can be used daily.  
  • Dermatologically tested.
  • Conveniently sized for travel.

 

To use...

  • With dry hands, smooth a generous layer of Artistry Signature Select Hydrating Mask over freshly cleansed skin, concentrating on areas prone to dehydration and avoiding your eye and lip areas.
  • Allow the mask to work for 7-minutes before rinsing away with warm water.
  • Use whenever your skin feels in need of a shot of moisture.
details:
Key Features

  • The soft whipped soufflé cream formula infuses deep and lasting moisture into the skin’s surface.
  • An absolute travel essential since it helps soothe skin from external irritants such as super-dry air in planes and over-air-conditioned rooms.
  • Includes Nutrilite™-sourced Green Tea Extract, an ingredient known for its antioxidant power.

How To Use

  • With dry fingertips, apply a visible layer to freshly cleansed, moist skin, avoiding eye and lip areas.
  • Leave on for 7 minutes.
  • Rinse off with warm water.
  • Can be used daily.

KEY TREATMENT AREAS

name: Purifying Mask
description: This dense clay mask deeply cleanses skin and pores, drawing out impurities and 				environmental pollutants.
overview:
When skin is craving a deep clean and pores need a purge, call on the detoxifying power of Artistry SIGNATURE SELECT™ Purifying Mask.

Why you will love it...

Artistry SIGNATURE SELECT Purifying Mask contains Dense French Clay to thoroughly cleanse skin and pores while drawing out impurities and environmental pollutants. Applied to areas where you’re experiencing excess sebum, such as your chin and T-zone, this luxurious mask reduces the appearance of pores and enhances your make-up with a long-lasting fresh matte surface, that’s less oil and lasts all day. Meanwhile, naturally soothing Oatmeal helps to calm skin and Nutrilite™-sourced Citrus Extract offers antioxidant protection. The uplifting scent comes from freshly squeezed grapefruit blended with orange, lemon and mandarin wrapped in musks and woods.

Top notes: Grapefruit, Orange, Lemon
Middle note: Watery Accord
Base Notes: Blonde Woods, MuskDeeply cleanses skin.

To use...

  • With dry hands smooth a generous layer of Artistry SIGNATURE SELECT Purifying Mask over freshly cleansed skin, concentrating on areas prone to becoming oily and avoiding your eye and lip areas.
  • Allow the mask to work for 7-minutes, after which it should feel dry to the touch and can be rinsed away with warm water.
  • Use three-or-four times a week. The oil absorbing properties of this mask means it is great before make-up application too.


 

Good to know...

  • Use in combination with other Artistry SIGNATURE SELECT™ masks to create your own personalised multi-masking experience.
  • Suitable for all skin types but especially beneficial for oily skin and blemish-prone skin with visible pores.
  • Helps to control excess oil to keep skin smooth and hydrated, but not shiny.
  • Can be used three-or-four times a week depending on your skin’s needs.
  • Dermatologically tested.
  • Conveniently sized for travel.
details:
Key Features

  • Dense French clay that immediately absorbs excess of oil on skin's surface and rinses it away. Skin is less shiny, and the T-zone looks less oily immediately and all day.
  • Even enhances your make-up: helps make-up look fresh and matte, simply less oily during the whole day.
  • Naturally soothing Oatmeal brings a sense of calm despite the stresses of life. It also includes Nutrilite™-sourced Citrus Extract.

How To Use

  • With dry fingertips, apply a visible layer to freshly cleansed skin, avoiding eye and lip areas.

name: Brightening Vitamin C+ Gel Mask
description: A refreshing mask that energises dull‑looking skin and reveals visible radiance after one use.
overview:
Infused with 20+ antioxidants, this advanced hydrogel mask instantly brightens, helps even skin tone, and leaves skin feeling soothed and cooled.

 

What It Does For You

  • Delivers intense, immediate brightening for a healthy-looking glow.
  • Helps visibly improve the look of dull, uneven skin tone—including redness, yellowness and darkness.
  • Refines skin texture and helps skin feel firmer for a smoother look.
  • The hydrogel provides a cooling effect, helping to soothe and comfort skin.
  • Provides intensive antioxidant care with a powerful blend of 20+ antioxidants, harnessing the power of plants to help defend against environmental stressors and reveal a more youthful-looking complexion. 

Why You Would Like It

Inspired by Korean beauty rituals and made in Korea, this multi-benefit mask turns any moment—day or night—into an effortless boost for brighter, revitalised skin.

It features skincare superstars from our Nutrilite™ farms, including acerola cherry — one of nature’s richest sources of Vitamin C — plus blackcurrant, rosemary, and white chia extracts.

Created in a high-performance hydrogel format, the mask adheres closely to the skin, delivering the potency of a full bottle of antioxidant-rich serum with enhanced absorption and a comfortable , non-greasy feel.

Elevate your self care routine with a luxurious glow ritual  — ideal for an instant refresh or weekly treat.

Facts For You

Recognised by users*: 

  • 80% say it gives a healthy-looking glow.
  • 80% say it helps reduce the appearance of dullness.
  • 82% feel deeply moisturised skin.
  • 89% say it absorbs well.

Proven by science**:

  • Improves skin tone on three levels: Redness by 5.6%, Darkness by 1.1%, Yellowness by 0.7%.
  • Refines skin texture by 20%.
  • Soothes the skin by 19%.
  • Enhances skin firmness around pores by 25%.

Meets Artistry Clean Beauty Guidelines:

  • Vegan, No animal testing, no animal derived ingredients.
  • No mineral oil, parabens, phthalates, sulfate surfactants, cyclic silicones.
  • Non comedogenic.
  • For all skin types.
  • Dermatologically & allergy tested to minimise risk of allergies.

 

*Based on consumer perception immediately after one use, with participants aged 25–55 . Individual experiences may vary. 
** After one use, compared to baseline. Based on clinical testing with participants aged 24–58 . Individual results may vary.
details:
How To Use

  • Use 1-3 times per week or as needed. 
  • Remove the film from the two-part mask. Apply the lower section around the mouth, then the upper section around the eyes. Handle gently—the hydrogel is delicate. 
  • Leave on for 30–60 minutes. For an intensive brightening effect, leave on until the mask becomes fully transparent signaling the formula is fully absorbed. Transparency time-release may vary by individual and surrounding environment.

Order of use: Cleanser > toner > serum > Vitamin C+ Gel Mask > moisturiser > SPF (if needed).

Tip: For enhanced brightening and antioxidant benefits, pair with Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Vitamin C+HA3 Daily Serum.

 

Used together, they work in synergy to help protect skin from external stressors by up to 92.2%* and enhance skin radiance by 84.2%**.

 

*In-vitro test was conducted to evaluate ROS Scavenging under hydrogel mask eluate (2.5%) with Vitamin C+HA Serum (0.05%).
**After one use

Ingredients

20+ Antioxidant Blend:

  • Includes traceable ingredients from Nutrilite™ and NutriCert™ partner farms—such as acerola cherry complex (extract and powder), blackcurrant, rosemary, and white chia extracts—along with complementary vitamins and botanicals to help defend against free radicals, support comprehensive skin brightness, and help address visible signs of aging.

Vitamin C+ Boosters:

  • Parabiotics help balance the skin microbiome and improve vitamin C efficacy, while the Plant-Based Boosting Complex enhances antioxidant defence

Brightening & Firming Essentials:

  • Niacinamide helps visibly even the appearance of skin tone, promoting a clearer, more uniform-looking complexion. Adenosine helps improve the appearance of firmness while supporting the skin’s natural collagen production.

name: Illuminating System
description:
A  system that targets  dark spots for brighter, more even-looking skin. Clinically proven to reduce the appearance of dark spots and brighten skin tone.

Try Artistry Labs™ Illuminating System now
size: Illuminating Serum - 30 ml/1.0 FL OZ | Spot Corrector - 15 ML/.5 FL OZ
overview:
Artistry Labs™ Illuminating System is our most advanced brightening treatment, inspired by professional skincare to help reduce the appearance of dark spots and reveal a more radiant, even-looking complexion.

 

What It Does For You

  • Improves skin radiance 
  • Visibly brighter skin 
  • More even skin tone 
  • Lighter, less noticeable dark spots 
  • Reduces yellowness

 

CLINAL RESULTS

4 WEEKS²

  • Skin regains a bright, luminous glow.
  • Skin is strikingly more luminous.
  • Reduction in appearance of dark spots.

12 WEEKS²

  • Improvement in total hyperpigmentation.
  • Improvement in skin tone and color evenness.
  • Helps reduce the appearance of dark spots.
  • Helps reduce the visible size of dark spots.
  • Results continue to improve across all parameters.³


²In a consumer perception study.
³Clinical Grading: 

Attachment 1: SGS C23-D097 (n=37) 
parameters measured in clinical study includes dark spot appearance, dark spot intensity, dark spot size, lightness/brightness, radiance, skin tone evenness, global hyperpigmentation

Why You Would Like It

Your ritual for ultimate radiance starts here

Dark spots and discolouration aren’t just visible signs – they are markers of hyperpigmentation, occurring when melanin-the pigment responsible for skin colour-becomes overactive due to UV exposure and environmental stress. This excess melanin production leads to uneven skin tone and persistent dark spots that can be difficult to fade.

That’s where Artistry Labs™ Illuminating System comes in. This, 4-week treatment is clinically proven to reduce the appearance of dark spots and reveal a brighter, more even-looking complexion. Formulated with a patented, breakthrough technology* from Yale University  and Nutrilite™ botanicals, this advanced duo delivers concentrated formulas directly to the source of discolouration for visible transformation. 
Enjoy luminous skin and confidence right at home!

 

*Based on licensed IP

 

Facts For You

  • Free from animal-derived ingredients
  • Registered by The Vegan Society
  • In line with EU regulations, not tested on animals
  • Dermatologically tested
  • Amway traceable
  • Formulated with a patented, breakthrough technology* from Yale University and Nutrilite™ botanical science
  • Patent-pending extraction technology
  • Dermatologically tested for skin tolerance.

 

After four weeks:
94% said their skin looked more even-toned.²
91% said they noticed less visible dark spots.²
91% said they are more confident in their appearance.²

 

²In a consumer perception study.
*Based on licensed IP
details:
Check out the Amway Tracing tool

How To Use

For best results, use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare ritual for at least four weeks.

Step 1: After cleansing and toning, apply two pumps of Illuminating Serum evenly over the entire face.
Step 2: Massage Spot Corrector directly onto areas of concern until fully absorbed.
Step 3: Follow with your favourite Artistry™ moisturiser.
Morning: Always finish with an Artistry™ SPF product, to protect your skin.

Repeat twice daily. Each kit lasts four weeks. This system can be used safely for 12 weeks to address stubborn dark spots and for more visible results.


Note: Avoid contact with eyes. If redness or irritation occurs, rinse and discontinue use.

 

Ingredients

ILLUMINATING SERUM

  • Nutrilite™-grown Iris Florentina root extract helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and reveal skin that looks more even-toned
  • Cactus flower extract helps prepare skin’s surface layer for better absorption of serum
  • Cytidine Complex, including niacinamide and AA2G, a stabilised vitamin C technology, was developed in partnership with a world-renowned researcher from a major US university and is 40% more powerful than a well-known brightening ingredient.

SPOT CORRECTOR

  • Nutrilite-grown Iris Florentina root extract helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and reveal skin that looks more even-toned
  • AA2G, a stabilized vitamin C technology, reduces the appearance of dark spots
  • Formulated with tranexamic acid to help calm the skin

INGREDIENTS:
ILLUMINATING SERUM – WATER/EAU, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, NIACINAMIDE, ASCORBYL GLUCOSIDE, CYTIDINE,ISONONYL ISONONANOATE, DIMETHICONE, HYDROGENATED LECITHIN, POLYMETHYLSILSESQUIOXANE,POLYGLYCERYL-10 PENTASTEARATE, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, GLYCERIN, BEHENYL ALCOHOL, BATYL ALCOHOL,TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE, PHENOXYETHANOL, CHLORPHENESIN, SODIUM STEAROYL LACTYLATE, TOCOPHEROL, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL, ACETYL GLUCOSAMINE, ACRYLATES/C10-30 ALKYL ACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, SODIUM CITRATE, XANTHAN GUM, HYDROXYETHYLCELLULOSE, DISODIUM EDTA, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, IRIS FLORENTINA ROOT EXTRACT, HYDROLYZED OPUNTIA FICUS-INDICA, FLOWER EXTRACT, LECITHIN, DIPOTASSIUM GLYCYRRHIZATE, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, GLUCONOLACTONE, GLYCERYL ACRYLATE/ACRYLIC ACID COPOLYMER, SODIUM BENZOATE, PVM/MA COPOLYMER, CERAMIDE NP, BETA-SITOSTEROL, CARRAGEENAN, GLUCOSE, TETRAMETHYLACETYLOCTAHYDRONAPHTHALENES, TRIMETHYLCYCLOPENTENYL METHYLISOPENTENOL, LINALOOL, BENZYL SALICYLATE, LIMONENE, LINALYL ACETATE, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, CITRUS AURANTIUM BERGAMIA PEEL OIL, HEXYL CINNAMAL, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL. 
SPOT CORRECTOR - WATER/EAU, DIMETHICONE, ISODODECANE, POLYSILICONE-11, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, PEG-10 DIMETHICONE, ASCORBYL GLUCOSIDE, ISONONYL ISONONANOATE, POLYACRYLAMIDE, POLYSORBATE 80, TRANEXAMIC ACID, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, C13-14 ISOALKANE, POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM BENZOATE, ACRYLATES/C10-30 ALKYL ACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, CHLORPHENESIN, SODIUM CITRATE, LAURETH-7, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, IRIS FLORENTINA ROOT EXTRACT, DISODIUM EDTA, DIPOTASSIUM GLYCYRRHIZATE, TOCOPHEROL, TETRAMETHYLACETYLOCTAHYDRONAPHTHALENES, TRIMETHYLCYCLOPENTENYL METHYLISOPENTENOL, LINALOOL, BENZYL SALICYLATE, LIMONENE, LINALYL ACETATE, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, CITRUS AURANTIUM BERGAMIA PEEL OIL, HEXYL CINNAMAL, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL

name: Omega Drops
description: A 99% plant-based, lightweight facial oil packed with omega fatty acids essential for your skin.
overview:
This fast-absorbing facial oil — rich in omegas 3, 6, 7 and 9 — replenishes the skin’s lipid barrier, provides long-lasting hydration by sealing in moisture for up to 24 hours*, and helps to soothe dry skin.

*Based on clinical and consumer studies. Improvements observed immediately and up to 24 hours. Individual results may vary.

 

What It Does For You

  • Replenishes and strengthens your skin’s lipid barrier with the support of omegas 3, 6, 7 and 9.
  • Delivers deep hydration for up to 24 hours, leaving the skin supple and well moisturised.
  • Brings relief to dry and sensitive skin with a lightweight, fast-absorbing formula.
  • Boosts the skin’s natural radiance for a luminous, healthy-looking glow.
  • Naturally supercharges your skin with a formula composed of 10+ botanical oils, including five sourced from Nutrilite™ or our Nutricert™-certified partner farms.

Why You Would Like It

Your skin deserves care that feels natural and effortless. This lightweight facial oil delivers up to 24 hours of deep hydration, leaving skin smooth and radiant. Enriched with omegas 3, 6, 7 and 9, it supports your skin’s lipid barrier, locks in vital moisture, and helps protect your skin from external aggressors.

Infused with our Nutrilite™-grown white chia seed oil — one of nature’s richest sources of essential fatty acids — it nourishes the skin and helps strengthen its natural resilience. Every drop delivers comfort, nourishment, and a healthy-looking glow.

Indulge in the delicate green tea scent of Omega Drops for a moment of pure self-care.

Facts For You

Recognised by users*

  • 96% of consumers agree it leaves the skin radiant.
  • 97% of consumers agree it feels soothing on the skin.
  • 96% of consumers agree the skin feels nourished.
  • 96% of consumers agree it feels lightweight on the skin.

Proven by science

  • Restores the skin’s natural oil content by 97%***. 
  • Increases skin moisturisation by 76% for up to 24 hours**.
  • Boosts skin glossiness by 103% after application***.

 

*Based on a consumer use study with participants aged 20–60. Individual results may vary.
**Based on clinical and consumer studies. Improvements observed immediately and up to 24 hours. Individual results may vary.
***Based on clinical studies. Statistically significant improvements observed after one application. Individual results may vary.
details:
Key Features

  • 10+ carefully selected botanical oils, including white chia, borage, pumpkin seed, evening primrose, almond, rice bran, safflower, algae, macadamia and meadowfoam seed oil – each providing essential omegas for hydration and barrier support.
  • Potent antioxidant protection with vitamin E, helping to defend the skin against oxidative stress caused by free radicals, and working in harmony with essential omegas.
  • Star ingredients:
    • Nutrilite™ farm-grown white chia seed oil – naturally high in omega-3 ALA. It helps strengthen the skin barrier, delivers phytonutrients, and offers complete “seed-to-skin” traceability.
    • Algae oil – a vegan source of omega-3 DHA and EPA.

How To Use

Morning and night:

  1. Apply four to six drops of oil onto your hands. 
  2. Rub hands together to warm the oil, then press onto your face. 
  3. Massage until fully absorbed. Avoid direct contact with the eyes. 
  4. Follow with a moisturiser to lock in hydration.

Order of use: 
Use Omega Drops during your daily skincare routine in the following order: cleanser > toner > serum > Omega Drops > moisturiser > SPF. 

Omega Drops is a lightweight oil that quickly absorbs into the skin’s lipid layer. Heavier creams and wax-rich formulations applied afterward remain on the surface, forming a seal that locks in moisture

Tips:
Mix a few drops with your favourite Artistry cream (without SPF) or foundation for an added boost of hydration and radiance.

Ingredients

Ingredients/Состав/Құрамы: 
CARTHAMUS TINCTORIUS (SAFFLOWER) SEED OIL, C15-19 ALKANE, LIMNANTHES ALBA (MEADOWFOAM) SEED OIL, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED OIL, SQUALANE, BORAGO OFFICINALIS SEED OIL, ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL, OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL, MACADAMIA TERNIFOLIA SEED OIL, PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS (SWEET ALMOND) OIL, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, TOCOPHEROL, CUCURBITA PEPO (PUMPKIN) SEED OIL, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, SCHIZOCHYTRIUM LIMACINUM OIL, ULEX EUROPAEUS LEAF/ROOT/STEM EXTRACT, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, LIMONENE, HEXYL CINNAMAL, LINALOOL, GERANIOL, CITRONELLOL, CITRAL.

name: Retexturizing Serum
description: Reinforce your skin's barrier with the Retexturizing Serum: boost moisture, smooth texture and reduce the appearance of pores.
overview:
This lightweight yet highly concentrated serum, powered by potent plant-derived ingredients, improves overall epidermal appearance. It reinforces the skin’s moisture barrier, promotes natural cell renewal through exfoliation, reduces the appearance of pores, and soothes the skin.

 

What It Does For You

 

  • Reinforces the skin’s moisture barrier
  • Promotes natural exfoliation and cell renewal
  • Helps visibly refine the appearance of pores
  • Applies a “second skin” layer to block dirt from getting into pores
  • Soothes and calms skin
  • Improves overall skin texture and radiance 
  • Powered by Advanced Complexes - Formulated with potent plant-derived ingredients and four targeted complexes that work together to improve skin’s appearance significantly:
    • Pore Refining Complex: Lentil Seed, Red Algae & Tara Fruit help tighten the look of pores and form a “second skin” layer barrier to protect against the pollution.
    • Soothing Complex: Nutrilite™ Pomegranate, Licorice Root & Mediterranean Berry-inspired ingredients calm and revitalise skin.
    • Barrier Enforcing Complex: Omega Liposome, Rosemary Liposome & Hydrogenated Lecithin reinforce the skin’s moisture barrier and defend against environmental stressors.
    • Skin Renewal Complex: Opuntia Ficus Flower & Gorse Plant Extract promote natural exfoliation and cell renewal for smoother, fresher-looking skin.

Why You Would Like It


Our skin helps us face the day. It defines us, protects us, and tells our story. But over time, exposure to sun, cold, dehydration and the natural ageing process leaves its mark, dulling our complexion and weakening our skin’s resilience.

The Artistry Labs™ Retexturizing Serum improves the overall appearance of the skin’s surface – reinforcing and protecting the skin’s moisture barrier, encouraging skin’s natural cell renewal with exfoliation, reducing the appearance of pores, and soothing.

For optimal results, use it as part of the full Artistry Labs™ Retexturizing System, combining the Retexturizing Peel and Aquabrasion Device. 
Together, they deliver visible results from day one: the skin feels smoother, tighter and more radiant. Pores appear reduced, redness looks visibly reduced, and dry lines softened. After 4 weeks, skin looks visibly younger.

Your easier, faster and professional-level care from the comfort of home.
details:
Key Features

  • Developed for mature skin and beauty enthusiasts seeking transformation and improved skin appearance 
  • Features four advanced complexes targeting pores, skin barrier, exfoliation, and soothing
  • Includes Nutrilite™-sourced ingredients like White Chia Oil and Pomegranate Extract
  • Lightweight, concentrated formula designed to work seamlessly with the full Retexturizing System
  • Complements the Retexturizing Peel and Aquabrasion Device for optimal skin resurfacing

How To Use

RETEXTURIZING SYSTEM USAGE:
The Artistry Labs™ Retexturizing System includes the Retexturizing Peel, the Retexturizing Serum and the Aquabrasion Device Artistry Labs™. Use it quarterly for 4 weeks for the best exfoliation and smoothest skin. Use Peel 2x/week and Serum 2x/day, plus add the Aquabrasion device daily to promote optimal surface cell renewal. 
 
SERUM ONLY USAGE: 
After the 4 weeks of quarterly treatment, continue to use the Retexturizing Serum 2x/day to continue refining skin’s texture. Recommended use is daily.


Why Repeat Artistry Labs Retexturizing System Every 3 Months?
The skin’s natural renewal cycle slows with age, taking over 50% longer in mature skin. Repeating the Retexturizing System every three months helps restore balance to this natural rhythm, supporting long-term healthy-looking skin and maintaining visibly youthful results.

 

Usage with devices
Aritstry Labs Retexturizing Serum is compatible with Derma Architect in Skincare Mode, and Artistry Labs Aquabasion in Serum Mode.*

*Please refer to each specific device manual to see if there are additional benefit claims for each serum. The serums above are deemed safe to use with the device, however, we did not test ALL serums for additional benefit claims when used together with a device, so we do not have synergistic claims for all serums + devices. 
 

Suggested daily routine for deep wrinkles & enlarged pores: 

  1. Cleanse 
  2. Tone 
  3. Artistry Skin Nutrition Vitamin C + HA3 Daily Serum 
  4. Artistry Labs Retexturizing Serum 
  5. Artistry Skin Nutrition Correcting Serum 
  6. Moisturizer (add SPF during day) 

Always apply Artistry Serums in order of their viscosity and emolliency, from thinnest to thickest/watery to emollient/oily

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS/INGREDIENTES/INGRÉDIENTS/SASTOJCI/СКЛАД:

WATER/AQUA/EAU, PROPANEDIOL, SQUALANE, TRIETHYLHEXANOIN, HDI/ TRIMETHYLOL HEXYLLACTONE CROSSPOLYMER, HYDROGENATED LECITHIN, POLYGLYCERYL-10 MYRISTATE, DIMETHICONE, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, GLYCERIN, SODIUM BENZOATE, CAESALPINIA SPINOSA FRUIT EXTRACT, SPHINGOMONAS FERMENT EXTRACT, CHLORPHENESIN, GLYCOLIC ACID, 4-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXANOL, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, LENS ESCULENTA (LENTIL) SEED EXTRACT, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, LACTIC ACID, SODIUM MAGNESIUM SILICATE, CITRIC ACID, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, DISODIUM EDTA, DEXTRIN, KAPPAPHYCUS ALVAREZII EXTRACT, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, HYDROLYZED OPUNTIA FICUS-INDICA FLOWER EXTRACT, LECITHIN, STEARYL GLYCYRRHETINATE, PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT EXTRACT, SILICA, XANTHAN GUM, PHENOXYETHANOL, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, SODIUM HYALURONATE, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED OIL, ULEX EUROPAEUS LEAF/ROOT/STEM EXTRACT, CERAMIDE NP, BETA-SITOSTEROL, PERILLA OCYMOIDES LEAF EXTRACT, OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL, PERILLA OCYMOIDES SEED OIL, TOCOPHEROL, ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (ROSEMARY) LEAF EXTRACT, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, BHT

name: Soft Cream
description:
The gravity-defying lift of Artistry LongXevity™ Rich Cream,

delivered in a  lighter texture, to empower skin to look and act years younger.
overview:
Artistry LongXevity™ Soft Cream delivers the same gravity-defying effect of the Rich Cream in a lighter, refreshing texture. It helps support the skin’s natural vitality and renewal, moisturising for 24 hours and transforming the look of skin in 3 days.1

1Based on consumer and clinical studies, the formula visibly improves skin’s appearance instantly and within 3 days; including hydration, smoothness, and radiance. Individual results may vary.

 

What It Does For You

  • Delivers advanced anti-ageing benefits in a lightweight texture - ideal for warmer days and normal to combination skin.
  • Energises skin’s renewal process, helping to remove age related energy-stealing “zombie” cells for a rejuvenated appearance.
  • Moisturises skin for 24 hours, leaving it plumped with hydration throughout the day.
  • Instantly improves the look of radiance and brightness. 

Why You Would Like It

Cellular Vitality – The future of your skin.

 

The Artistry LongXevity collection supports your skin’s natural renewal cycle, helping it repair, hydrate, and boost collagen for a visibly younger, firmer look. With over 30 newly selected ingredients and more Nutrilite™ botanicals than any Artistry™ skincare product before - including Milk Thistle, White Chia Seed Oil, Spinach, and Acerola Cherry - this collection blends the power of nature and science. Clinically shown to make skin look up to 17 years younger,2 it’s your complete solution for radiant, resilient skin at any age.

 

2Based on a clinical study (Cutometer Analysis, n=33, ages 35–64), many participants showed skin characteristics comparable to up to 17 years younger. Individual results may vary.

Facts For You

  • Meets Artistry Clean Beauty Guidelines (Vegan, No animal testing).
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested.
  • Non-comedogenic.
  • Suitable for normal to combination skin.
  • Ideal for summer usage or warm climates.
  • Features packaging with post-consumer recycled (PCR) material.
  • Key ingredients like Milk Thistle are sustainably sourced from NutriCert™ certified farms.

Backed by clinical results and customer perception study to deliver visible skin transformation:

  • 89% of users say it helps reduce visible fine lines due to dryness in 3 days.3
  • 83% of users say it gives skin a lifted look in 3 days.3
  • 90% of users say it rejuvenates look of skin in 1 week.3
  • 81% of users say it reduces the appearance of sagging in 1 week.3
  • 82% of users say it helps reduce the appearance of deep wrinkles in 2 weeks.3
  • 85% of users say it helps jawline appear more angled and defined in 8 weeks.3

3Based on a consumer perception study (CSS/Datatelligence Study 76123B). Individual results may vary.
details:
How To Use

Apply pearl-sized amount of Artistry LongXevity Soft Cream to the face and neck using upward motions. Avoid contact with eyes. 

For best results, use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare ritual to help combat visible signs of ageing at the cellular level. 

  • Start by cleansing with any Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Cleanser.
  • Next, apply Artistry LongXevity Toner Essence.
  • Follow with your favourite Artistry Skin Nutrition Serum. 
  • Apply Artistry LongXevity Eye Cream around the delicate eye area. 
  • Then apply Artistry LongXevity Soft Cream.
  • In the morning, always finish with an Artistry Skin Nutrition SPF product.
  • Take your skincare routine to the next level with Artistry Derma Architect™ device to get the most out of the Artistry products.

Ingredients

  • Milk Thistle from NutriCert™ farms - firms, soothes, brightens and protects skin. 
  • Plant-Based Stem Cell Blend - energises and re-densifies skin’s appearance.
  • Gingko Biloba - removes energy-stealing and age-related “zombie” cells, revealing a rejuvenated appearance.
  • 24K Gold & Diamond Powder - diffuses light to soften the look of wrinkles and enhance skin’s luminosity.
  • Summer Snowflake Extract - helps reduce the appearance of wrinkles for smoother, more youthful-looking skin. 
  • Peony Extract - provides a fuller and plumping effect.
  • Cardiolipin + Olive Leaf Stem Cells + Glycogen - helps recharge cellular energy to increase the look of firmness and decrease look of wrinkles.
  • Mastic Resin Liposome - helps preserve the skin’s natural radiance and support its rejuvenating appearance.
  • Japonica Leaf Extract - delivers a gravity-defying lift for firmer, more sculpted contours.
  • Spinach - helps soothe the skin.
  • Argan Stem Cells – help to support skin cell wellness.
  • Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Oil - moisturisation and help strengthen and support the skin’s natural barrier.
  • Nutrilite-grown Acerola Cherry - high antioxidant value, rich in vitamin C.  

INGREDIENTS: WATER/AQUA/EAU, C15-19 ALKANE, GLYCERIN, PROPANEDIOL, BUTYLENE GLYCOL, C10-18 TRIGLYCERIDES, BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER, ETHYLHEXYL POLYHYDROXYSTEARATE, ARACHIDYL ALCOHOL, SALVIA HISPANICA SEED OIL, BEHENYL ALCOHOL, CALCIUM SODIUM BOROSILICATE, ARACHIDYL GLUCOSIDE, PENTYLENE GLYCOL, HYDROXYACETOPHENONE, HYDROXYETHYL ACRYLATE/SODIUM ACRYLOYLDIMETHYL TAURATE COPOLYMER, CHLORPHENESIN, POLYACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER-6, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, SPINACIA OLERACEA (SPINACH) LEAF EXTRACT, OLEA EUROPAEA (OLIVE) LEAF EXTRACT, PHENOXYETHANOL, ALLANTOIN, C12-15 ALKYL BENZOATE, OPHIOPOGON JAPONICUS ROOT EXTRACT, MALPIGHIA EMARGINATA (ACEROLA) FRUIT EXTRACT, FRAGRANCE/PARFUM, GLYCOGEN, ISOMALT, SACCHAROMYCES FERMENT, PAEONIA ALBIFLORA ROOT EXTRACT, 4-t-BUTYLCYCLOHEXANOL, MALTODEXTRIN, DIPOTASSIUM GLYCYRRHIZATE, TRIBEHENIN, LECITHIN, PISTACIA LENTISCUS (MASTIC) GUM, HYDROLYZED OPUNTIA FICUS-INDICA FLOWER EXTRACT, SORBITAN ISOSTEARATE, LESPEDEZA CAPITATA LEAF/STEM EXTRACT, SODIUM HYALURONATE, GINKGO BILOBA LEAF EXTRACT, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, 1,2 HEXANEDIOL, LEUCOJUM AESTIVUM BULB EXTRACT, GARDENIA JASMINOIDES MERISTEM CELL CULTURE, LAUROYL LYSINE, SILYBUM MARIANUM EXTRACT, ARGININE, CERAMIDE NG, ISODONIS JAPONICUS LEAF/STALK EXTRACT, CITRIC ACID, PEG-10 PHYTOSTEROL, GLYCERYL CAPRYLATE/CAPRATE, t-BUTYL ALCOHOL, CARNOSINE, DIAMOND POWDER, XANTHAN GUM, CYAMOPSIS TETRAGONOLOBA (GUAR) GUM, LACTIC ACID, ACACIA SENEGAL GUM, TOCOPHEROL, ARGANIA SPINOSA CALLUS CULTURE EXTRACT, SODIUM BENZOATE, CERAMIDE NP, DISODIUM EDTA, BETA-SITOSTEROL, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, CARRAGEENAN, DISODIUM BIS-DIOLEOYL GLYCEROPHOSPHOGLYCERIN, OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL, PALMITOYL HEXAPEPTIDE-12, PERILLA OCYMOIDES SEED OIL, GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL, GOLD, ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA  EXTRACT, BHT, ACETYL CEDRENE, LINALYL ACETATE, TETRAMETHYL ACETYLOCTAHYDRONAPHTHALENES, TRIMETHYLBENZENEPROPANOL.

name: Beauty Sleep Solution
description: Support your skin's regeneration at night with selected skincare and body care products.
overview:
Cleanse, nourish and indulge your way to dreamy skin with this night-time skincare routine for the whole body.

 

What It Does For You

The Artistry™ Beauty Sleep Solution is a collection of Artistry and g&h skincare products specially selected to help you pamper your face, nourish your body skin and support cell renewal while you sleep.

  • Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser cleanses away impurities that build up during the day like dust, make-up and pollution so skin pores are clean and receptive to the ingredients that follow.
     
  • Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask soothes skin for up to eight hours, enhances skin’s moisture barrier and embraces you with a pleasant essential oil fragrance featuring lavender grown on NutriCert™-certified partner farms, as well as bergamot.
     
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH™ Nourish Body Lotion nourishes skin and supports its moisture barrier with Bamboo Complex Water, Olive Oil-Derived Ceramide and Nutrilite-grown White Chia Seed Oil.
     
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Foot Cream instantly nourishes and softens dry feet, while repairing and protecting skin’s moisture barrier with a rich, non-greasy formula.
     
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Hand Cream nourishes and relieves dry rough hands with Bamboo Complex Water, Olive Oil-Derived Ceramide, White Chia Oil and Shea Butter.

1 x Artistry Skin Nutrition Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser (200 ml)
1 x Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask (80 ml)
1 x g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Body Lotion (400 ml)
1 x g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Foot Cream (100 ml)
1 x g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Hand Cream (75 ml)

Why You Would Like It

Support your skin’s night-time regeneration with a thoughtfully chosen selection of products for your face and body skin while allowing you to enjoy a little evening indulgence.

The stresses and strains of modern life can have adverse effects on our skin’s appearance, making it look dull or fatigued. Night time is an important time for skin and the way it looks, as skin regenerates 3 times faster when we’re asleep, compared to when we’re awake.

Artistry Beauty Sleep Solution helps you support your face and body skin while you sleep, relaxed in the knowledge that your skin is being treated to the benefits of natural ingredients and clean formulas that are vegan, dermatologically and allergy tested, and contain nothing they shouldn't contain.

Dream your way to healthy beauty.

Facts For You

Clean formula
The formulas used in Artistry and g&h products have been developed in accordance with the Artistry Clean and g&h Personal Care Clean standards, rigorous guidelines that ensure products are pure, safe and effective. This means:

  • Registered by the Vegan Society
  • No mineral oil, parabens, phthalates
  • No animal-derived ingredients and no animal testing involved.

Botanical ingredients
Every product included in the Artistry Beauty Sleep Solution contains one or more phytonutrients grown on our own Nutrilite or NutriCert™-certified partner farms. In addition to high quality, this provides a level of seed-to-skin or seed-to-supplement traceability you can trust.

Brands you can trust
The Beauty Sleep Solution combines the best of the Artistry brand’s extensive skin science expertise with sustainably grown ingredients from Nutrilite – the world’s no.1 vitamin and dietary supplement brand* – and the goodness and health properties of g&h products.

Created especially for you, by our community
The Artistry Beauty Sleep Solution has been co-created in collaboration with our community of ABOs who understand, represent and help address the skincare and beauty needs of women of all ages and skin types.

*Source: http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
details:
How To Use

The products in the Artistry™ Beauty Sleep Solution work together as part of a night-time skincare routine. Feel free to integrate it with your favourite Artistry or g&h products, such as cleansers, toners, serums and moisturisers.

Please consult each of the individual products for usage guidelines

  • Artistry Skin Nutrition Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser
  • Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH™ Nourish Body Lotion
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Foot Cream
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Hand Cream

Ingredients

Key ingredients for your beauty sleep skincare routine  
Every product included in the Artistry Beauty Sleep Solution contains one or more phytonutrients grown on our own Nutrilite™ or NutriCert™ certified partner farms, such as:

  • White Chia Seed
    It delivers skin-boosting benefits deep within skin’s surface and helps to visibly nourish and protect skin’s healthy beauty. This White Chia is grown on a certified-organic Nutrilite™ farm and partner farm, to provide unprecedented ‘seed-to-skin’ traceability.
    Features in: Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask and Artistry Skin Nutrition Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser
     
  • Fermented CICA extract
    This phytonutrient, derived from a flowering plant, helps soothe and moisturise skin. In its fermented form, it is seven times more effective in moisturising and two times more effective in soothing (compared to unfermented CICA).
    Features in: Artistry Skin Nutrition™ Sleeping Mask
     
  • Botanical complex
    The Sleeping Mask’s seven-ingredient botanical complex (containing rosemary, chamomile, skullcap, Asian knotweed, centella, liquorice and tea helps soothe and energise skin, reinforcing its moisture barrier.
    Features in: Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask
     
  • Tan Hua Flower
    Also known as Aqualuna, Beauty Under the Moon or Queen of the Night, Tan Hua flower offers hydration by acting on two levels: the skin’s barrier and epidermis. It helps improve the skin’s moisture barrier function and maintain water balance for improved, healthy-looking skin.
    Features in: Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask
     
  • Bamboo Complex Water
    A plant-based water made from bamboo and plant-derived glycerine to help moisturise skin.
    Features in: g&h Nourish Body Lotion, g&h Nourish Foot Cream and g&h Nourish Hand Cream
     
  • Olive Oil-Derived Ceramide
    A special type of lipid that helps maintain the skin’s moisture barrier.
    Features in: g&h Nourish Body Lotion, g&h Nourish Foot Cream and g&h Nourish Hand Cream

These ingredients work as part of scientifically developed formulas to bring the best of science and nature together for your skin.

For a full list of ingredients for individual products, please visit the product pages:

  • Artistry Skin Nutrition Micellar Makeup Remover + Cleanser
  • Artistry Skin Nutrition Sleeping Mask
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH™ Nourish Body Lotion
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Foot Cream
  • g&h GOODNESS AND HEALTH Nourish Hand Cream

name: Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™
description: Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™. Sustainable laundry detergent that offers powerful stain removal and biodegradable formula.
overview:
Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™ - Sustainable laundry detergent with powerful stain removal and EU Ecolabel certification.
 

What It Does For You

  • Powerful stain removal with advanced bio-enzymes and oxygen bleaching agent, and a bleach Activator.
  • Verified by Bioquest, containing natural origin and plant-based ingredients 
  • Certified sustainable by EU Ecolabel, ensuring environmentally friendly manufacturing.
  • Dermatologically tested for safety, gentle on skin.
  • Enhanced with optical brighteners to maintain bright and white colours .

Why You Would Like It

Discover the transformative power of Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™for your laundry routine. With its advanced formula, this isn't just any detergent—it's your partner in achieving cleaner, brighter, and healthier clothes. Imagine effortlessly removing even the toughest stains, thanks to the improved bio-enzymes and oxygen bleaching agent, and a bleach Activator. What's more, it's gentle on your skin, ensuring your family's comfort with every wash. Certified by EU Ecolabel for its sustainability, it not only cares for your clothes but also for the environment. Elevate your laundry experience with Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™ - because your laundry deserves nothing less than perfection.

Facts For You

Certified by EU Ecolabel, ensuring environmental sustainability.

Verified by Bioquest formula
details:
Key Features

Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™ utilises improved bio-enzymes that break down stains effectively, ensuring powerful cleaning without harsh chemicals. Enhanced with oxygen bleaching agent, and a bleach Activator, this detergent penetrates fabrics deeply, targeting and lifting dirt and grime to leave your clothes fresh and bright.

How To Use

Premium Concentrated Laundry Powder Detergent SA8™, use 1 scoop per standard load.
Add the detergent directly to the drum or detergent dispenser.
Follow garment care labels for water temperature and cycle settings for best results.

Use Directions: 

  1. Sort clothes by colour, fabric and amount and depth of soiling. Select water temperature. Use measuring scoop inside for a correct dosage. Check water hardness information with your water supply company. 
  2. No further bleach is required as SA8 already contains an activated oxygen bleach. 
  3. Use the lowest temperature (30*C), recommended dosage and the maximum load possible to reduce the energy and water consumption. 
  4. Dispose and recycle the packaging after use.

name: All Fabric Bleach SA8™
description: Amway SA8 All Fabric Bleach is a powerful stain remover for tough stains and odours, yet gentle enough for clothes and carpets.
overview:
SA8™ All Fabric Bleach offers powerful cleaning performance with colour-safe non-chlorine bleach for a multitude of textiles and surfaces. 

 

Why you will love it…

We all want our clothing to look vibrant, crisp and like new, no matter how many times it is washed. SA8 All Fabric Bleach helps you do just that. This powerful bleach detergent booster is based on oxygen bleach, rather than chlorine, so it cleans without fading colour intensity.

Hugely versatile, SA8 All Fabric Bleach effectively treats all types of organic stains and odour on a variety of textiles around the home including carpets. Additionally, use SA8 All Fabric Bleach on grouting, showers, sinks, wooden decks, cement, rubbish bins, garbage disposers, aquariums, fencing, tents and much, much more.  

 

Good to know…

  • Gentle on colours at all temperatures.
  • Suitable for clothes, carpets and other surfaces.
  • A powerful detergent booster that removes the toughest of stains.
  • Removes stains from coffee, wine, juice, pet mess etc.
  • Used as a pre-soak, it’s extremely effective on difficult stains.
  • Do not use on silk or wool.
  • More environmentally friendly packaging than the previous plastic bottle.
  • With 99.5% active ingredients, it is concentrated and economical to use.
  • Contains no phosphates, chlorine, dyes, EDTA or NTA and all ingredients are biodegradable.
  • Do not combine with chlorine-based bleach.

To use:

  • As a detergent booster, add 10 ml to each washing machine load. For best results, wash at 60°C or higher.
  • As a pre-soak, add 5 ml to 2 litres of hot water. Soak fabric for 30-minutes or longer and wash as normal.
  • To clean pots, fill the mug or teapot with boiling water, add 5 ml of SA8 All Fabric Bleach and allow it to stand for at least an hour. Pour away solution and rinse thoroughly.
  • Non-laundry use as an all-purpose cleaner: Also effective on many non-laundry stains. For scrubbing countertops, sinks, ceramic tiles etc., sprinkle powder directly onto the surface and scrub with damp sponge or cloth. Rinse well. For stained coffee pots or teapots fill the pot with hot or boiling water then add 5 ml powder. Let stand for 1-hour or longer. Drain then thoroughly rinse. Do not mix with other whitening washing coadjuvant.

DANGER

Causes serious eye damage. Harmfull if swallowed. May intensity fire, oxidiser. Contains Sodium Percarbonate. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. IF ON SKIN: Wash with plenty of soap and water. Keep out of reach of children. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Wear eye protection/face protection. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames. No smoking. Take any precaution to avoid mixing with combustibles. Dispose of contents at municipal collection point; Dispose of completely emptied containers for recycling.

Features

  • SA8™ All Fabric Bleach is a powerful detergent booster that will remove the toughest of stains
  • It is kind on colours because it uses an oxygen bleach, not a chlorine-based one
  • It works at all temperatures – from 20°C to 90°C
  • Used as a pre-soak, it’s extremely effective on difficult stains
  • It removes stubborn tea and coffee stains from mugs and pots and is a good all-purpose cleaner
  • With 99.5% active ingredients, it is concentrated and economical to use
  • SA8™ All Fabric Bleach contains no phosphates, chlorine, dyes, EDTA or NTA and all ingredients are biodegradable.
details:
Key Features

  • BIOQUEST FORMULA - effective cleaning, improved eco-friendly packaging and 100% biodegradable
  • Highly concentrated for powerful cleaning
  • Based on a special oxygen powered formula
  • Effective on stains even at low temperatures
  • Designed for use on most types of fabrics
  • Powerful performance and great value for money

How To Use

  • As a detergent booster, add 10 ml to each washing machine load. For best results, wash at 60°C or higher.
  • As a pre-soak, add 5 ml to 2 litres of hot water. Soak fabric for 30 minutes or longer and wash as normal.
  • To clean pots, fill the mug or teapot with boiling water, add 5 ml of All Fabric Bleach and allow to stand for at least an hour. Pour away solution and rinse thoroughly.
  • Non-laundry use as an all-purpose cleaner: Also effective on many non-laundry stains. For scrubbing counter tops, sinks, ceramic tiles etc., sprinkle powder onto surface and scrub with damp sponge or cloth. Rinse well. For stained coffee pots or teapots fill the pot with hot or boiling water then add 5 ml powder. Let stand for 1 hour or longer. Drain then thoroughly rinse. Do not mix with other whitening washing coadjuvant.
Uses All Fabric Bleach Water Applications
General Stain Removal 1/8 scoop (1 tsp.) (500 ml)

For water washable fabrics and upholstery apply to surface. Let stand 5-30 minutes. Scrub or blot (depending on surface). Rinse thoroughly. Allow to dry.
Laundry 1/4 scoop (10ml approx..) per wash load

Can be used in every load! Begin by filling washer with water (per garment makers care instructions). Add All Fabric Bleach and detergent then add clothes. Use instead of chlorine bleach.
Carpet Cleaning Machines 1 scoop (35ml) (4 liters)

Dissolve All Fabric Bleach in warm water in a bucket. Add to cleaning machine. May be used with other carpet cleaning solutions. Vacuum carpet when dry.
Carpet Spot Removal 1/8 scoop (1 tsp) . (1/2 liter)

Remove excess stain material or liquid before treatment. Pour solution onto spot. Let stand 5-30 minutes. Rinse. Blot up excess liquid. Vacuum when dry.
Tile and Grout 2 scoops (70ml) per 2 tablespoons (30 ml)

Mix solution into a paste. Apply to surface wearing rubber gloves. Let stand for 1 hour, scrub, rinse and dry.
Wood Decks, Siding and Fences.  Lawn Furniture and Awnings. 1 scoop (35ml) (4 liters)

Apply to surface from sprayer or bucket. Let stand 5-30 minutes. Scrub with a brush and rinse with plenty of water.
Soaking 1 scoop (35ml) (4 liters)

Add item and soak for 1-6 hours. Rinse or wash and rinse.

Please be aware:

  • Do not use on wool or silk garments
  • Do not use with chlorine bleach.

  • To clean pots, fill the mug or teapot with boiling water, add 5 ml of All Fabric Bleach and allow to stand for at least an hour. Pour away solution and rinse thoroughly.
  • As an all-purpose cleaner, to wash counter tops, ceramic tiles and sinks, sprinkle dry powder on to surface, scrub with a damp cloth or sponge and then rinse.
