The Toothbrush comes with a UV cleansing storage that deeply cleanses your brush heads within 10 minutes.

 

Why You Would Like It

Brushing is a key step in our oral care routine, not only for keeping teeth clean and ensuring plaque removal, but also for distributing essential minerals onto the enamel. Thanks to the innovative sonic technology, the Glister Multi-Action Power Toothbrush is designed to optimise the efficacy of Glister Multi-Action Toothpaste, for stronger and more decay-resistant teeth, ensuring a correct distribution of the toothpaste to help repair early cavities and prevent loss of tooth enamel.

Facts For You

  • Clinically proven to improve gingival bleeding by 64.75% after 2 weeks of use1.
  • Clinically proven to help remove plaque from enamel surfaces after 2 weeks of use1.
  • UV cleansing storage ensures optimal cleaning of the brush heads within 10 minutes.
  • Wireless charging: Safe and durable lithium battery lasts approximately 70 days on a full charge (at strongest intensity level). Product indicates low battery status. USB-A to DC 3.5 V power cable.
  • Vibrations via sonic motor: 32,000 vibrations per minute (VPM).
  • Comes with three brush heads: The replacement heads are also available for purchase in a box of three.
  • Folding carton made with FSC certified paper. This paper comes from sustainably managed forests practicing responsible forest management.

1Based on clinical study of gingivitis improvement and dental plaque removal effect for Glister™ Multi-Action Toothpaste and Glister™ Multi-Action Power Toothbrush.
details:
Key Features

BRUSHING MODES

  • 5 brushing modes tailored to specific oral care needs:
  1. Clean: serves as a basic tooth-brushing mode for those new to an electric toothbrush, focuses on cleaning between teeth and the interdental area. All three types of filaments vibrate evenly.
  2. Sensitive: designed for sensitive spots along gum line, using white filaments to vibrate very gently.
  3. Gum Care: provides massage-like brushing using various vibration patterns and intensity adjustments to support healthy gums and mouth.
  4. Whiten: concentrates on removing surface stains using blue filaments to move faster and stronger, scraping the surface of the teeth.
  5. Tongue: consistently and effectively vibrates on the back of the brush for gentle tongue cleaning

INTENSITY LEVELS

  • 3 intensity levels for a personalized brushing experience.

BRISTLE DESIGN

  • Innovative bristle design with 3 filaments targeting specific areas at once (interdental, teeth enamel, and gum line)
  • Green bristles: ultra-soft bristles cleaning deep between teeth and tough-to-reach areas.
  • Blue bristles: slim bristles which remove stains and whiten.
  • White bristles: double-split rounded-end bristles clean gently along gums.

UV CLEANSING STORAGE

  • The UV light cleansing box deeply cleanses the brush heads within 10 minutes.

ENHANCED BY 3 MAIN TECHNOLOGIES

  • Pressure sensor technology. When too much pressure is on the brush, the sound from the brush changes to an alert to notify the user, aiming in a gentle brushing experience.
  • Smart reminder function. -The toothbrush stops briefly every 30 seconds to inform you it´s time to move to the next quadrant of the mouth. It completely stops after two minutes to indicate the end of the recommended brushing duration for healthy teeth and mouth.
  • Anti-splash technology for a convenient, mess-free experience. When the power toothbrush is turned on, the vibration begins at low for three seconds to prevent the toothpaste from spraying and making a mess before increasing for effective brushing.

 

How To Use

For full information, including details on charging and maintenance, refer to Glister Multi-Action Power Toothbrush User Instructions available in the product box.

How to use

  1. Attach the brush head onto handle; make sure it is locked in place. Wet the bristles and apply Glister toothpaste.
  2. Place brush in mouth.
  3. Turn on by pressing and holding the Power and Mode Switch Button for three seconds.
  4. To select a mode, press the Power and Mode Button on the toothbrush. Switch among the five modes by clicking to each (Clean - the automatic setting, Sensitive, Gum Care, Whiten and Tongue) according to your preference.
  5. You can also choose between three intensity levels using the Intensity Display Button (low, medium, and high) for each mode. They will light up respectively when clicked through and during use.
  6. Hold the toothbrush at a slight angle (45 degrees) against your teeth. Gently press the bristles to reach the gum line or just beneath. Brush teeth using small back-and-forth motions.
    • The auto-reminder function will sound every 30 seconds until fully stopping at two minutes.
    • Toothbrush also features a pressure sensor that alerts you if you’re applying too much pressure while brushing.
  7. For maximum efficiency, spend 30 seconds brushing in each of the four quadrants of the mouth.
  8. Rinse the brush head and handle under running water and then wipe with a cloth or towel.
  9. Put the handle back in the charging base. Place the head in the UV cleansing box. To activate the UV cleansing mode, ensure the device is plugged in.

How to charge

  1. If one of the five mode displays blinks, or if the toothbrush will not turn on, it is time to recharge the toothbrush. Use the compatible charging base to do so.
  2. When charging, the mode display will slowly light up from bottom to top and will repeat until fully charged.
  3. For a full charge, the toothbrush needs approximately 24 hours. When complete, all indicator lights will turn off.

Recommendation: to maintain optimal battery life, please charge at regular intervals (e.g., every two to three weeks).
Please note: The charging base and toothbrush may become slightly warm during charging.

How to cleanse the brush head

  1. Open the UV cleansing box and place just the toothbrush heads inside. The bristles should point toward the UV lamp.
  2. Close the lid. Cleansing will start automatically. Do not open the lid during the cleansing process.
  3. Once the UV indicator goes out, open the box and remove the brush head.
  4. Please note: The bristles of the toothbrush head can be slightly damp when inserted. However, water must not be dripping from the toothbrush at any time.

Refer to our FAQ document available on the Amway Library for a full overview of the Frequently Asked Questions.

Click here to download the warranty document

Click here to download the Product Manual

name: Multi-Action Toothbrush (Medium)
description: With its exclusive design, the Glister Multi-Action Toothbrush facilitates effective plaque removal on all tooth surfaces and between the teeth when used with Glister Multi-Action Toothpaste. It also cleans the surface of your tongue and cheeks as well as along the gumline.
size: 4 brushes per pack (each a different color).
overview:
Make your oral hygiene routine more effective with the Glister Multi-Action Toothbrush. It removes plaque, cleans your teeth and tongueand massages your gums.

 

What It Does For You

  • Promotes healthy gums and overall oral health when used as part of the Glister Oral Care System.
  • Tough on plaque, yet gentle on your mouth.
  • Enhanced design with tongue and cheek cleaner removes more residue than brushing alone.
  • The brushes are crafted with multi-height nylon bristles. In-mould technology provides approximately 35% more filaments with a thinner head than a traditional anchor toothbrush. The thinner head and additional filaments allow hard-to-reach places to be cleaned efficiently.

Why You Would Like It

Regular brushing with the Glister Multi-Action Toothbrush helps you keep your teeth and gums healthy. It provides a gentler clean, thanks to a flexible neck that absorbs excess pressure, while giving you a secure grip for maximum control.
The gentle yet effective tongue and cheek cleaner on the back of the brush removes more bacteria than standard toothbrushing alone.
It helps you to clean hard-to-reach places, by providing you with a thinner head and 35% more filaments than a traditional anchor toothbrush.

Facts For You

Glister Multi-Action Toothbrushes are now:

  • BPA-free
  • PVC-free
  • Phthalate-free
  • Glister is the only oral care brand backed by Nutrilite, the world’s #1 selling vitamin and dietary supplement brand*
  • Glister is the first and only oral care brand with traceable product creation*

The paper packaging for the Glister Multi-Action Toothbrush is made with minimum 85% recycled content.

A remarkable 95% of panellists felt their mouth was cleaner after using the Glister Multi-Action Toothbrush as part of the Glister Oral Care System.

*SOURCE: GlobalData, http://gdretail.net/amway-claims/
details:
Key Features

  • Effectively cleans teeth, gums, tongue and cheeks
  • Engineered for an optimal experience
  • Available with Soft or Medium bristles

How To Use

This product is for STEP 1: BRUSH of the Glister Oral Care System. Use every morning and evening.

  1. After applying Glister Multi-Action Toothpaste to bristles, place your toothbrush at a 45° angle against the gums. Brush back and forth in a circular motion for at least 2 minutes. Do not forget to gently brush your gums as well.
  2. Brush the inside, the outside and the top of the teeth.
  3. Use the tip of the brush to clean the inside of the front teeth with a gentle up-and-down stroke.
  4. Finally, using the textured soft surface on the back of the toothbrush, clean your tongue to remove bacteria and freshen your breath.

Replace your toothbrush at least every 3 months for most effective cleaning.

name: Toothpaste Kids
description: Strawberry flavoured Glister™ kids toothpaste with fluoride helps 				strengthen and protect developing teeth.
overview:

details:

  • the REMINACT formula which helps redeposit essential natural minerals back into the enamel to help make teeth stronger and more resistant to decay.

name: Nourish Body Wash
description: Creamy, rich body wash that gently cleanses and nourishes skin with Bamboo Complex Water, Olive Oil-Derived Ceramide and White Chia Oil, leaving it feeling soft, smooth and conditioned.
overview:
Gently cleanse and nourish skin with a rich, creamy, floral-fragrance body wash that’s packed with Plant-based Goodness.

 

What It Does For You

  • Gently cleanses skin without drying, leaving it feeling soft, smooth and conditioned after washing.
  • Works up into a creamy, rich lather that indulges your skin and your senses.

  • Visibly nourishes and protects your skin’s healthy beauty with Nutrilite™ White Chia Oil – one of nature’s richest superfoods and a source of phytonutrients and antioxidants.

g&h Nourish Body Wash is packed with Plant-based Goodness to provide you with a nature-inspired skin-cleansing experience – ingredients like Bamboo Complex Water, Olive Oil-Derived Ceramide and White Chia Oil work together to gently cleanse and nourish your skin, leaving it feeling smooth, moisturised and conditioned.

This creamy body wash embraces you with a fruity floral scent that features warm and sweet peach notes, and a soft floral chamomile touch. The nature-inspired g&h Body Care scents were custom created using carefully selected essential oils to work in perfect harmony, so you can blend different products from the Nourish, Refresh and Protect collections and create your own personal aura and body care routine.

Since 1972 people worldwide have trusted the g&h brand to provide gentle, safe, and effective body care products. Look no further for you and your family.

Facts For You

Clean formula
g&h Nourish Body Wash is formulated according to our Personal Care Clean Standards, which means:

  • NO sulphate surfactants, artificial colorants, mineral oil, phthalates, parabens or alcohol.
  • Registered with The Vegan Society and free from all animal-derived ingredients, with no animal testing carried out.
  • Dermatologically and allergy tested to minimise the risk of allergies and irritation.
  • Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

Key Features

&h Body Wash is formulated with Plant-based Goodness, including:

  • Bamboo Complex Water. A plant-based water made from bamboo and plant-derived glycerine to help moisturise skin.
  • Olive Oil-Derived Ceramide. A special type of lipid that helps maintain the skin’s moisture barrier.

This White Chia is grown on a certified-organic Nutrilite™ farm and partner farm, to provide unprecedented “seed-to-skin” traceability.

  • Dispense the desired amount into your palm, or directly onto a sponge or wash cloth.

The formula includes a carefully curated blend of plant-derived ingredients to soothe and moisturise your baby’s delicate skin:

PLANT-BASED WATER
Calendula Complex Water

PLANT-BASED ESSENTIALS

Helps strengthen skin’s protective moisture barrier to boost and maintain a more stable moisture level in baby skin.

PLANT-BASED NUTRIENTS
Chamomile Essential Oil

ENHANCED WITH
Phyto Complex

name: Protect Hand Cleanser
description: Gentle and effective, the new g&h™ Protect Hand Cleanser helps to keep keep your hands clean and pampered.
overview:
Keep your hands clean and refreshed with the new g&h™ Protect Hand Cleanser. A must-have for the whole family* that offers gentle cleansing and keeps hands moisturized thanks to the Cica Complex Water and plant-based glycerin. Infused with Green Tea and Rosemary, this hygiene must-have also provides antioxidant protection and helps soothe skin.

* men, women and children (age 3 and up)

 

What It Does For You

  • Provides gentle and effective cleansing
  • Helps to maintain skin’s natural moisture barrier and helps to keep moisture in balance.
  •  Helps moisturize and soothe hands thanks to Cica Complex Water and plant-based glycerin.
  • Green Tea helps provide antioxidant protection, while Rosemary helps to soothe skin.

Facts For You

  • Consumer-tested for effectiveness
  • Bottle made with 30% recycled material.
  • g&h bottles are recyclable (exluding pumps). Think of a planet and recycle!*).*
  • 100% of the electricity required by Amway™ to manufacture g&h products in Ada, Michigan, USA, comes from sustainable wind power.**
  • Dermatology and allergy tested to minimize risk of allergies.

Use Instructions: Wet hands thoroughly with product and rub into skin until dry. Use of this product by children should be supervised by an adult. Avoid contact with eyes. This product is intended for external use only and should not be ingested. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin.

*Where appropriate recycling facilities are available; check locally.
**Based on 2021 data

name: Protect UV Sunscreen SPF 50+ PA++++
description: Lightweight, fast-absorbing Sunscreen SPF50+ PA++++, formulated with natural ingredients to help to protect the whole family from damaging UVB/UVA rays and environmental aggressors.
size: 100ml tube with screw cap and carton
overview:
A top-to-toe must-have for any family vacation, this lightweight SPF50+ PA++++ sunscreen protects, soothes and moisturises skin, while nurturing its natural microbiome.

 

What It Does For You

  • Protects you and your family’s skin from damaging UVA and UVB rays with broad-spectrum SPF50+ PA++++
  • Suitable for kids aged 3+
  • Absorbs quickly and easily, and leaves no white residue or greasiness thanks to a light, non-sticky formula
  • Uses the power of prebiotics to help nurture a more optimised skin microbiome
  • Provides antioxidant protection thanks to the NutriliteTM-grown Green Tea extract
  • Includes Rosemary to help soothe skin and Cica Complex Water, which helps to moisturise and soothe skin.
  • Dermatologically and Allergy Tested to Minimize the Risk of Allergies and suitable for face and body and everyday use.
  • Water resistant (40 minutes).

Why You Would Like It

A must-have for any family vacation, the g&h Protect UV Sunscreen 50+ PA++++ is your daily must-have product for when you´re planning longer hours in the sun

g&h Protect UV Sunscreen SPF50+ combines the best of advanced scientific sunscreen formulas, plant-based goodness, antioxidant ingredients and prebiotics to help to protect, moisturise and soothe skin, as well as nurture the skin’s microbiome.

The lightweight advanced formula contains powerful SPF50+ PA++++ protection against damaging UVA and UVB rays, Nutrilite-grown Green Tea extract to provide antioxidant protection, Cica Complex Water, which helps to moisturise and soothe skin.

It’s developed with a clean and vegan formula that contains no harsh chemicals, uses no animal-derived ingredients or animal testing, and follows traceability principles you can trust.

Facts For You

g&h Protect UV Sunscreen has been formulated according to the Personal Care Clean philosophy, which means it is:

  • Registered with The Vegan Society
  • Free from animal-derived ingredients
  • Developed and made without animal testing
  • Formulated with NO sulphate surfactants, artificial colorants, mineral oils, phthalates, parabens.

The Skin Cancer Foundation grants the seal of recommendation to products that meet the criteria and standards established by The Skin Cancer Foundation’s Photobiology Committee based on scientific material submitted to The Skin Cancer Foundation. For more information, visit Skincancer.org.
